src: A tornado, spawned from a large storm, has hit the United States city of Atlanta, Georgia, causing extensive damage throughout the city.
ref: Satu puting beliung, yang diwujudkan daripada ribut besar, telah melanda bandar Amerika Syarikat Atlanta, Georgia, menyebabkan kerosakan besar di seluruh bandar.

src: The National Weather Service confirmed Saturday morning that it was a tornado that struck the city.
ref: Perkhidmatan Cuaca Kebangsaan mengesahkan pada pagi Sabtu bahawa ia adalah puting beliung yang melanda bandar.

src: After reviewing the aftermath of the storm, they classified it as an EF2 tornado on the Enhanced Fujita scale.
ref: Selepas meninjau akibat taufan, mereka mengklasifikasikannya satu puting beliung EF2 pada skala Enhanced Fujita.

src: Atlanta mayor Shirley Franklin says she is beginning to apply for federal disaster aid.
ref: Datuk Bandar Atlanta Shirley Franklin berkata, dia mula memohon bantuan bencana persekutuan.

src: There have been no confirmed deaths, but the mayor's spokeswoman says there may be dead victims trapped within the ruins of a collapsed loft complex.
ref: Tiada sebarang kematian disahkan, tetapi jurucakap Datuk Bandar itu berkata mungkin ada mangsa mati terperangkap dalam runtuhan sebuah kompleks loteng.

src: The Fulton Cotton Mill Lofts are located in the historic Cabbagetown neighborhood, where at least 20 homes were destroyed.
ref: Fulton Cotton Mill Lofts terletak di kawasan berdekatan Cabbagetown yang bersejarah, di mana sekurang-kurangnya 20 buah rumah telah musnah.

src: It looks like a bomb went off, it looks like World War III, said Mahsud Olufani, who has an art studio in the neighbourhood.
ref: Ia kelihatan seperti bom meletup, ia kelihatan seperti Perang Dunia III, berkata Mahsud Olufani, yang mempunyai studio seni di kawanan berdekatan.

src: At least 27 people suffered injuries, mostly cuts and bruises.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 27 orang cedera, kebanyakannya luka dan lebam.

src: Grady Memorial Hospital, where many of the injured were taken, had suffered some window damage but was still operating.
ref: Hospital Peringatan Grady, di mana ramai yang cedera telah dimasukkan, telah mengalami beberapa kerosakan tetingkap tetapi masih beroperasi.

src: Around 50 people have been taken to a local Red Cross shelter for displaced residents.
ref: Kira-kira 50 orang telah dibawa ke tempat perlindungan Palang Merah tempatan untuk penduduk yang kehilangan tempat tinggal.

src: The tornado struck during the semifinal game of the SEC Basktetball Tournament between Mississippi State and Alabama.
ref: Puting beliung tersebut melanda ketika perlawanan separuh akhir Kejohanan Bola Keranjang SEC antara Negeri Mississippi dan Alabama.

src: Play was stopped with around 2 minutes to go in overtime when heavy wind could be heard outside with rippling of the roof.
ref: Permainan dihentikan ketika kira-kira 2 minit masuk ke lebih masa apabila angin berat kedengaran di luar dengan bumbung beralun.

src: Damage was done to the roof as debris fell to the floor.
ref: Kerosakan telah berlaku di bumbung kerana serpihan jatuh ke lantai.

src: "I thought it was a tornado or a terrorist attack," said Mississippi State guard Ben Hansbrough.
ref: "Saya fikir ia adalah puting beliung atau serangan pengganas," kata pengawal keselamatan Negeri Mississippi, Ben Hansbrough.

src: A tornado warning was issued for the downtown area a few minutes before the storm hit.
ref: Satu amaran puting beliung telah dikeluarkan bagi kawasan pusat bandar beberapa minit sebelum ribut melanda.

src: "Ironically, the guy behind me got a phone call saying there was a tornado warning," said Lisa Lynn, who was attending the game at the Georgia Dome.
ref: "Yang ironiknya, lelaki itu di belakang saya mendapat panggilan telefon mengatakan terdapat amaran puting beliung," kata Lisa Lynn, yang menghadiri perlawanan di Dome Georgia.

src: And in two seconds, we heard the noise and things started to shake.
ref: Dan dalam dua saat, kami mendengar bunyi bising dan benda mula bergegar.

src: The CNN Center in downtown Atlanta was severely damaged, especially in the atrium, where the ravaged ceiling allowed water to pour in.
ref: Pusat CNN di pusat bandar Atlanta telah rosak teruk, terutama di atrium, di mana siling rosak membolehkan air mengalir masuk.

src: Police closed several streets near the CNN Center because of the debris, which included power lines, billboards, and even office chairs.
ref: Polis menutup beberapa jalan berhampiran Pusat CNN kerana serpihan, yang termasuk talian kuasa, papan iklan, dan juga kerusi pejabat.

src: The Omni Hotel, which is attached to the CNN Center, also sustained damage, with many of its windows shattered.
ref: Hotel Omni, yang bersambung di Pusat CNN, juga mengalami kerosakan, dengan banyak tingkap pecah.

src: Visitors at the hotel were evacuated to the exhibition hall at street level. "
ref: Pelawat di hotel itu dipindahkan ke dewan pameran di paras jalan.

src: There was a lot of windows breaking and stuff falling," said Terrence Evans, a valet at the hotel.
ref: "Terdapat banyak tingkap pecah dan barangan jatuh," kata Terrence Evans, seorang valet di hotel.

src: At Centennial Olympic Park, located near CNN and the Omni Hotel, two Olympic torch sculptures had fallen over, and a performance pavilion was destroyed.
ref: Di Padang Olimpik Centennial, yang terletak berhampiran CNN dan Hotel Omni, dua ukiran obor Olimpik telah jatuh, dan astaka persembahan telah dimusnahkan.

src: A high-rise dorm at Georgia State University was damaged by the tornado, as evidenced by a large hole in the building's 14th floor.
ref: Sebuag asrama bertingkat tinggi di Universiti Negeri Georgia telah rosak akibat puting beliung, seperti yang dibuktikan oleh lubang yang besar di tingkat 14 bangunan itu.

src: According to Georgia Power, more than 13,000 of their customers are currently without electricity.
ref: Menurut Georgia Power, lebih daripada 13,000 pelanggan mereka pada masa ini tiada bekalan elektrik.

src: Crews are working to fix downed power lines, but they said it would be difficult with all the debris.
ref: Pekerja sedang berusaha memulihkan bekalan kuasa, tetapi mereka berkata ia akan menjadi sukar dengan serpihan-serpihan.

src: Another large storm, currently in Mississippi, is heading towards Atlanta, and is forecast to arrive around 3 p.m. National Weather Service meteorologist Mike Leary said Friday's storm could be "nothing to compare with what's coming in tomorrow".
ref: Satu lagi ribut besar, kini berada di Mississippi, sedang menuju ke arah Atlanta, dan dijangka tiba sekitar 3 p.m. Ahli meteorologi Perkhidmatan Cuaca Kebangsaan, Mike Leary berkata ribut Jumaat mungkin "tidak dapat dibandingkan dengan apa yang akan tiba esok."

src: All downtown events scheduled to occur Saturday have been cancelled.
ref: Aktiviti bandar yang dijadualkan pada hari Sabtu telah dibatalkan.

src: The remaining SEC tournament games are to be played at Georgia Tech's Alexander Memorial Coliseum, located in the undamaged midtown.
ref: Baki permainan kejohanan SEC akan dimainkan di Koliseum Peringatan Alexandar Georgia Tech, yang berada di kawasan tengah bandar yang tidak musnah.

src: Eleven people have died after a military helicopter crashed during an anti-narcotics flight in Western Mexico.
ref: Sebelas orang terbunuh selepas sebuah helikopter tentera terhempas semasa penerbangan operasi anti-narkotik di Mexico Barat.

src: Michoacan is a major area in Mexico's anti-narcotics operations, which are conducted by the nation's military.
ref: Michoacan adalah kawasan utama dalam operasi anti-narkotik Mexico yang dijalankan oleh tentera negara.

src: Police cordoned off the scene and forensic officers have moved in to examine the site.
ref: Polis telah mengepung tempat kejadian dan pegawai forensik telah bergerak untuk memeriksa kawasan ini.

src: There are 11 men dead, including a colonel, and one soldier was injured, said a state attorney general's office spokesman.
ref: Terdapat 11 orang mati, termasuk kolonel, dan seorang askar tercedera, kata jurucakap pejabat peguam negara negeri.

src: The wounded soldier, who was the sole survivor, was flown to a Mexico City military hospital, and remains there in a serious condition.
ref: Askar tercedera yang merupakan mangsa tunggal yang masih hidup, telah diterbangkan ke sebuah hospital tentera bandar Mexico berada dalam keadaan serius.

src: Although authorities released no crash details, witnesses say the helicopter lost power during attempts to land.
ref: Walaupun pihak berkuasa tidak mengeluarkan butir-butir kemalangan, saksi-saksi mengatakan bahawa helikopter kehilangan kuasa dalam percubaan untuk mendarat.

src: The motor stopped and the helicopter plummeted to the ground, said one local resident named Agustin Vargas.
ref: Motornya berhenti dan helikopter menjunam ke tanah, kata seorang penduduk tempatan yang bernama Agustin Vargas.

src: The flight had been headed to a marijuana field with the intention of raiding it.
ref: Penerbangan tersebut bertujuan untuk menyerbu medan ganja.

src: Aid from the United Nations has started to reach Myanmar after a recent cyclone in the region killed tens of thousands.
ref: Bantuan daripada Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu telah mula tiba di Myanmar yang dilanda taufan baru-baru ini di rantau yang telah membunuh puluhan ribu.

src: The UN Secretary General, Ban Ki-moon released a statement regarding the delivery of aid to Myanmar: Government officials in Myanmar have said that 22,464 people have been confirmed dead from Cyclone Nargis.
ref: Setiausaha Agung PBB, Ban Ki-moon mengeluarkan kenyataan mengenai penghantaran bantuan ke Myanmar: Pegawai-pegawai kerajaan di Myanmar telah berkata bahawa 22,464 orang disahkan mati dari taufan Nargis.

src: Only once rescue workers reached the hardest hit areas of the storm did they begin to realize the extent of damage that had occurred.
ref: Hanya sekali pekerja penyelamat sampai ke kawasan-kawasan yang paling teruk dilanda ribut dan mereka telah mula menyedari tahap kerosakan yang telah berlaku.

src: At least 10,000 people died in one town alone, Bogalay in the Pyapon District of the country.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 10,000 orang terbunuh dalam satu bandar sahaja, Bogalay di Daerah Pyapon negara.

src: The United Nations has reported that one million people are homeless, or in need of help in some other way.
ref: Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu telah melaporkan bahawa satu juta orang kehilangan tempat tinggal, atau memerlukan bantuan dengan cara lain.

src: A bus crash in France's Loire Valley has left seven of the Moroccan passengers dead.
ref: Satu kemalangan bas di Luruh Perancis Loire telah menyebabkan tujuh penumpang Maghribi mati.

src: 22 of the 32 on board were injured, four critically, after the bus smashed into a concrete pillar on the A10 near Blois in the small hours of yesterday morning.
ref: 22 daripada 32 di atas bas tercedera, empat orang kritikal, selepas bas merempuh tiang konkrit di A10 berhampiran Blois pada subuh pagi semalam.

src: The bus had departed Tiznit in South Morocco on Wednesday and was headed to the Parisian suburb of Les Mureaux.
ref: Bas itu berlepas dari Tiznit di Maghribi Selatan pada hari Rabu dan menuju ke pinggir bandar Paris Les Mureaux.

src: It had been hired by Aziz, a French company that provides buses to tourists and small traders heading between France and Morocco.
ref: Ia telah diupah oleh Aziz, sebuah syarikat Perancis yang menyediakan bas kepada pelancong dan peniaga kecil menuju antara Perancis dan Maghribi.

src: Media images show the vehicle's front end stuck several feet up the pillar, with the roof trapped against the top of the bridge it supported by the pillar.
ref: Imej media menunjukkan bahagian depan kenderaan terperangkap beberapa kaki atas tiang, dengan bumbung terperangkap terhadap bahagian atas jambatan dan disokong dengan tiang itu.

src: The entire wreck is left leaning at about a forty degree angle back towards the road, and has left the road at a fairly steep angle directly into the pillar.
ref: Seluruh bangkai itu dibiarkan bersandar pada kira-kira sudut empat puluh darjah dengan belakangnya berhadapan dengan jalan raya, dan telah meninggalkan jalan raya pada sudut yang agak curam terus ke dalam tiang.

src: The remains of a trailer it was towing can be seen still attached at the rear of the coach.
ref: Saki baki treler yang ia tunda boleh dilihat masih melekat di belakang bas itu.

src: Transport Minister Dominique Bussereau, who visited the scene shortly after the accident, said that "The incredible state of the bus showed that the impact was extremely violent."
ref: Menteri Pengangkutan, Dominique Bussereau, yang melawat tempat kejadian sejurus selepas kemalangan itu, berkata, "Keadaan yang luar biasa bas itu menunjukkan kesan itu amat dasyat".

src: The pictures showed the bus was in the livery of travel company Labat.
ref: Gambar-gambar itu menunjukkan bas itu dalam pakaian seragam khas syarikat pelancongan Labat.

src: The French Interior Ministry took the rare step of activating an emergency plan to ensure rapid response from large numbers of rescuers and resources.
ref: Kementerian Dalam Negeri Perancis mengambil langkah jarang digunakan mengaktifkan pelan kecemasan untuk memastikan tindak balas pantas dari sejumlah besar penyelamat dan sumber.

src: The scene was attended by four helicopters, 140 firefighters and 25 police officers, who had to free multiple victims from the wreck.
ref: Tempat kejadian dihadiri oleh empat helikopter, 140 anggota bomba dan 25 anggota polis, yang terpaksa membebaskan beberapa mangsa daripada bangkai kapal.

src: Six died immediately, and the seventh victim died shortly afterwards.
ref: Enam orang mati serta-merta, dan mangsa ketujuh meninggal dunia tidak lama selepas itu.

src: All the deceased were adults, and included one of the two drivers, the other of whom was seriously injured.
ref: Semua yang mati itu adalah orang dewasa, termasuk salah satu daripada dua pemandu, yang lain daripada mereka cedera parah.

src: Investigators believe no other vehicles were involved, but the exact circumstances remain unclear.
ref: Penyiasat-penyiasat itu percaya tiada kenderaan lain terlibat, tetapi keadaan yang sebenar masih tidak diketahui.

src: "Is this linked to a mechanical problem, drowsiness or a totally different cause?"
ref: "Adakah ini dikaitkan dengan masalah mekanikal, mengantuk atau sebab yang sama sekali berbeza"?

src: Bussereau said at the scene.
ref: Bussereau berkata di tempat kejadian.

src: His ministry's accident investigation bureau will conduct a major investigation inquiry, and a separate investigation will be launched by local prosecuters.
ref: Biro penyiasatan kemalangan kementeriannya akan menjalankan siasatan pertanyaan utama, dan penyiasatan yang berasingan akan dijalankan oleh pendakwaraya tempatan.

src: One possible cause is that the driver fell asleep at the wheel.
ref: Salah satu punca yang mungkin adalah bahawa pemandu tertidur di bas.

src: Investigators are also examining the bus to try to determine any sign of mechanical trouble.
ref: Penyiasat-penyiasat itu juga memeriksa bas untuk cuba menentukan apa-apa tanda masalah mekanikal.

src: There was good weather in the region of the town of Suevres, where the accident occurred, and very little traffic was using the road at the time, thought to be around 2.50am (0050 GMT).
ref: Terdapat cuaca baik di kawasan bandar Suevres, di mana kemalangan itu berlaku, dan lalu lintas yang tidak sesak di jalan itu pada masa itu, diagakkan sekitar 2:50 pagi (0050 GMT).

src: Morocco's King Mohammed VI has announced he will personally pay for care of the injured and repatriation of those killed.
ref: Raja Maghribi Mohammed VI telah mengumumkan beliau sendiri akan membayar untuk penjagaan mangsa tercedera dan penghantaran balik mereka yang terbunuh.

src: He also asked the ambassador to France to pass on his condolences.
ref: Baginda juga meminta duta ke Perancis untuk menyampaikan ucapan takziahnya.

src: Newly named Prime Minister of France Dominique de Villepin has had his cabinet accepted by President of the Republic Jacques Chirac.
ref: Perdana Menteri Perancis yang baru Dominique de Villepin telah membuatkan kabinet beliau diterima oleh Presiden Republik itu Jacques Chirac.

src: Head of the majority Union for a Popular Movement (UMP) party, Nicolas Sarkozy, comes as a second-in-command as Minister of the Interior, with the honorific rank of Minister of State.
ref: Ketua bagi parti majoriti Kesatuan untuk satu Pergerakan Popular (UMP) parti, Nicolas Sarkozy, sebagai pegawai kanan kedua sebagai Menteri Dalaman Negeri, dengan pangkat kehormatan Menteri Negara.

src: The Ministry of the Interior is traditionally one of the most important positions in the cabinet, with that of Finances; the Minister of the Interior is in charge, notably, of law enforcement and relationships with local governments.
ref: Kementerian Dalaman Negeri secara tradisinya salah satu kedudukan yang paling penting dalam Kabinet, setaraf dengan Kementerian Kewangan; Menteri Dalaman Negeri yang bertanggungjawab, terutamanya, mengenai penguatkuasaan undang-undang dan hubungan dengan kerajaan-kerajaan tempatan.

src: There is some uneasiness in having the head of a party in a position that is partly in charge of electoral redistrictings.
ref: Terdapat sedikit keresahan apabila ketua parti berada di kedudukan yang sebahagiannya bertanggungjawab bagi persempadanan bahagian pilihan raya.

src: Also, this arrangement creates a peculiar situation: it is public knowledge that Villepin and Sarkozy consider each other a dangerous political rival with respect to the 2007 presidential election, and they are widely said to loathe each other.
ref: Juga, aturan ini mewujudkan keadaan yang pelik: adalah pengetahuan umum bahawa Villepin dan Sarkozy menganggap satu sama lain sebagai saingan politik berbahaya berkenaan dengan pilihan raya presiden 2007, dan mereka secara meluas dikatakan benci satu sama lain.

src: However, as many as 31 ministers, delegate ministers and secretaries of state were named; still, this is a reduction from the preceding 43.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, sebanyak 31 menteri, menteri-menteri perwakilan dan setiausaha-setiausaha negara dinamakan; namun, ini adalah satu penurunan daripada 43 sebelumnya.

src: While the cabinet is for a large part copied from the preceding one, some ministers who had provoked controversy and animosity were removed or moved to another less risky position.
ref: Walaupun kabinet ini sebahagian besar disalin daripada yang sebelumnya, beberapa menteri yang telah menimbulkan kontroversi dan permusuhan telah dikeluarkan atau dipindahkan ke kedudukan lain yang kurang berisiko.

src: Dominique Perben, who pushed for controversial law which opponents allege curtail fundamental constitutional freedoms while Minister of Justice, was moved to the less sensitive position of Minister of Transportation and Equipment.
ref: Dominique Perben, yang mengesyorkan undang-undang berkontroversi di mana pihak lawan mendakwa menyekat kebebasan asasi perlembagaan manakala Menteri Kehakiman, telah dipindahkan ke kedudukan yang kurang sensitif iaitu Menteri Pengangkutan dan Peralatan.

src: It is also possible that the movement of Brigitte Girardin from Minister for the Oversea (relationships with French overseas departments and territories) to (international) Cooperation was motivated by the crisis that occurred in French Polynesia between Gaston Flosse and his opponent Oscar Temaru.
ref: Ia juga adalah satu kemungkinan bahawa pertukaran Brigitte Girardin dari Menteri bagi Luar Negara (hubungan dengan jabatan-jabatan di luar negara dan wilayah-wilayah Perancis) ke Kerjasama (antarabangsa) didorong oleh krisis yang berlaku di Polynesia Perancis antara Gaston Flosse dan lawannya Oscar Temaru.

src: While the Union for French Democracy (UDF) party, led by François Bayrou, formally remains in the ruling coalition along with the UMP, it has decided that, because the new government would probably do more of the same policies, it would not participate in it.
ref: Manakala parti Kesatuan untuk Demokrasi Perancis (UDF), diketuai oleh François Bayrou, secara rasmi kekal dalam parti pemerintah bersama-sama dengan UMP, ia telah diputuskan bahawa, kerana kerajaan baru mungkin akan melakukan lebih daripada dasar yang sama, ia tidak akan mengambil bahagian dalamnya.

src: The only member of the government from UDF is Gilles de Robien, as in the preceding government.
ref: Satu-satunya ahli kerajaan daripada UDF ialah Gilles de Robien, seperti dalam kerajaan sebelumnya.

src: Previous head of government Jean-Pierre Raffarin had lost the confidence of the French, with polls putting him as low as 22% confidence.
ref: Ketua kerajaan sebelumnya Jean-Pierre Raffarin telah kehilangan keyakinan orang Perancis, dengan pilihan raya meletakkan beliau pada keyakinan serendah 22%.

src: President Chirac's confidence among the citizenry is also a record low of 24%.
ref: Keyakinan Presiden Chirac di kalangan rakyat adalah juga pada rekod yang rendah 24%.

src: Four bombs blasted at popular seaside resorts in northern Spain on Sunday.
ref: Empat bom telah meletup di resort tepi pantai terkenal di utara Sepanyol pada hari Ahad.

src: The blasts were preceded by the warning of the Basque separatist group ETA, which allowed the police to evacuate the nearby area.
ref: Letupan tersebut telah didahului dengan amaran oleh Kumpulan Basque Separatis ETA, yang membenarkan pihak polis untuk mengosongkan kawasan berdekatan.

src: Previously, a first homemade bomb blasted in a bank in the Basque town of Getxo.
ref: Sebelum itu, satu bom buatan sendiri telah meletup di satu tebing sungai di bandar Basque Getxo.

src: Five hours later, a warning call was received in the Basque fire service telling that four bombs were planted on the beaches of Laredo and Noja, in the northern Spanish province of Cantabria.
ref: Lima jam kemudian, perkhidmatan bomba Basque telah menerima satu panggilan amaran yang menyatakan empat bom telah ditanam di pantai Laredo dan Noja, di utara Sepanyol wilayah Cantabria.

src: The four bombs exploded between 1100 (1000 GMT) and 1400.
ref: Keempat-empat bom tersebut meletup antara jam 1100(1000 GMT) dan 1400.

src: There were no injuries because the police had evacuated the area.
ref: Tiada kecederaan dilaporkan berikutan pihak polis telah mengosongkan kawasan tersebut.

src: ETA has routinely targeted tourist destinations in northern Spain during summer months.
ref: ETA secara rutin menyasarkan destinasi pelancongan di utara Sepanyol sepanjang musim panas.

src: The Large Hadron Collider (LHC) that started preliminary experiments on September 10, 2008 in CERN,Geneva, and the planned International Linear Collider (ILC) will carry out a series of experiments in the future to validate the standard model of particle physics.
ref: Pelanggaran Hadron Besar (LHC) yang telah memulakan eksperimen awal pada 10 September 2008 di CERN, Geneva, dan Pelanggaran Linear Antarabangsa yang dirancang (ILC) akan menjalankan siri kajian pada masa akan datang untuk mengesahkan model piawai fizik zarah.

src: The model predicts that Higgs boson particles gives mass to all fundamental particles and explains the existence of dark matter, or invisible matter in between galaxies.
ref: Model ini meramalkan bahawa zarah boson Higgs memberikan massa untuk semua zarah asas dan menerangkan kewujudan unsur gelap, atau unsur yang tidak dapat dilihat di antara galaksi.

src: The LHC is a 27 kilometer long circular high energy particle accelerator which took more than 20 years and USD $9 billion to build.
ref: LHC adalah 27 kilometer panjang yang mengelilingi tenaga tinggi pemecut zarah mengambil masa lebih daripada 20 tahun dan USD $9 bilion untuk dibuat.

src: In the next few weeks the machine will collide opposing beams of protons charged with approximately 7 TeV of energy resulting in cataclysmic conditions that will mimic the beginning of time, a re-creation of the Big Bang.
ref: Dalam beberapa minggu akan datang mesin akan berlanggar menentang proton lebih kurang 7 TeV tenaga menghasilkan keadaan bencana yang akan menyerupai permulaan masa, penciptaan semula Big Bang.

src: An upgraded version of the LHC was announced, nicknamed the "super LHC".
ref: Versi dinaik taraf daripada LHC diumumkan, digelar "LHC super."

src: The new accelerator will perform ten times the number of collisions as the current LHC over the same time.
ref: Pemecut baru akan melaksanakan sepuluh kali bilangan perlanggaran LHC terkini dari masa yang sama.

src: The upgrade will feature a new injection system and enhanced detectors to cope with the increase in data packets from collisions.
ref: Peningkatan ini mempunyai sistem suntikan baru dan pengesan yang dipertingkatkan untuk menampung peningkatan dalam paket data dari pertembungan.

src: The bigger International Linear Collider, nicknamed "Einstein's telescope", is planned by the International Technology Recommendation Panel (ITRP).
ref: Pelanggaran Linear Antarabangsa yang lebih besar, digelar "teleskop Einstein," dirancang oleh Panel Cadangan Teknologi Antarabangsa (ITRP).

src: The ILC will have a collision energy of 500 GeV and will collide electrons with particles of antimatter, called positrons, along a 30-40 km completely straight tunnel.
ref: ILC akan mempunyai tenaga perlanggaran 500 GeV dan akan bertembung elektron dengan zarah antimatter, yang dipanggil positron, bersama-sama terowong benar-benar lurus sejauh 30-40 km.

src: The ILC's two giant "guns" pointing at each other would be able to accelerate electrons and positrons to near-light speeds before smashing them together.
ref: Dua gergasi "senjata" ILC ini menunjuk ke arah satu sama lain akan dapat mempercepatkan elektron dan positron untuk kelajuan hampir cahaya sebelum memecahkan mereka bersama-sama.

src: "The LHC smashes protons together to discover new particles but also generates lots of debris that obscures the fine detail."
ref: "LHC menghempas proton bersama-sama untuk menemui zarah baru tetapi juga menghasilkan banyak serpihan yang mengaburi butir halus."

src: "The ILC would be a much cleaner machine and tell us far more about their real nature.
ref: "ILC akan menjadi mesin yang lebih bersih dan memberikan kita lebih mengenai sifat sebenar."

src: "says Brian Foster, professor of experimental physics at Oxford University and European director of the project.
ref: kata Brian Foster, profesor fizik eksperimen di Universiti Oxford dan pengarah projek Eropah.

src: The host country for the ILC has not yet been chosen but it is planned to have the machine constructed by late 2010.
ref: Negara tuan rumah bagi ILC masih belum dipilih tetapi ianya merancang untuk mempunyai mesin yang dibina pada lewat tahun 2010.

src: The new machine will cost an estimated USD $7 billion to build.
ref: Kos mesin baru akan dianggarkan USD $7 billion untuk dibina.

src: Physicists hope that ILC might be able to resolve some of the questions raised by Einstein's theories of relativity.
ref: Ahli fizik berharap ILC mungkin dapat menyelesaikan beberapa soalan yang dibangkitkan oleh teori kerelatifan Einstein.

src: Classified memos have revealed that the Bush administration knowingly endorsed enhanced interrogation techniques including waterboarding and other methods, that critics call torture, for use against terror suspects.
ref: Memo - memo sulit telah mendedahkan yang pentadbiran Bush dengan sengaja menyokong teknik soal siasat lanjut termasuk curahan air dan kaedah lain, yang pengkritik gelar penyeksaan, untuk diguna terhadap suspek pengganas.

src: The memos were issued to the CIA in 2003 and 2004 as classified documents in response to the department's former director George Tenet's request for White House approval.
ref: Memo itu dikeluarkan kepada CIA pada 2003 dan 2004 sebagai dokumen sulit sebagai jawapan kepada permohonan bekas pengarah jabatan untuk kelulusan Rumah Putih.

src: "The CIA believed then, and now, that the program was useful and helped save lives," commented a former CIA official, explaining the memos.
ref: "CIA percaya dulu, dan kini, yang program tersebut berguna dan membantu menyelamatkan nyawa," komen bekas pegawai CIA, menerangkan memo tersebut.

src: "But in the agency's view, it was like this:" We don't want to continue unless you tell us in writing that it's not only legal but is the policy of the administration'.
ref: "Tetapi dalam agensi tersebut, ia seperti ini:" Kami tidak mahu meneruskan melainkan kamu nyatakan kepada kami secara bertulis yang ianya bukan sahaja sah tetapi polisi pentadbiran'.

src: In private meetings led by then-National Security Adviser Condoleezza Rice, top administration officials Vice President Cheney, Attorney General Ashcroft and several former members of the administration discussed the endorsement of the programs.
ref: Dalam mesyuarat sulit yang diketuai oleh dahulunya Penasihat Keselamatan Negara Condoleezza Rice, pegawai pentadbiran tinggi Naib President Cheney, Peguam Negara Ashcroft dan beberapa bekas ahli pentadbiran membincangkan pelaksanaan program tersebut.

src: No one at the meetings had questioned the methods because the CIA had them "boxed in", a former official noted.
ref: Tiada siapa didalam mesyuarat tersebut mempersoalkan kaedah tersebut kerana CIA telah "menyekat" mereka, kata seorang bekas pegawai.

src: "They were saying, 'It's the only way to get the information we needed, and — by the way — we think there's another attack coming up'."
ref: "Mereka berkata, 'Ianya satu-satunya cara untuk mendapatkan maklumat yang kita perlukan, dan - walaubagaimanapun - kami fikir satu lagi serengan akan datang".

src: Another official, however, called the idea that the CIA had coerced the Bush administration into approving the torture methods "ridiculous".
ref: Seorang lagi pegawai, bagaimanapun, memanggil idea yang CIA telah memaksa pentadbiran Bush untuk meluluskan kaedah penyeksaan itu "tidak masuk akal".

src: The CIA, he said, understood the methods were "controversial and would be widely criticized if it became public".
ref: Cia itu, katanya, faham yang kaedah tersebut "kontroversi dan mungkin dikritik secara meluas jika ianya menjadi terbuka".

src: Tenet said that in a 2001 meeting with top administration officials, Rice had warned those attending of an impending attack by a top Al-Qaeda suspect, Abu Zubaydah.
ref: Tenet berkata dalam mesyuarat pada 2001 dengan pegawai atasan pentadbiran, Rice telah memberikan amaran kepada yang hadir mengenai kedatangan serangan dari suspek utama Al-Qaeda, Abu Zubaydah.

src: Bush had asked a CIA staffer if the methods really worked.
ref: Bush telah bertanya kepada pegawai CIA jika kaedah itu benar-benar berkesan.

src: Ashcroft had commented during the meetings that "history will not judge us kindly".
ref: Ashcroft telah memberi komen semasa mesyuarat yang "sejarah tidak akan menghakimi kita dengan baik".

src: Last month, Rice stated that there was concern over the legality of the program and that she was investigating if any laws had been broken.
ref: Bulan lalu, Rice menyatakan yang terdapat kebimbangan mengenai kesahan program tersebut dan dia sedang menyiasat jika sebarang undang-undang telah dilanggar.

src: The Coast Guard reported yesterday that a cargo ship laden with cement sank overnight in the Philippines, killing the vessel's chief engineer.
ref: Pengawal pantai semalam melaporkan bahawa sebuah kapal kargo dipenuhi simen tenggelam semalam di Filipina, membunuh ketua jurutera kapal tersebut.

src: A passing ship rescued the 19 others, while a coast guard rescue boat itself required rescue in strong waves in the region after getting into difficulties before losing contact.
ref: Sebuah kapal yang melalui kawasan telah menyelamatkan 19 yang lain, manakala bot penyelamat pengawal pantai sendiri memerlukan bantuan dalam gelombang kuat di kawasan tersebut selepas mengalami kesukaran sebelum terputus hubungan.

src: MV Maria Lourdes, a 639-ton vessel, had been transporting 22,000 bags of cement from Iligan City in Lanao del Norte and was headed towards a town in Occidental Mindoro when the starboard main engine failed.
ref: MV Maria Lourdes, sebuah kapal 639-tan, telah mengangkut 22,000 beg simen dari Bandar Iligan di Lanao del Norte dan menuju ke sebuah bandar di Occidental Mindoro semasa enjin utama sebelah kanan kapal gagal.

src: While running on only the port main engine, strong waves battered the ship until shortly after 7:00 p.m. Tuesday night, when she went down at Antique.
ref: Semasa berfungsi dengan hanya enjin utama kiri kapal, gelombang kuat melanda kapal sehingga sejurus selepas 7:00 p.m. malam Selasa, apabila dia turun di Antique.

src: The Coast Guard received word on the emergency at 7:03 p.m. from Candano Shipping Lines.
ref: Pengawal pantai menerima panggilan kecemasan pada 7:03 p.m. daripada Syarikat Perkapalan Candano.

src: Vessel 3504 was dispatched to aid the stricken ship, but the boat was also troubled by strong waves and eventually contact was lost.
ref: Kapal 3504 telah dihantar bagi membantu kapal yang ditimpa masalah tersebut, namun kapal tersebut turut dilanda masalah berikutan gelombang kuat dan akhirnya terputus hubungan.

src: A passing ship rescued the survivors from the Maria Lourdes instead.
ref: Sebaliknya sebuah kapal yang melalui kawasan menyelamatkan mangsa daripada Maria Lourdes.

src: Vessel 3504's crew were located on Sibay Island by the Philippine Air Force.
ref: Krew kapal 3504 ditemui di Pulau Sibay oleh Tentera Udara Filipina.

src: The seven-man crew had abandoned the boat to rough seas and sought refuge on the island.
ref: Tujuh krew lelaki tersebut telah meninggalkan kapal dan mencari perlindungan di pulau tersebut.

src: Two train derailments in two days have closed railway lines in Australia.
ref: Dua kejadian kereta api tergelincir dalam masa dua hari telah menutup landasan kereta api di Australia.

src: A Rio Tinto iron ore train derailled at Pilbara, on a spur of the Tom Price to Dampier line on Thursday 29.
ref: Sebuah kereta api bijih besi Rio Tinto tergelincir di Pilbara, di cabang jalan dari landasan Tom Price ke Dampier pada Khamis 29.

src: The following day, a freight train with 40 wagons derailed east of Kalgoorlie, injuring three people.
ref: Pada hari berikutnya, kereta api pengangkut yang ada 40 gerabak tergelincir di timur Kalgoorlie, mencederakan tiga orang.

src: The second derailment has closed the line used by the long distance Sydney to Perth Indian Pacific passenger train.
ref: Kegelinciran kedua telah menutup landasan yang digunakan untuk perjalanan jarak panjang kereta api penumpan India Pasifik dari Sydney ke Perth.

src: Operators Great Southern Railway expect to lose A$500,000 revenues as the line remains closed until at least Thursday.
ref: Operator Landasan Great Southern menjangka kerugian A$500,000 kerana landasan masih ditutup sehingga seawal hari Khamis.

src: Police say heavy rain has affected the area, and the federal Australian Rail Track Corporation say that a new access road needs to be built in order to clear the wreckage and repair the track.
ref: Polis berkata hujan lebat telah menjejaskan kawasan itu, dan persekutuan Perbadanan Landasan Keretapi Australia mengatakan bahawa jalan masuk yang baru perlu dibina untuk membersihkan bangkai kereta api dan membaiki trek.

src: Rio Tinto have sufficient stocks of iron ore already in place to keep working.
ref: Rio Tinto mempunyai stok bijih besi sedia ada yang mencukupi untuk terus beroperasi.

src: However, the freight train was carrying consumer products, which may run short in the south of Western Australia in the next few days.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kereta api pengangkut itu membawa barangan pengguna, yang mungkin kehabisan di selatan Australia Barat dalam beberapa hari akan datang.

src: The Kalgoorie crash is to be investigated by the Australian Transport Safety Bureau, while maintenance company Transfield Services will also be examining the incident.
ref: Kemalangan Kalgoorie itu akan disiasat oleh Biro Keselamatan Pengangkutan Australia, manakala syarikat penyelenggaraan Perkhidmatan Transfield juga akan memeriksa kejadian itu.

src: Tennessee Governor Phil Bredesen signed a bill Wednesday authorizing the state's new budget of nearly $26 billion.
ref: Gabenor Tenesse Phil Bredesen menandatangani rang undang-undang pada hari Rabu meluluskan belanjawan baru negeri tersebut hampir $26 bilion.

src: The new budget increases spending for education and fulfills Bredesen's commitment to decrease TennCare spending.
ref: Belanjawan baru tersebut menambahkan perbelanjaan untuk pendidikan dan memenuhi komitmen Bredesen dalam mengurangkan perbelanjaan TennCare.

src: The new budget also includes an increase in spending for the state's preschool program, as much as $100 million in funding for TennCare disenrollees, and a significant contribution to the state's reserve fund.
ref: Belanjawan baru tersebut juga termasuk peningkatan dalam perbelanjaan program prasekolah negeri tersebut, sebanyak $100 juta dalam pembiayaan pendaftar TennCare, dan sumbangan besar kepada dana rizab negeri tersebut.

src: Bredesen also signed into law a bill authorizing the General Assembly to begin drafting new ethics laws.
ref: Bredesen juga menandatangani rang undang-undang membenarkan Perhimpunan Agung untuk mula menggubal undang-undang etika baru.

src: Portions of Wikileaks.org, the "uncensorable Wikipedia for untraceable mass document leaking and analysis", has been blocked in Australia.
ref: Sebahagian daripada Wikileaks.org, "Wikipedia yang tidak dapat ditapis untuk kebocoran banyak dokumen yang tidak dapat dikesan dan analisis," telah disekat di Australia.

src: Wikinews has also learned that three URL links to Wikipedia, a free, online encyclopedia anyone can edit, have also been blocked.
ref: Wikinews juga telah mendapati bahawa tiga pautan URL Wikipedia, yang bebas, sesiapa sahaja ensiklopedia dalam talian sesiapa sahaja boleh menyunting, juga telah disekat.

src: Portions of the video sharing website YouTube have also been blocked.
ref: Sebahagian daripada perkongsian video laman web YouTube juga telah disekat.

src: The websites are among thousands of others that the Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA), a government owned entity, block access to when using their blocking software.
ref: Laman-laman web itu adalah antara beribu-ribu yang lain yang Suruhanjaya Komunikasi Australia dan Pihak Berkuasa Media (ACMA), sebuah entiti milik kerajaan, menyekat akses apabila menggunakan perisian penyekat mereka.

src: The alleged three lists, from 2008 and 2009, were leaked to Wikileaks who published the documents.
ref: Tiga senarai yang diperkatakan, dari tahun 2008 dan 2009, telah dibocorkan kepada Wikileaks yang menerbitkan dokumen.

src: Most of the blocked websites are ones hosting hardcore pornography.
ref: Kebanyakan laman web yang disekat adalah laman web yang menghoskan pornografi berteras keras.

src: According to their website, the ACMA's role in regards to the internet is to "address community concerns about offensive and illegal material online and, in particular, to protect children from exposure to material that is unsuitable for them."
ref: Menurut laman web mereka, peranan ACMA dalam hal internet ini adalah untuk "melahirkan kebimbangan masyarakat tentang bahan yang menjelikkan dan menyalahi undang-undang dalam talian dan, khususnya, untuk melindungi kanak-kanak daripada pendedahan kepada bahan yang tidak sesuai untuk mereka."

src: Despite the alleged leak, Stephen Conroy, the Minister for Broadband, Communications and the Digital Economy in Australia, much of the listed websites were never an issue with the ACMA, but that some of the websites are.
ref: Walaupun kebocoran yang dikatakan itu, Stephen Conroy, Menteri Jalur Lebar, Komunikasi dan Ekonomi Digital di Australia, banyak laman web yang disenaraikan tidak pernah ada masalah dengan ACMA, tetapi beberapa laman web mempunyai masalah.

src: He also goes on to say that anyone publishing the content of the ACMA's list will face criminal prosecution.
ref: Beliau juga seterusnya berkata bahawa sesiapa sahaja menerbitkan kandungan senarai ACMA akan menghadapi pendakwaan jenayah.

src: "I am aware of reports that a list of URLs has been placed on a website."
ref: "Saya sedar ada beberapa laporan yang senarai URLnya telah diletakkan di laman web."

src: "ACMA is investigating this matter and is considering a range of possible actions it may take including referral to the Australian Federal Police."
ref: "ACMA sedang menyiasat perkara ini dan sedang mempertimbangkan pelbagai tindakan termasuk rujukan kepada Polis Persekutuan Australia."

src: "Any Australian involved in making this content publicly available would be at serious risk of criminal prosecution," said Conroy in a statement to the press.
ref: "Mana-mana warga Australia yang terlibat dalam mendedahkan kandungan ini kepada umum akan berdepan risiko pendakwaan jenayah yang serius," kata Conroy dalam satu kenyataan kepada media.

src: Wikileaks insists the list is real and that publishing the three of them reflects what ones were added in the past, then removed or vice versa.
ref: Wikileaks menegaskan senarai itu adalah benar dan bahawa penerbitan mereka bertiga mencerminkan apa yang telah ditambah pada masa lalu, kemudian dikeluarkan atau sebaliknya.

src: "Between the 11th and yesterday, the company did an enormous cleanup of the list."
ref: "Di antara 11 haribulan dan semalam, syarikat itu melakukan satu pembersihan yang besar di dalam senarai."

src: "No doubt as a result of the list appearing on Wikileaks."
ref: "Tidak syak lagi ini adalah akibat daripada senarai yang muncul di Wikileaks."

src: "Where the list previously contained over 2000 URLs, and Conroy and the ACMA claimed 'See!
ref: "Di mana senarai itu sebelum ini mengandungi lebih 2000 URL, dan Conroy dan ACMA mendakwa 'Lihat!

src: Our 'current list' never contained that many URLs', this new list is about the size the ACMA claimed it to be," said Wikileaks in a statement posted on their website.
ref: senarai terkini kita 'tidak pernah terkandung begitu banyak URL', senarai baru ini adalah kira-kira saiz yang ACMA dakwa sebelum ini," kata WikiLeaks dalam kenyataan yang disiarkan di laman web mereka.

src: Wikileaks recently leaked documents that revealed the ACMA's alleged list of 2,395 blocked websites, portions of Wikileaks being among them.
ref: Wikileaks baru-baru ini membocorkan dokumen yang mendedahkan dakwaan senarai ACMA sebanyak 2,395 laman web disekat, sebahagian Wikileaks turut bersama mereka.

src: Of the three lists, the final one shows that the ACMA "cleaned up" their list, according to Wikileaks.
ref: Daripada tiga senarai itu, yang terakhir menunjukkan bahawa ACMA "membersihkan" senarai mereka, menurut Wikileaks.

src: One of the blacklisted URLs to Wikileaks includes a leaked list of blocked websites in Denmark.
ref: Salah satu URL yang disenaraihitamkan untuk Wikileaks termasuk senarai bocor laman web yang disekat di Denmark.

src: Not included on the list is the leaked list of blocked websites in Thailand.
ref: Tidak termasuk dalam senarai itu adalah senarai yang bocor dari laman web yang disekat di Thailand.

src: "This week saw Australia joining China and the United Arab Emirates as the only countries censoring Wikileaks."
ref: "Minggu ini menyaksikan Australia menyertai China dan United Arab Emirates sebagai satu-satunya negara yang menapis Wikileaks."

src: "Australian democracy must not be permitted to sleep with this loaded gun."
ref: "Demokrasi Australia tidak boleh dibenarkan untuk tidur dengan senapang yang diisi peluru ini."

src: "If Australia's 'Senator for Censorship', Steven Conroy, has his way, Australia will be the first Western country to have a mandatory Internet censorship regime," said Wikileaks in another statement on their website.
ref: "Jika 'Senator untuk Penapisan'Australia, Steven Conroy, mempunyai cara, Australia akan menjadi negara barat yang pertama yang mempunyai rejim penapisan Internet wajib," kata WikiLeaks dalam kenyataan lain di laman web mereka.

src: "The first rule of censorship is that you cannot talk about censorship".
ref: "Peraturan pertama penapisan adalah bahawa anda tidak boleh bercakap mengenai penapisan."

src: Portions of Wikipedia blocked include a photo taken by Wikinews contributor David Shankbone titled The making of an adult film by David Shankbone.
ref: Sebahagian daripada Wikipedia disekat termasuk gambar yang diambil oleh penyumbang Wikinews David Shankbone bertajuk pembuatan filem dewasa oleh David Shankbone.

src: The URL was added to the ACMA's list on July 28, 2008.
ref: URL itu telah dimasukkan dalam senarai tersebut oleh ACMA pada 28 Julai 2008.

src: However, Wikinews has learned that the file was deleted from Wikimedia Commons on January 21, by Wikipedia co-founder Jimmy Wales by "user request: Courtesy delete per request of uploader".
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Wikinews telah belajar bahawa fail yang telah dipadam dari Wikimedia Commons pada 21 Januari, oleh pengasas Wikipedia Jimmy Wales oleh "permintaan pengguna: minta budi bahasa pengguna memadam setiap permintaan pemuatnaik."

src: It was deleted more than one year after the ACMA added the URL to its list.
ref: Ia telah dipadamkan lebih daripada satu tahun selepas ACMA menambah URL untuk senarai.

src: Other portions of Wikipedia that are blocked are pages belonging to users Cyde and Ewlyahoocom.
ref: Bahagian-bahagian lain Wikipedia yang disekat ialah laman web milik Cyde pengguna dan Ewlyahoocom.

src: Wikinews contacted the ACMA for a statement, but as of this report, there was no response.
ref: Wikinews menghubungi ACMA untuk kenyataan, tetapi sehingga laporan ini, tidak ada jawapan.

src: Wikinews also contacted Mr. Wales who confirmed the file was deleted because he was asked to do so.
ref: Wikinews juga menghubungi Encik Wales yang mengesahkan fail itu telah dihapuskan kerana beliau telah diminta untuk berbuat demikian.

src: "This had nothing to do with Australia," said Wales to Wikinews.
ref: "Ini tidak ada kena mengena dengan Australia," kata Wales ke Wikinews.

src: Wales did not say whether he was aware of the specific file linked to Wikipedia was being blocked.
ref: Wales tidak menyatakan sama ada beliau sedar fail tertentu dikaitkan dengan Wikipedia telah disekat.

src: The Wikipedia URLs appear on all three lists leaked by Wikileaks.
ref: URL Wikipedia muncul di semua tiga senarai yang dibocorkan oleh Wikileaks.

src: Another image, in the same photo set was also deleted by Mr. Wales on the same day, but that URL does not appear on the alleged ACMA list.
ref: Satu lagi imej, dalam set gambar yang sama juga dipadam oleh Encik Wales pada hari yang sama, tetapi URL yang tidak muncul dalam senarai ACMA yang dikatakan itu.

src: It underwent a request for deletion in 2008, which was later deleted despite it being discussed as 'keep'.
ref: Ia menjalani permintaan untuk penghapusan pada tahun 2008, yang kemudiannya dipadam walaupun ianya telah dibincangkan sebagai 'simpan'.

src: An anonymous source told Wikinews that the images were sexually explicit and featured three men, pornography star Michael Lucas, Rodrigo diCarli and Kurt Wild, having anal intercourse.
ref: Sumber tanpa nama memberitahu Wikinews bahawa imej-imej adalah seksual yang jelas dan memaparkan tiga lelaki, bintang pornografi Michael Lucas, Rodrigo diCarli dan Kurt Wild, mempunyai hubungan seksual menerusi dubur.

src: Shankbone told Wikinews that he has "no comment for this story."
ref: Shankbone memberitahu Wikinews bahawa dia "tiada komen untuk cerita ini."

src: Websites caught linking to or promoting websites on the ACMA's block list could face a fine of AU$11,000 per day if they don't remove the content in question within 24 hours of receiving a notice from the ACMA.
ref: Laman web yang ditangkap menghubungkan atau mempromosikan laman web dalam senarai blok ACMA ini boleh dikenakan denda sebanyak AU$11,000 setiap hari jika mereka tidak membuang kandungan yang berkenaan dalam tempoh 24 jam selepas menerima notis daripada ACMA.

src: The same standard can be enforced on an international level.
ref: Piawaian yang sama boleh dikuatkuasakan di peringkat antarabangsa.

src: Fines can be imposed on websites outside Australia that link to material on its list.
ref: Denda boleh dikenakan ke atas laman web di luar Australia yang mengandungi pautan ke bahan dalam senarainya.

src: In an appearance on the The Tonight Show with Jay Leno Thursday night, United States President Barack Obama told host, Jay Leno, that he had bowled at the White House bowling alley and scored a 129.
ref: Dalam penampilan di The Tonight Show dengan Jay Leno Khamis malam, Presiden Amerika Syarikat Barack Obama beritahu kepada hos, Jay Leno, bahawa dia telah bermain bowling di lorong bowling Rumah Puutih dan meraih skor 129.

src: It was like the Special Olympics or something, the President said.
ref: Ia adalah seperti Sukan Olimpik Khas atau sesuatu, kata Presiden.

src: The Special Olympics is an international organization that promotes self-confidence and social skills for people with intellectual disabilities.
ref: Sukan Olimpik Khas adalah sebuah organisasi antarabangsa yang menggalakkan keyakinan diri dan kemahiran sosial untuk orang kurang upaya intelek.

src: It organizes the Special Olympics World Games which is recognized by the International Olympic Committee and is similar to the Paralympic Games which are for people with physical disabilities.
ref: Ia menganjurkan Olimpik Khas Dunia yang diiktiraf oleh Jawatankuasa Olimpik Antarabangsa dan adalah sama dengan Sukan Paralimpik yang bagi orang-orang kurang upaya fizikal.

src: Even before the taped show was aired, Barack Obama called the chairman of the Special Olympics to apologize.
ref: Walaupun sebelum rakaman persembahan disiarkan, Barack Obama menelefon pengerusi Olympik Khas untuk memohon maaf.

src: He phoned Timothy Shriver from Air Force One on the way back to Washington, D.C.. Tim Shriver is also the son of Eunice Kennedy Shriver who founded the Special Olympics.
ref: Dia menelefon Timothy Shriver dari Air Force One dalam perjalanan pulang ke Washington, D.C. Tim Shriver juga anak kepada Eunice Kennedy Shriver yang mengasaskan Olympik Khas.

src: "He expressed his disappointment, and he apologized in a way that was very moving. "
ref: "Beliau melahirkan rasa kecewa, dan beliau meminta maaf dengan cara yang sangat menggerakkan hati."

src: "He expressed that he did not intend to humiliate this population," Shriver said on Friday in an interview on Good Morning America.
ref: "Dia menyatakan bahawa dia tidak berniat untuk memalukan populasi ini," Shriver berkata pada hari Jumaat dalam satu temu bual di Selamat Pagi Amerika.

src: "People with special needs are great athletes and productive citizens."
ref: "Orang-orang yang mempunyai keperluan khas adalah atlet yang hebat dan rakyat yang produktif."

src: "The President made an offhand remark making fun of his own bowling that was in no way intended to disparage the Special Olympics," White House deputy press secretary, Bill Burton, said.
ref: "Presiden membuat kenyataan begitu saja mengejek permainan bowlingnya sendiri bahawa ia adalah tidak sama sekali bermaksud untuk memperkecilkan Sukan Olimpik Khas," Timbalan Setiausaha Akhbar White House, Bill Burton, berkata.

src: "He thinks that the Special Olympics are a wonderful program that gives an opportunity to shine to people with disabilities from around the world."
ref: "Beliau berfikir bahawa Sukan Olimpik Khas adalah satu program hebat yang memberikan peluang untuk bersinar kepada orang kurang upaya di seluruh dunia."

src: Meanwhile, Kolan McConiughey, a top Special Olympics bowler told the Associated Press that he doesn't think Obama bowls like a Special Olympian.
ref: Sementara itu, Kolan McConiughey, seorang pemain bowling yang teratas di Olimpik Khas memberitahu Associated Press bahawa dia tidak berfikir Obama bermain bowling seperti Olympian Khas.

src: McConiughey has five perfect 300 games on his track record as a bowler and averages a score of 212.
ref: McConiughey mempunyai lima sempurna 300 permainan rekod pencapaiannya sebagai bowler dan purata skor 212.

src: "I'd tell him to get a new bowling ball, new shoes and bring him down to the lane," said McConiughey, offering bowling advice to the President.
ref: "Saya memberitahu beliau untuk mendapatkan bola bowling baru, kasut baru dan membawa dia ke lorong," kata McConiughey, menawarkan nasihat bowling kepada Presiden.

src: "Keep his body straight, his arm straight and keep his steps straight".
ref: "Pastikan badannya lurus, tangannya lurus dan langkahnya lurus."

src: Maria Shriver, sister of Tim Shriver, said "The President's comment hurts millions of people throughout the world."
ref: Maria Shriver, saudara perempuan Tim Shriver, berkata "komen Presiden menyakitkan berjuta-juta orang di seluruh dunia."

src: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger, who is married to Maria Shriver, said, "He [Obama] loves Special Olympics, and he would do everything he can to help Special Olympics."
ref: Gabenor California Arnold Schwarzenegger, yang berkahwin dengan Maria Shriver, berkata, "Dia [Obama] suka Olimpik Khas, dan dia akan melakukan apa saja dia boleh untuk membantu Olimpik Khas."

src: Press Secretary Robert Gibbs told reporters, "I know that the President believes that the Special Olympics are a triumph of the human spirit, and I think he understands that they deserve a lot better than — than the thoughtless joke that he made last night".
ref: Setiausaha Akhbar Robert Gibbs memberitahu wartawan, "Saya tahu bahawa Presiden percaya bahawa Olimpik Kkas adalah kejayaan semangat manusia, dan saya fikir dia memahami bahawa mereka berhak mendapat lebih baik daripada - daripada jenaka yang tidak difikir yang dia buat semalam."

src: Four bombings in two days have left over 130 dead in Iraq, with at least as many injured.
ref: Empat pengeboman dalam dua hari telah menyebabkan lebih daripada 130 kematian di Iraq, dengan sekurang-kurangnya ramai yang cedera.

src: Al Jazeera reports that at least 60 were killed in the two explosions at a tomb in Baghdad today.
ref: Al Jazeera melaporkan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya 60 terbunuh dalam dua letupan di sebuah makam di Baghdad hari ini.

src: Unlike yesterday's attacks, one of which was also in Baghdad, today's attacks happened in rapid succession.
ref: Tidak seperti serangan semalam, salah satu daripadanya juga berlaku di Baghdad, serangan hari ini berlaku dalam turutan masa yang singkat.

src: Two gates of the Shia tomb were targeted shortly before the Friday prayer - a time at which it would be crowded.
ref: Dua pintu makam Syiah disasarkan sejurus sebelum solat Jumaat - masa di mana ia akan sesak.

src: According to police reports yesterday, at least 76 people were killed in the two separate suicide bombings that happened Thursday.
ref: Menurut laporan polis semalam, sekurang-kurangnya 76 orang terbunuh dalam dua serangan berani mati berasingan yang berlaku hari ini.

src: 48 people were killed by a suicide bomber in a restaurant in the northeastern Iraqi town of Baquba.
ref: 48 orang telah dibunuh oleh seorang pengebom berani mati di sebuah restoran di bandar Iraq timur laut Baquba.

src: The other blast had occurred in Baghdad, when a suicide bomber detonated a belt full of explosives near a group of police officers giving supplies to Iraqis displaced by sectarian violence.
ref: Letupan lain berlaku di Baghdad, apabila pengebom berani mati meletupkan tali pinggang yang penuh dengan bahan letupan berhampiran sekumpulan pegawai polis yang memberi bekalan kepada rakyat Iraq yang disesarkan oleh keganasan mazhab.

src: "Obviously that has the fingerprints of al-Qaeda," said a Baghdad security spokesman, Major-General Qassim Moussawi, commenting yesterdays attack.
ref: "Jelas sekali ia mempunyai unsur-unsur al-Qaeda," kata seorang jurucakap keselamatan Baghdad, Mejar Jeneral Qassim Moussawi, mengulas serangan semalam.

src: She received 68 percent of the vote after 96 percent of the ballots were tallied.
ref: Beliau menerima 68 peratus undi selepas 96 peratus daripada undi telah dikira.

src: Turnout in the elections was reported at slightly more than fifty percent.
ref: Jumlah pengundi dalam pilihan raya telah dilaporkan mencapai lebih sedikit daripada lima puluh peratus.

src: A candidate must win at least half the vote in order to avoid a run-off election if the turnout is over 50%.
ref: Calon perlu menang sekurang-kurangnya separuh daripada undi untuk mengelak daripada pilihan raya tambahan sekiranya jumlah keluar mengundi adalah lebih daripada 50%.

src: With voter turnout at less than 50%, a candidate needs at least 33% support from all persons eligible to cast a ballot.
ref: Dengan peratusan keluar mengundi kurang daripada 50%, seseorang calon memerlukan sekurang-kurangnya 33% sokongan daripada semua yang layak membuang undi.

src: I congratulate the Lithuanian people for their choice, she said at her election headquarters.
ref: Saya mengucapkan tahniah kepada rakyat Lithuania atas pilihan mereka, beliau berkata di ibu pejabat pilihan raya.

src: A cyclone struck coastal areas of Bangladesh and India, causing flooding.
ref: Taufan melanda kawasan pantai di Bangladesh dan India, mengakibatkan banjir.

src: At least seventeen people have been killed as a result of the storm, and thousands have been left homeless.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tujuh belas orang telah terbunuh akibat ribut tersebut, dan beribu-ribu orang telah kehilangan tempat tinggal.

src: Winds reaching 100 kilometres per hour in Kolkata, the capital of India's West Bengal province, have uprooted trees and destroyed communication lines.
ref: Angin selaju 100 kilometer sejam di ibu negeri wilayah Bengal Barat India, Kolkata, telah menumbangkan pokok dan memusnahkan talian komunikasi.

src: "The situation is very grave, countless families have been displaced, especially in the Sundarbans," said Kanti Ganguly, the state minister of the Sundarbans region of Western Bengal.
ref: "Keadaan ini sangat serius, banyak keluarga telah kehilangan tempat, terutamanya di Sundarbans," kata menteri dalam negeri kawasan Sundarbans di Barat Bengal, Kanti Ganguly.

src: Airport operations in Kolkata were stopped as a result of the inclement weather; several Kolkata-bound flights were diverted elsewhere, and flights scheduled to depart were cancelled.
ref: Operasi lapangan terbang di Kolkata dihentikan akibat cuaca buruk; beberapa penerbangan di Kolkata dialihkan ke tempat lain, dan penerbangan yang dijadualkan untuk berlepas telah dibatalkan.

src: The India Meteorological Department has said that the cyclone will likely subside within 24 hours.
ref: Jabatan Meteorologi India berkata bahawa taufan mungkin akan reda dalam tempoh 24 jam.

src: “We expect the wind speed to peak in the next 24 hours."
ref: "Kami menjangka kelajuan angin akan memuncak dalam tempoh 24 jam akan datang".

src: "This isn’t an unusually strong cyclone and we don’t expect damage to be widespread,” said the department's director general, Ajith Tyagi.
ref: "Ini bukan satu taufan yang luar biasa kuatnya dan kami tidak berjangka kerosakan akan merebak begitu luas," kata Ketua Pengarah jabatan itu, Ajith Tyagi.

src: An American football coach has been shot at his school gym in Iowa, United States.
ref: Seorang jurulatih bola sepak Amerika telah ditembak di gimnasium sekolah di Iowa, Amerika Syarikat.

src: Ed Thomas was shot in front of his students at around 8.00 am local time.
ref: Ed Thomas telah ditembak di hadapan murid-muridnya pada kira-kira 8:00 pagi waktu tempatan.

src: Thomas was in the weight room at the time of the shooting.
ref: Thomas ada di dalam bilik angkat berat pada masa tembakan.

src: An adult male has been arrested suspected of his murder.
ref: Seorang lelaki dewasa telah ditangkap disyaki pembunuhan beliau.

src: Thomas was the head football coach at Aplington-Parkersburg High School.
ref: Thomas adalah ketua jurulatih bola sepak di Aplington-Parkersburg High School.

src: He had coached 37 seasons of High School football in his career and has a career record of 292-84 of which 156-31 is with Aplington-Parkersburg.
ref: Beliau telah melatih 37 musim High School bola sepak dalam kerjayanya dan mempunyai rekod kerjaya 292-84 yang 156-31 adalah dengan Aplington-Parkersburg.

src: He led Parkersburg to 19 state playoffs and won state titles in 1993 and 2001.
ref: Beliau mengetuai Parkersburg ke 19 pertandingan negeri dan memenangi gelaran negeri pada tahun 1993 dan 2001.

src: He was named NFL High School Coach of the Year in 2003 and previously coached four active NFL players including Brad Meester, Jared DeVries, Casey Wiegmann and Aaron Kampman.
ref: Beliau dinamakan NFL High School Jurulatih Terbaik pada tahun 2003 dan sebelum ini melatih empat pemain NFL aktif termasuk Brad Meester, Jared DeVries, Casey Wiegmann dan Harun Kampman.

src: Thomas was well known in the local community for his work.
ref: Thomas terkenal dalam masyarakat tempatan untuk kerjanya.

src: When Parkersburg was hit by a tornado in the summer of 2008 Thomas worked endlessly to restore the damaged football field.
ref: Apabila Parkersburg dilanda puting beliung pada musim panas tahun 2008 Thomas bekerja tanpa henti untuk memulihkan padang bola sepak yang rosak.

src: County Sheriff Jason Johnson said that "Coach Thomas is the pillar of the community.
ref: County Sheriff Jason Johnson berkata, "Jurulatih Thomas ialah tiang masyarakat.

src: Police in Kenya have arrested a man thought to be the organiser of an attack by up to 30 men armed with clubs and spears that killed internationally renowned Scottish gemstone expert Campbell Bridges.
ref: Polis di Kenya telah menahan seorang lelaki disyaki sebagai penganjur satu serangan yang ditubuhkan oleh 30 lelaki bersenjatakan belantan dan lembing yang membunuh pakar batu permata Scotland terkenal di peringkat antarabangsa Campbell Bridges.

src: The 71-year-old was ambushed last week near Voi where he owns several mines.
ref: Dia yang berusia 71 tahun telah diserang hendap minggu lalu berhampiran Voi di mana dia memiliki beberapa lombong.

src: Bridges' family had received death threats for years over a dispute over access to his gemstone mines.
ref: Keluarga Bridges telah menerima ancaman bunuh selama bertahun-tahun ke atas pertikaian ke atas akses kepada lombong batu permatanya.

src: Regional police chief Herbert Khaemba anounced today: "The suspect believed to be the main organiser of the brutal murder was arrested by the police at the Kenyan border town of Taveta in hiding.
ref: Ketua Polis Daerah Herbert Khaemba mengumumkan pada hari ini: "Suspek dipercayai menjadi penganjur utama pembunuhan kejam itu telah ditangkap oleh polis di bandar sempadan Kenya Taveta semasa dia bersembunyi.

src: The police are still pursuing other suspects who were armed with crude weapons during the attack."
ref: Polis masih memburu suspek yang bersenjatakan senjata kasar dalam serangan itu".

src: The arrested man is reported to be the chairman of a group of local small-scale miners.
ref: Lelaki yang ditangkap dilaporkan menjadi pengerusi sekumpulan pelombong kecil-kecilan tempatan.

src: He is thought to have been intending to flee to neighbouring Tanzania.
ref: Dia dipercayai telah berniat untuk melarikan diri ke negara jiran Tanzania.

src: The area's minerals have been disputed ever since Bridges discovered the locally unique stone Tsavorite in the 1960s.
ref: Mineral di kawasan ini telah dipertikaikan sejak Bridges menemui batu Tsavorite sejenis permata yang unik pada tahun 1960-an.

src: Please do not delete this page until flagged for speedy deletion by the user!
ref: Sila jangan memadam halaman ini sehingga ditanda untuk penghapusan segera oleh pengguna!

src: This is for a demonstration of English Wikinews' use of Flagged Revisions to various people working with the Foundation on the implementation for English Wikipedia.
ref: Ini adalah untuk demonstrasi penggunaan Wikinews Bahasa Inggeris mengenai Semakan Ditanda kepada pelbagai orang yang bekerja dengan Yayasan itu dalam pelaksanaan Bahasa Inggeris Wikipedia.

src: Chris Hughton has been appointed permanent manager of English football club Newcastle United, having previously served as its temporary caretaker manager since the start of the season.
ref: Chris Hughton telah dilantik sebagai pengurus tetap kelab bola sepak Inggeris, Newcastle United, setelah sebelum ini berkhidmat sebagai pengurus sementara sementara sejak awal musim ini.

src: His permanent contract was to run until the end of the 2010–11 season.
ref: Kontrak tetap beliau adalah untuk berjalan sehingga akhir musim 2010-11.

src: The 50 year old former Tottenham Hotspur and Republic of Ireland defender joined the club in 2008 when he was appointed Newcastle United assistant manager by Kevin Keegan, with the club at the time in the top flight of English football, the Premier League.
ref: Dia seorang 50 tahun, bekas Hotspur Tottenham dan Republik pertahanan Ireland menyertai kelab itu pada tahun 2008 apabila beliau dilantik sebagai Penolong Pengurus Newcastle United oleh Kevin Keegan, dengan kelab itu pada masa yang di liga utama bola sepak Inggeris, Liga Perdana Inggeris.

src: Hughton then became temporary Newcastle United caretaker manager twice last season, as managers came and went, and at the end of the season, the club were ultimately relegated to the second tier, the Football League Championship.
ref: Hughton kemudian menjadi sementara pengurus sementara Newcastle United dua kali musim lalu, sebagai pengurus datang dan pergi, dan pada akhir musim ini, kelab ini telah akhirnya diturunkan ke peringkat kedua, Kejohanan Liga Bola sepak.

src: In his third spell as caretaker, he had been in charge of the club since the start of the season, and had guided the team to the top of the table, and for his efforts was awarded the Football League Championship Manager of the Month twice, for August and September.
ref: Dalam musim ketiga sebagai penjaga sementara, dia telah bertanggungjawab bagi kelab itu sejak awal musim ini, dan memberi petunjuk kepada pasukan untuk bahagian atas meja, dan usaha-usaha beliau telah dianugerahkan Pengurus Bola Sepak Liga Championship dalam Bulan dua kali, bagi bulan Ogos dan September.

src: "It's a very proud day for me to be named as the manager of this magnificent football club.
ref: "Ia adalah hari yang sangat membanggakan bagi saya untuk dinamakan sebagai pengurus kelab bola sepak yang hebat ini.

src: I will be doing everything in my power to get the club back into the Premier League at the first time of asking.
ref: Saya akan melakukan segala-galanya dalam kuasa saya untuk mendapatkan kelab itu kembali ke Liga Perdana pada masa yang pertama di tangga.

src: Having the unequivocal backing of the players has helped me enormously and I would also like to thank Colin Calderwood, Paul Barron and the rest of the backroom staff who have been tremendously supportive to me this season."
ref: Mempunyai sokongan tidak berbelah bagi pemain telah membantu saya dengan besar dan saya juga ingin mengucapkan terima kasih Colin Calderwood, Paul Barron dan seluruh kakitangan bilik belakang yang telah dengan ketara sokongan kepada saya musim ini."

src: According to Sky Sports, many Newcastle fans had 'made no secret of their desire' to see a return to the club as manager of Alan Shearer after relegation and over the summer break.
ref: Menurut Sky Sports, ramai peminat Newcastle 'tidak menyembunyikan hasrat mereka untuk melihat pulangan ke kelab itu sebagai pengurus Alan Shearer selepas penyingkiran dan lebih cuti musim panas.

src: Shearer, the former club captain, was hired on a short term 8 game contract at the end of last season, but could not steer the club away from relegation.
ref: Shearer, kapten kelab yang pertama, telah diupah pada jangka 8 kontrak permainan pendek pada akhir musim lalu, tetapi tidak dapat mengemudi kelab itu dari zon penyingkiran.

src: As the new season progressed, Hughton remained caretaker, and ten days prior to Hughton's appointment, Shearer had said: "I can't revolve my life around that any more because I have other things going on.
ref: Sementara musim baru berlangsung, Hughton kekal sementara, sepuluh hari sebelum pelantikan Hughton, Shearer berkata: "Saya tidak boleh berputar hidup saya di sekitar itu lagi kerana saya perkara-perkara lain berlaku.

src: If it happens, it happens, and if it doesn't, it doesn't...And at the moment Chris Hughton is doing a great job."
ref: Jika ia berlaku, ia berlaku, dan jika tidak, ia tidak...Dan pada masa ini Chris Hughton adalah melakukan kerja yang sangat baik."

src: The announcement came on the same day as it announced that the club would be putting the naming rights of the club stadium St James' Park up for offers next season, and that owner Mike Ashley was taking the club off the market for a second time.
ref: Pengumuman itu dibuat pada hari yang sama kerana ia mengumumkan bahawa kelab itu akan meletakkan hak menamakan stadium kelab St James 'Park untuk tawaran musim depan, dan pemilik Mike Ashley telah mengambil kelab di luar pasaran untuk kali kedua.

src: Scientists at the Ohio University predicted that the ice sheets of Mount Kilimanjaro, Africa's tallest mountain peak, will melt in the next twenty years due to global warming.
ref: Ahli-ahli sains di Universiti Ohio meramalkan bahawa lapisan ais di Gunung Kilimanjaro, puncak gunung tertinggi di Afrika, akan cair dalam dua puluh tahun akan datang akibat pemanasan global.

src: The ice that was present in 1912 gradually decreased by 85% by 2000, and by 2007 another 26% of the amount in 2000.
ref: Ais yang ada pada tahun 1912 secara beransur-ansur berkurangan sebanyak 85% pada tahun 2000, dan pada 2007 sebanyak 26% lagi daripada jumlah tahun 2000.

src: This was the first time that the volume of the ice in Kilimanjaro was measured.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama jumlah ais di Kilimanjaro diukur.

src: The tests were conducted by Lonnie Thompson, a professor at Ohio University.
ref: Ujian itu telah dijalankan oleh Lonnie Thompson, seorang profesor di Universiti Ohio.

src: "The fact that so many glaciers throughout the tropics and subtropics are showing similar responses suggests an underlying common cause," Thompson said.
ref: "Hakikatnya begitu banyak glasier di seluruh kawasan tropika dan subtropika yang menunjukkan respon yang hampir sama mencadangkan faktor asas yang sama," kata Thompson.

src: Change in cloudiness and weather could have also been factors in the retreat of the ice, especially in recent decades, scientists said.
ref: Perubahan dalam keadaan mendung dan cuaca boleh juga menjadi faktor-faktor dalam pengunduran ais, terutamanya dalam beberapa dekad kebelakangan ini, kata saintis.

src: These findings were first published in the journal proceedings of United States National Academy of Sciences (NAS) on Monday.
ref: Penemuan ini mula-mula diterbitkan dalam prosiding jurnal Amerika Syarikat Akademi Sains Kebangsaan (NAS) pada hari Isnin.

src: A wildlife official in Zimbabwe said today that the amount of animal poaching in the country has increased substantially this year, blaming an international crime syndicate.
ref: Seorang pegawai hidupan liar di Zimbabwe berkata hari ini bahawa jumlah pemburuan haram haiwan di negara ini telah meningkat dengan ketara tahun ini, dan menyalahkan sindiket jenayah antarabangsa.

src: He said that 65 elephants and 30 rhinoceroses have been killed this year by poachers.
ref: Beliau berkata 65 gajah dan badak 30 telah terbunuh tahun ini oleh pemburu haram.

src: "From January to October this year we have lost 65 elephants through poaching," said Vitalis Chadenga, the operations director of the Zimbabwe National Parks and Wildlife Authority.
ref: "Dari Januari hingga Oktober tahun ini kita telah kehilangan 65 gajah melalui pemburuan haram," kata Vitalis Chadenga, pengarah operasi daripada Taman Negara dan Hidupan Liar Lembaga Zimbabwe.

src: "In the same period we have lost 24 black and six white rhinos. "
ref: "Dalam tempoh yang sama, kami telah kehilangan 24 hitam dan enam badak putih".

src: "It is true that we have witnessed an escalation of poaching nationwide, particularly on private farms."
ref: "Memang benar bahawa kami telah menyaksikan peningkatan pemburuan haram di seluruh negara, terutamanya di ladang-ladang persendirian".

src: "We do have a group of international gangsters, who are funding poachers around this part of the world and taking away many horns and it is a major problem," the director continued; "we have arrested 2,500 poachers in the same period, ten poachers have been shot dead since the beginning of this year."
ref: "Kami mempunyai kumpulan samseng antarabangsa, yang membiayai pemburu haram di sekitar rantau ini dan mengambil banyak tanduk dan ia adalah satu masalah yang besar," kata Pengarah yang berterusan; "kita telah menahan 2,500 pemburu haram dalam tempoh yang sama, sepuluh pemburu haram telah ditembak mati sejak awal tahun ini".

src: Zimbabwe is one of four countries in Africa that are home to large numbers of rhinos, the others being Kenya, Namibia, and South Africa.
ref: Zimbabwe adalah salah satu daripada empat negara di Afrika yang menjadi rumah kepada sejumlah besar badak, yang lainnya adalah Kenya, Namibia dan Afrika Selatan.

src: About 100,000 elephants live in Zimbabwe, and Chandenga said that the numbers have been growing in past years.
ref: Kira-kira 100,000 gajah hidup di Zimbabwe, dan Chandenga berkata bahawa bilangan telah berkembang dalam tahun-tahun yang lalu.

src: Insurgents in eastern Afghanistan fired rockets into a marketplace on Monday, killing ten civilians in an area where French armed forces were meeting with tribal elders.
ref: Pemberontak di Afghanistan timur menembak roket ke pasar pada hari Isnin, membunuh sepuluh orang awam di kawasan di mana angkatan tentera Perancis bertemu dengan pemimpin puak.

src: French and Afghan officials said the attack, which was in the town of Tagab in the Kapisa province, wounded at least 28 people.
ref: Pegawai Perancis dan Afghanistan berkata serangan itu, yang berada di bandar Tagab di wilayah Kāpīsā itu, mencederakan sekurang-kurangnya 28 orang.

src: Two rockets hit the market as the commander of French troops in eastern Afghanistan, General Marcel Druart, was meeting tribal chiefs nearby.
ref: Dua roket mengena pasar semasa komander tentera Perancis di Afghanistan timur, Jeneral Marcel Druart, bertemu ketua-ketua puak berhampiran.

src: "The Taliban fired the rockets from Badrab, where they have a base."
ref: "Taliban menembak roket dari Badrab, di mana mereka mempunyai satu pangkalan".

src: "They are strong there," said deputy police chief Haji Mohammed Akbar.
ref: "Mereka kuat di sana," kata Timbalan Ketua Polis Haji Mohammed Akbar.

src: French and US medical teams evacuated the wounded by helicopter to hospitals for treatment.
ref: Pasukan perubatan Perancis dan Amerika Syarikat yang tercedera dipindahkan dengan helikopter ke hospital untuk rawatan.

src: The French commander attended the gathering of tribal elders, known as a "shura," as part of NATO efforts to win the trust of Afghan civilians in a region with a strong Taliban presence.
ref: Komander Perancis tersebut menghadiri perhimpunan pemimpin puak, yang dikenali sebagai "syura," sebagai sebahagian daripada usaha NATO untuk memenangi kepercayaan orang awam Afghanistan di rantau yang mempunyai pengaruh Taliban yang kuat.

src: French troops have been fighting the Taliban northeast of the capital, Kabul, to try to secure towns and roads threatened by the militants.
ref: Tentera Perancis telah memerangi Taliban di timur laut ibu negara, Kabul, untuk cuba melindungi bandar-bandar dan jalan raya daripada diancam oleh militan.

src: The King of Jordan, King Abdullah, dissolved the country's parliament on Tuesday, half-way through its four year term, and called for early general elections to be held, up to two years ahead of schedule.
ref: Raja Jordan, Raja Abdullah, membubarkan Parlimen negara itu, semalam, selepas separuh daripada tempoh empat tahun penggal, dan beliau mengadakan pilihan raya umum lebih awal, dua tahun lebih awal dari jadual.

src: The monarch did not immediately provide a reason for the move; however, there have recently been reports accusing the parliament of handling legislation ineptly, and even of being corrupt.
ref: Kerajaan monarki itu tidak segera memberikan alasan untuk pilihanraya itu; bagaimanapun, baru-baru ini terdapat laporan menuduh Parlimen mengendalikan undang-undang secara tidak cekap, dan juga mengamalkan rasuah.

src: The king's decree ordered the civil service to host new elections to replace the 110-member parliament, although an exact date for the polls hasn't yet been named.
ref: Raja memerintahkan perkhidmatan awam untuk mengendalikan pilihan raya baru untuk menggantikan 110 anggota parlimen, walaupun tarikh yang tepat untuk pilihan raya masih belum dinamakan.

src: Critics of the parliament have said that its members didn't properly address issues such as unemployment and poverty.
ref: Pengkritik parlimen telah berkata, pasukan itu tidak betul-betul menangani isu-isu seperti pengangguran dan kemiskinan.

src: The opposition, however, asserted that the house had been disbanded so that the government could use emergency laws to pass legislation.
ref: Pembangkang, bagaimanapun, menegaskan bahawa parlimen telah dibubarkan supaya kerajaan boleh menggunakan undang-undang darurat untuk meluluskan undang-undang.

src: King Abdullah has now disbanded the parliament two times since he came to power in 1999.
ref: Raja Abdullah kini telah membubarkan parlimen sebanyak dua kali sejak beliau berkuasa pada tahun 1999.

src: A classified European Union report for 2009 says Israel is actively pursuing the annexation of east Jerusalem.
ref: Satu laporan sulit Kesatuan Eropah bagi tahun 2009 mengatakan bahawa Israel sedang giat menjalankan pengilhakan timur Jerusalem.

src: The report accuses Israel of implementing an intricate policy including expanding Jewish settlements and demolishing Palestinian homes.
ref: Laporan itu menuduh Israel melaksanakan dasar yang rumit termasuk memperluaskan penempatan Yahudi dan merobohkan rumah-rumah orang Palestin.

src: It says policies "are undermining prospects for a Palestinian capital in east Jerusalem and incrementally render a sustainable two-state solution unfeasible"; this is described as, "an integral part of a broader Israeli strategy."
ref: Ia mengatakan dasar "melemahkan prospek ibu bandar Palestin di timur Jerusalem dan secara berperingkat menyebabkan penyelesaian dua negeri itu tidak dapat dicapai"; ini digambarkan sebagai, "merupakan sebahagian penting daripada strategi Israel yang lebih luas".

src: Israeli Foreign ministry spokesperson, Yigal Palmor, told AFP that the report was "dishonest", "reflects the Palestinian propaganda" and "is based exclusively on Palestinian versions and figures."
ref: Jurucakap kementerian luar Israel, Yigal Palmor, memberitahu AFP bahawa laporan itu "tidak jujur," "mencerminkan propaganda Palestin" dan "adalah semata-matanya berdasarkan versi dan butiran Palestin".

src: This comes as EU foreign ministers prepare a statement on the Middle East.
ref: Nampaknya menteri-menteri luar EU menyediakan suatu kenyataan di Timur Tengah.
