src: To allow for US initiatives, EU foreign ministers have not commented on the stalemate between Israel and the Palestinians over past months; but, diplomatic sources say there are “sensitivities" over a Swedish proposal to divide Jerusalem in any peace deal.
ref: Bagi membolehkan inisiatif AS, Menteri-Menteri Luar EU tidak mengulas mengenai kebuntuan antara Israel dan Palestin sejak beberapa bulan yang lalu; tetapi, sumber-sumber diplomatik berkata bahawa terdapat "kesensitifan" atas cadangan Sweden untuk membahagikan Jerusalem dalam mana-mana perjanjian damai.

src: Citing official Israeli statistics from the Ministry of Interior executive director of Israel’s HaMoked (Center for the Defence of the Individual) said Wednesday that, "Israel has stripped Palestinians of Jerusalem residency status last year at a faster rate than at any time in the history of the state".
ref: Memetik statistik rasmi Israel dari Pengarah Eksekutif Kementerian Dalam Negeri HaMoked Israel (Pusat Pertahanan bagi Individu) berkata pada hari Rabu bahawa, "Israel telah melucutkan status penduduk Jerusalem orang Palestin pada tahun lepas pada kadar yang lebih cepat berbanding bila-bila masa dalam sejarah negeri itu".

src: 4,577 residents of East Jerusalem have had their residence revoked in 2008, this is more than half the total revoked in the past 40 years.
ref: 4577 penduduk Timur Jerusalem dimansuhkan taraf pendudukan mereka pada tahun 2008, ini adalah lebih daripada separuh jumlah yang dimansuhkan dalam 40 tahun yang lalu.

src: The Jerusalem municipality places severe restrictions on issuing building permits for Palestinian houses in east Jerusalem, since 2000 over 600 Palestinian-owned structures have been demolished and Palestinians receive fewer than 200 of the 1,500 building permits needed per year.
ref: Majlis perbandaran Jerusalem meletakkan sekatan yang teruk atas pengeluaran permit bangunan untuk rumah-rumah orang Palestin di timur Jerusalem, sejak tahun 2000 lebih daripada 600 struktur milik orang Palestin telah dirobohkan dan orang Palestin menerima kurang daripada 200 daripada 1,500 permit bangunan yang diperlukan setiap tahun.

src: The 14-page annual report dated November 23 was drafted by European envoys and consuls in Jerusalem and Ramallah and presented to Brussels EU institutions a few days ago.
ref: Laporan tahunan yang bermuka 14 surat bertarikh 23 November telah digubal oleh utusan khas Eropah dan konsul di Jerusalem dan Ramallah dan dibentangkan kepada institusi Brussels EU beberapa hari yang lalu.

src: This is the first time the annual report has been made public.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama laporan tahunan itu telah didedahkan kepada orang awam.

src: Haaretz says, in the past, Israel has pressed the EU not to publish fearing it would undermine the European public's view of Israel.
ref: Haaretz berkata, pada masa lalu, Israel telah menekan EU supaya tidak menerbitkannya kerana takut ia akan menjejaskan pandangan orang Eropah terhadap Israel.

src: The report was leaked to Israel's Haaretz daily newspaper and obtained by AFP yesterday.
ref: Laporan itu telah dibocorkan kepada akhbar harian Haaretz di Israel dan diperoleh oleh AFP semalam.

src: The EU report claims the Israeli government and Jerusalem municipality discriminate against Arab residents with regard to building permits, health services, education, sanitation and more.
ref: Laporan EU mendakwa kerajaan Israel dan majlis perbandaran Jerusalem berdiskriminasi terhadap penduduk Arab mengenai perkara permit bangunan, perkhidmatan kesihatan, pendidikan, kebersihan dan banyak lagi.

src: Allegations of assisting private right-wing Jewish organisations, such as Ateret Cohanim and Elad, to alter the city's demographics are included.
ref: Tuduhan membantu pertubuhan-pertubuhan swasta Yahudi bersayap kanan seperti Ateret Cohanim dan Elad, untuk mengubah ciri-ciri demografi di bandar ini disertakan.

src: The report advises sanctions against people and groups involved in "settlement activity", and taking other measures to protest Israeli policy and to stop the harming of the Arab population, including an "EU presence at Israeli court cases on house demolitions or evictions of Palestinian families when there is a risk of demolition or eviction of Palestinian families", and "information sharing on violent settlers in East Jerusalem to assess whether to grant entry to the EU."
ref: Laporan itu menasihatkan sekatan terhadap orang dan kumpulan yang terlibat dalam "aktiviti pendudukan," dan mengambil langkah-langkah lain untuk membantah dasar Israel dan untuk menghentikan penindasan terhadap penduduk Arab, termasuk "Kehadiran EU di kes-kes mahkamah Israel ke atas perobohan rumah atau pengusiran keluarga Palestin apabila terdapat risiko perobohan atau pengusiran keluarga Palestin," dan "perkongsian maklumat antara peneroka ganas di Timur Jerusalem untuk menilai sama ada untuk memberikan kelulusan kepada EU".

src: The report also recommends implementing measures to strengthen the Palestinian National Authority's presence in the city.
ref: Laporan itu juga mencadangkan pelaksanaan langkah-langkah untuk mengukuhkan kehadiran Pihak Berkuasa Kebangsaan Palestin di bandar itu.

src: Archaeological excavations in Jerusalem near the Temple Mount are mentioned, suggesting "archaeology in this case has become an ideologically motivated tool of national and religious struggle carried out in a manner that modifies the identity and character of the city and threatens to undermine its stability."
ref: Penggalian arkeologi di Jerusalem berhampiran Gunung Temple disebut, mencadangkan "arkeologi dalam kes ini telah menjadi satu alat yang bermotivasi ideologi perjuangan agama dan negara dijalankan dengan cara yang mengubah identiti dan ciri-ciri bandar dan mengancam untuk menjejaskan kestabilan".

src: An explosion yesterday in a Russian nightclub killed at least 94 people and injured a further 139, according to police reports.
ref: Satu letupan semalam di sebuah kelab malam Rusia membunuh sekurang-kurangnya 94 orang dan mencederakan 139 lagi, menurut laporan polis.

src: The incident happened in the "Lame Horse" bar in the city of Perm near the Ural mountains.
ref: Kejadian itu berlaku di dalam bar "Lame Horse" di bandar Perm berhampiran pergunungan Ural.

src: According to the regional security minister, Igor Orlov, the club's plastic ceiling caught fire, ignited by firecrackers.
ref: Menurut menteri keselamatan wilayah, Igor Orlov, siling plastik kelab itu terbakar, dinyalakan oleh mercun.

src: Security officials, however, commented that the blast could not have been terrorism.
ref: Pegawai keselamatan, bagaimanapun, mengulas bahawa letupan itu bukan merupakan aktiviti pengganas.

src: "We are not talking about a terrorist attack, we are talking about a failure to observe fire regulations," said an official for an investigative body, as quoted by the ITAR-TASS news agency.
ref: "Kami bukan bercakap tentang serangan pengganas, kami bercakap mengenai kegagalan untuk mematuhi peraturan-peraturan kebakaran," kata seorang pegawai untuk sebuah badan penyiasatan, seperti yang dipetik oleh agensi berita ITAR-Tass.

src: A reporter for the Al Jazeera news agency remarked: "Officials have been cited as saying that the incident may have been caused by pyrotechnics that caused an explosion leading to a significant loss of life."
ref: Seorang wartawan untuk agensi berita Al Jazeera berkata: "Pegawai telah dipetik seperti berkata bahawa kejadian itu mungkin disebabkan oleh bunga api yang menyebabkan letupan yang menyebabkan kehilangan nyawa yang besar".

src: Mongolian President Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj has announced a moratorium on executions, and will begin to seek their abolition.
ref: President Mongolia Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj telah mengumumkan penangguhan terhadap hukuman mati, dan akan memulakan untuk mendapatkan pemansuhannya.

src: On January 14, 2010, in a speech to parliament, Elbegdorj announced that he would pardon all persons sentenced to death, stating that most countries in the world had abolished the death penalty, and Mongolia should follow suit.
ref: Pada 14 Janurai 2010, dalam ucapan kepada parlimen, Elbegdorj mengumumkan yang dia akan memaafkan semua yang dihukum mati, menyatakan yang kebanyakan negara dalam dunia telah menghapuskan hukuman mati tersebut, dan Mongolia patut mengikutinya.

src: He also suggested that the death penalty be replaced with a 30 year prison sentence.
ref: Dia juga mencadangkan yang hukuman mati digantikan dengan hukuman penjara 30 tahun.

src: The decision was controversial: when Elbegdorj finished his speech, representatives of the Mongolian People's Revolutionary Party refused to join in the applause, which is customary after a presidential address to parliament.
ref: Keputusan tersebut adalah kontroversi: apabila Elbegdorj menamatkan ucapannya, perwakilan dari Parti Revolusi Rakyat Mongolia menolak untuk bersama bertepuk tangan, yang merupakan adat selepas presiden berucap kepada parlimen.

src: Human rights groups welcomed the move, with Amnesty International expressing hope that Mongolia will vote in favour of an upcoming United Nations resolution calling for an end to Capital punishment.
ref: Kumpulan hak manusia mengalukan tindakan itu, dengan Amnesty Antarabangsa menyatakan harapan yang Mongolia akan mengundi memihak kepada resolusi akan datang Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu memanggil untuk pengakhiran kepada hukuman mati.

src: It also urged other nations in the region to abolish the death penalty.
ref: Ia juga menggesa negara lain dalam kawasan itu untuk menghapuskan hukuman mati.

src: Many members of Mongolia's opposition-led parliament favour harsh punishments for criminals, and Elbegdorj must gain approval from parliament before the death penalty can be abolished.
ref: Ramai ahli parlimen Mongolia yang diketuai pembangkang menyokong hukuman keras terhadap penjenayah, dan Elbegdorj mesti mendapatkan kebenaran dari parlimen sebelum hukuman mati boleh dimansuhkan.

src: If Elbegdorj fails to be re-elected, the new president could end the moratorium, and executions could resume.
ref: Jika Elbegdorj gagal untuk dipilih semula, presiden baru boleh menamatkan penangguhan tersebut, dan perlaksanaan hukuman mati mungkin diteruskan.

src: Clare Short, the United Kingdom's then-Secretary of State for International Development, appeared before the Iraq Inquiry yesterday, and told the panel that the Cabinet was "misled" about the Iraq War's legality prior to the 2003 invasion.
ref: Clare Shot, yang merupakan Setiausaha Negara untuk Pembangunan Antarabangsa United Kingdom ketika itu, tampil dihadapan siasatan ke atas Iraq semalam, dan memberitahu panel mengenai Kabinet telah "terpedaya" mengenai kesahihan Perang Iraq sebelum invansion 2003.

src: The three-hour session was held in the Queen Elizabeth II Conference Centre in London's City of Westminster.
ref: Persidangan tiga jam itu diadakan di Queen Elizabeth II Conference Centre di Bandar London di Westminster.

src: Short, an outspoken critic of the war, retired from the cabinet to become an independent MP two months before the invasion.
ref: Short, yang lantang menyuarakan kritikan ke atas perang tersebut, telah berhenti dari menyertai kabinet dan menjadi MP bebas dua bulan sebelum serangan.

src: She claimed to have been "conned" into staying on despite her doubts about the war and told the inquiry that the Cabinet, of which she was a part, was not a "decision-making body", and that Parliament was simply a "rubber stamp".
ref: Beliau menyatakan bahawa dia telah "tertipu" untuk kekal disitu walaupun dia ragu terhadap perang itu, dia telah memberitahu sidang penyiasatan itu yang kabinet, dimana dia adalah sebahagian daripadanya, bukanlah "badan yang membuat keputusan", dan Parlimen hanyalah "rubber stamp."

src: As reported the United Nations, January 12 Haiti earthquake left exactly 222,570 deaths, 1,300,000 refugees in harbours, 766,000 displaced people, 310,000 injured and 869 disappeared.
ref: Seperti yang dilaporkan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, gempa bumi Haiti 12 Januari mengakibatkan angka sebenar 222,570 kematian, 1,300,000 pelarian di pelabuhan, 766,000 pelarian, 310,000 cedera dan 869 hilang.

src: The report also mentioned economic loss suffered by the country, that reached 7.754 billion dollars, leaving 71 percent of the Haitians in extreme poverty.
ref: Laporan juga turut mengatakan kerugian ekonomi dialami negara, yang mencecah 7.754 billion dolar, menyebabkan 71 percent penduduk Haiti dalam kemiskinan yang teruk.

src: The document was diffused in Santo Domingo de Guzmán, between the preparatives of a conference about the reconstruction of Haiti, that will take place next March 11 in New York.
ref: Dokumen itu telah tersebar di Santo Domingo de Guzman, antara persediaan persidangan ialah mengenai pembinaan semula Haiti, yang akan diadakan pada 11 Mac akan datang di New York.

src: Haitian Government representatives have asked to donors an additional help of 350 million dollars for the Haiti reconstruction, the most poor country in the Americas.
ref: Wakil Kerajaan Haiti telah meminta pendermaan tambahan sebanyak 350 juta dolar untuk pembangunan semula Haiti, antara negara termiskin di Amerika.

src: The damages report was prepared by the Haitian Government with the support of the Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean, the Interamerican Development Bank, the World Bank, the United Nations and the European Union.
ref: Laporan kerosakan telah disediakan oleh Kerajaan Haiti dengan sokongan Suruhanjaya Ekonomi bagi Amerika Latin dan Carribbean, Bank Pembangunan Antara Amerika, Bank Dunia, Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dan Kesatuan Eropah.

src: On CNN's Anderson Cooper-hosted 360 Degrees program, former British Prime Minister John Major said, "I think it's now patently apparent that there are people in the United Kingdom (who) are alienated from the Anglo-Saxon way of life and are prepared to indulge in these dreadful acts of criminality."
ref: Dalam program CNN yang dihos oleh Anderson Cooper yang bernama 360 darjah, kata bekas Perdana Menteri Britain, John Major, "Saya rasa sekarang secara terang-terang bahawa ada orang di United Kingdom (yang) dialienasi dari cara hidup Anglo-Saxon dan bersedia untuk menurutkan hati dengan perbuatan jenayah yang dahsyat".

src: Ekow Eshun of the Newstatesman writes that Major's comments belong on the dustheap of history along with cricket.
ref: Ekow Eshun daripada Newstatesman menulis bahawa komen Major tergolong di kumpulan sejarah yang dilupai bersama-sama dengan kriket.

src: The former British leader has also been recently quoted as saying in reference to the Brazilian citizen killed by police; "I rather prefer the expression shoot to protect rather than shoot to kill — I think that is a more accurate description of what happened."
ref: Bekas pemimpin British juga telah baru-baru ini dipetik berkata merujuk kepada warga Brazil yang dibunuh oleh polis; "Saya lebih suka tembakan untuk melindungi daripada tembakan untuk membunuh - Saya berfikir bahawa adalah keterangan yang lebih tepat mengenai apa yang berlaku".

src: In addition Sir John has come out as an advocate of deportation for people who express distaste for the "Anglo-Saxon way of life".
ref: Di samping itu, Sir John telah muncul sebagai peguambela pengusiran orang yang melahirkan rasa benci terhadap "cara kehidupan Anglo-Saxon".

src: The Saudi ambassador to London, Prince Turki al-Faisal, is voicing the same position as Major regarding the need for deporting some of the Muslim clerics.
ref: Duta Arab ke London, Putera Turki al-Faisal, yang menyuarakan kedudukan yang sama seperti Major mengenai keperluan untuk mengusir sebahagian daripada ulama Islam.

src: In the 1960s there was born a somewhat similar "America, love it or leave it" viewpoint among American conservatives, a viewpoint that is still the subject of debate today.
ref: Pada tahun 1960 terlahir sudut pandangan yang agak serupa "Amerika, suka atau meninggalkannya" di kalangan golongan konservatif Amerika, sudut pandangan yang masih diperdebatkan hari ini.

src: Illum reported a profit and 11% gain in sales the first three months of 2005.
ref: Lllum melaporkan keuntungan dan 11% gandaan dalam jualan pada tiga bulan pertama pada 2005.

src: Icelandic companies have been investing heavily in Denmark for the last few years.
ref: Syarikat-syarikat Icelandik telah membuat pelaburan yang besar di Denmark beberapa tahun yang lepas.

src: Recently the Fons Investment ehf.
ref: Kebelakangan ini, Fons Investment ehf.

src: bought the Danish airlines Sterling Air and Mearsk Air.
ref: membeli syarikat penerbangan Danish, Streling Air dan Mearsk Air.

src: Eimskip, a shipping company in Iceland, recently bought the shipping division of Mearsk.
ref: Eimskip, syarikat penghantaran di Iceland, baru-baru ini membeli bahagian penghantaran Mearsk.

src: I-Holdings have been investing heavily in the Denish retailer market.
ref: I-Holding telah banyak melabur kepada pasaran Denish.

src: Baugur Group, as well as FL Group, have been investing in the UK market.
ref: Kumpulan Baugur, dan juga Kumpulan FL, telah membuat pelaburan besar dalam pasaran UK.

src: FL Group has bought 11% in easyJet.com and has shown an interest in buying more.
ref: Kumpulan FL telah membeli 11% saham dalam easyJet.com dan telah menunjukkan minat untuk membeli lebih banyak.

src: Baugur Group has been investing in the retailer market and has bought among other things Iceland supermarket chain as well as Hamleys, a well known toy store.
ref: Kumpulan Baugur telah melabur secara besar dalam pasaran penjual dan telah membeli beberapa rantaian pasaraya Iceland yang lain dan juga Hamleys, juga gedung permainan terkenal.

src: Doctors from the Rudolfinerhaus clinic in Vienna say "there is no doubt" Ukrainian opposition leader Victor Yushchenko was poisoned with Dioxin.
ref: Doktor-doktor dari klink Rudolfinerhaus di Vienna mengatakan bahawa "tiada keraguan" ketua pembangkang Ukraine Victor Yushchenko diracun iDioksin.

src: Yushchenko's body had about 1,000 times more than the normal concentration of the toxin.
ref: Badan Yushchenko mempunyai lebih 1,000 ganda kepekatan toxin itu berbanding dengan kepekatan biasa.

src: It is unknown if there were any other poisons in his system.
ref: Masih belum diketahui sama ada racun lain wujud dalam sistemnya.

src: Although it has not yet been proven that the poisoning was deliberate, doctors suspect it was.
ref: Walaupun belum dibuktikan, doktor-doktor mengesyaki keracunan Yushchenko adalah sengaja.

src: "We suspect a cause triggered by a third party," said Michael Zimpfer, head doctor at the Rudolfinerhaus clinic.
ref: "Kami mengesyaki faktor yang dicetuskan oleh pihak ketiga," kata Michael Zimpfer, ketua doktor klinik Rudolfinerhaus.

src: He suggested the poison may have been administered orally, through food or drink.
ref: Beliau mengatakan bahawa racun tersebut mungkin diberikan secara oral, melalui makanan atau minuman.

src: Today's announcements are a follow-up of an earlier press conference, where Dr. Korpan that there were three hypotheses under consideration, one of them involving dioxin.
ref: Pengumuman pada hari ini adalah susulan daripada sidang akhbar sebelum ini, pada masa itu Dr. Korpan membentangkan tiga hipotesis yang dipertimbangkan, dan salah satu melibatkan dioksin.

src: He did not reveal what the other two hypotheses were.
ref: Beliau tidak mendedahkan two hipotesis yang lain.

src: Dr. Michael Zimpfer, director of the Rudolfinerhaus clinic emphasized that time there was no proof yet to specify the substance causing the illness.
ref: Doctor Michael Zimpfer, pengarah klinik Rudolfinerhaus menekankan bahawa pada masa itu tiada bukti yang menentukan bahan yang menyebabkan penyakit itu.

src: Yushchenko left Kiev on Friday (2004-10-12) for further examination in Vienna.
ref: Yushchenko meninggalkan Kiev pada hari Jumaat (2004-10-12) untuk pemeriksaan lanjut di Vienna.

src: When Yushchenko fell ill on October 6th, Ukrainian doctors had initially diagnosed food poisoning, leading to speculation that he had been poisoned deliberately.
ref: Apabila Yushchenko jatuh sakit pada 6 Oktober, doktor-doktor dari Ukraine pada mulanya mendiagnosis penyakitnya sebagai keracunan makanan, memberi tekaan bahawa beliau telah diracun secara sengaja.

src: The illness has disfigured Yushchenko's body and face which doctors say could take up to two years to heal.
ref: Penyakit itu mencacatkan badan Yushchenko serta muka, dan doktor-doktor mengatakan penyakit itu akan mengambil masa dua tahun untuk sembuh.

src: He fell seriously ill on the September 6th, during his presidential campaign.
ref: Beliau sakit tenat pada 6 September semasa kempen pemilihan presiden beliau.

src: Yushchenko was taken to the Rudolfinerhaus clinic of Vienna, where he stayed for four days under Dr. Korpan's care.
ref: Yushchenko dihantar ke klinik Rudolfinerhaus di Vienna, di sana beliau tinggal selama empat hari di bawah jagaan Dr. Korpan.

src: He was diagnosed with "acute pancreatitis, accompanied by interstitial edematous changes."
ref: Beliau didiagnosis menghidapi penyakit "pancreatitis akut, serta perubahan edematous interstisial".

src: These symptoms were said to be due to "a serious viral infection and chemical substances which are not normally found in food products" as his campaign officials put it.
ref: Gejala-gejala penyakit tersebut dikatakan akibat "jangkitan virus yang serius dan bahan-bahan kimia yang tidak biasa didapati dalam produk makanan" seperti dijelaskan oleh pengawai-pengawai kempennya.

src: In laymans terms, he developed an infection in the pancreas and got a bad skin condition that disfigured his face with cysts and lesions.
ref: Dalam istilah biasa, beliau mendapat jangkitan dalam pankreas dan keadaan kulit yang buruk yang mencacatkan muka beliau dengan sista dan luka.

src: The skin condition has similarities with the chloracne associated with dioxin posioning according to a British toxicologist John Henry.
ref: Keadaan kulitnya mempunyai persamaan dengan klorakne yang berkaitan dengan keracunan dioksin, menurut pakar toksikologi John Henry dari Britain.

src: A motorist was injured during a collision that resulted in a rollover in the city of Naperville, Illinois, United States.
ref: Seorang penunggang motosikal cedera semasa perlanggaran yang mengakibatkan bergolek di jalan raya di bandar Naperville, Illinois, Amerika Syarikat.

src: The accident occurred at about 8:15 am (13:15 UTC) on the interchange of Illinois Route 59 and Interstate 88.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku pada kira-kira jam 8:15 pgi (13:15 UTC) di persimpangan Laluan Illinois 59 dan Interstate 88.

src: Naperville police reported that Pavitra Durgam, a 26-year-old from Chicago, was traveling southbound on Route 59 and tried to turn left onto the ramp to Interstate 88.
ref: Polis Naperville melaporkan bahawa Pavita Durgam, 26 tahun dari Chicago, telah melalui arah selatan pada Laluan 59 dan cuba untuk belok ke kiri untuk menukar ke arah Interstate 88.

src: In doing so, she cut in front of a car heading north on Route 59.
ref: Dalam berbuat demikian, beliau telah memotong kereta yang sedang ke arah utara pada laluan 59.

src: The other, currently unidentified driver swerved to avoid her, hit a curb, and collided with her car anyway.
ref: Yang lain, pemandu yang belum dikenal pasti terbabas ketika cuba mengelak dari dia, melanggar susur laluan, dan berlanggar dengan keretanya.

src: Northbound traffic on Route 59 north of Diehl Road, including the entrance into eastbound Interstate 88, was blocked as crews cleaned up the area of the collision.
ref: Trafik arah selatan pada Laluan 59 utara Jalan Diehl, termasuk pintu masuk ke arah timur Insterstate 88, telah terhalang dan kru sedang membersihkan kawasan kejadian itu.

src: The unidentified motorist complained of back pain and was thus sent to nearby Edward Hospital.
ref: Penunggang motor yang tidak dikenal pasti mengadu tentang sakit belakang dan kemudian dihantar ke Hospital Edward berdekatan.

src: Durgam received a citation for failing to yield to oncoming traffic as she turned.
ref: Durgam menerima saman kerana gagal untuk memberi laluan kepada kenderaan dari arah hadapan semasa dia membelok.

src: What is believed to be the world's oldest leather shoe, over 5,500 year old, has been found in a cave in Armenia by a team of archaeologists.
ref: Apa yang dipercayai merupakan kasut kulit tertua didunia, lebih dari 5,500 tahun, telah ditemui dalam sebuah gua di Armenia oleh sekumpulan arkeologi.

src: The Armenian shoe is in a perfectly preserved condition and is a few hundred years older than the one found on Ötzi the Iceman, making it the oldest piece of leather footwear in the world, and the oldest footwear yet found in Europe.
ref: Kasut Armenia itu dalam keadaan terpelihara sempurna dan adalah beberatus tahun lebih tua dari yang ditemui diatas Orang Ais Otzi, menjadikannya kasut kulit tertua didunia, dan kasut tertua pernah ditemui di Eropah.

src: The leather shoe was found in a cave dubbed Areni-1, near the village of Areni in the Vayots Dzor province of Armenia, on the Iranian and Turkish borders.
ref: Kasut kulit tersebut ditemui didalam gua yang digelar Areni-1, berhampiran kampung Areni di daerah Vayots Dzor Armenia, disempadan Iran dan Turki.

src: "I was amazed to find that even the shoe-laces were preserved," recalled Diana Zardaryan, the Armenian PhD student who made the discovery.
ref: "Saya kagum mendapati tali kasut juga turut terpelihara," diingati semula Diana Zardayan, pelajar PhD Armenia yang membuat penemuan tersebut.

src: According to researchers, the shoe, made of cow-hide, consists of only one leather piece and was probably customised to the wearer's foot.
ref: Menurut pengkaji, kasut tersebut, dibuat dari kulit lembu, mengandungi hanya sekeping kulit dan kemungkinan disesuaikan dengan kaki pemakai.

src: It was relatively small, measuring the corresponding to European size 37 or US size 7 women, however, it could have been worn by a man.
ref: Ia agak kecil, berukuran sepadan saiz 37 Eropah atau saiz 7 US perempuan, walaubagaimanapun, ia mungkin telah dipakai oleh lelaki.

src: It was kept in excellent condition by a thick layer of sheep excrement, which acted as a seal, helping it survive the millennia.
ref: Ia telah disimpan dalam keadaan baik dengan lapisan tebal najis biri-biri, yang bertindak sebagai pelindung, membantunya melepasi ribuan tahun.

src: The shoe contained grass, although the archaeologists were uncertain as to whether this was to used to maintain the shape of the shoe and/or prepare it for storage.
ref: Kasut itu mengandungi rumput, tetapi arkeologi tidak pasti samada ia digunakan untuk mengekalkan bentuk kasut tersebut dan/atau menyediakannya untuk simpanan.

src: "We thought initially that the shoe and other objects were about 600-700 years old because they were in such good condition," said co-author Dr. Ron Pinhasi from the University College Cork in Ireland.
ref: "Kami mulanya menyangka yang kasut tersebut dan objek-objek lain berusia lebih kurang 600-700 tahun kerana mereka berada dalam keadaan yang bagus," kata penulis bersama Dr. Ron Pinhasi dari Universiti Kolej Cork di Ireland.

src: The shoe and the cave will continue to be researched.
ref: Kasut dan gua tersebut akan terus dikaji.

src: "We do not know yet what the shoe or other objects were doing in the cave or what the purpose of the cave was," said Pinhasi, "We know that there are children's graves at the back of the cave but so little is known about this period that we cannot say with any certainty why all these different objects were found together".
ref: "Kami masih belum tahu apa yang kasut atau objek-objek lain lakukan didalam gua tersebut atau apakah tujuan gua tersebut," kata Pinhasi, "Kami tahu yang terdapat kubur kanak-kanak dibelakang gua tersebut tetapi amat sedikit yang diketahui mengenai zaman tersebut yang kami tidak dapat berkata apa-apa kepastian mengapa semua objek-objek berlainan tersebut dijumpai bersama".

src: Currently, the oldest known footwear are sandals made from sagebrush bark, found in Fort Rock Cave, Oregon in the United States.
ref: Buat masa ini, kasut tertua diketahui adalah sandal-sandal diperbuat dari kulit kayu sagebursh, dijumpai di Gua Fort Rock, Oregon di Amerika Syarikat.

src: These shoes were discovered in 1938, and have been dated to about 10,000 years before present.
ref: Kasut-kasut tersebut ditemui pada 1938, dan bertarikh lebih kurang 10,000 tahun sebelum kini.

src: Discoveries within the cave move early bronze-age cultural activity in Armenia back by about 800 years.
ref: Penemuan didalam gua menggerakkan permulaan aktiviti kebudayaan zaman gangsa di Armenia kebelakang lebih kurang 800 tahun.

src: Additional discoveries yielded an extensive array of Copper Age artifacts dating to between 6,200 and 5,900 years ago.
ref: Tambahan penemuan menghasilkan kebelbagaian hebat artifak Zaman Tembaga bertarikh antara 6,200 dan 5,900 tahun lalu.

src: In a speech in Wisconsin, US President Barack Obama announced a USD50 billion plan to restore 150,000 miles of roads, lay 4,000 miles of railroad tracks and rebuild 150 miles of airport runways within six years.
ref: Dalam satu ucapan di Wisconsin, Presiden Amerika Syarikat Barack Obama mengumumkan satu rancangan 50 bilion dolar AS untuk memperbaiki 150,000 batu jalan raya, membina 4,000 batu landasan kereta api dan membina semula 150 batu landasan lapangan terbang dalam tempoh enam tahun.

src: The speech was given at an annual Labor Day festival in Milwaukee to union workers on Monday afternoon.
ref: Ucapan itu diberi semasa keraian tahunan Hari Buruh di Milwaukee kepada pekerja-pekerja kesatuan pada petang Isnin.

src: "All of this will not only create jobs immediately, it's also going to make our economy hum over the long haul," Obama said during the speech.
ref: "Semua ini bukan sahaja akan mewujudkan peluang pekerjaan dengan serta-merta, ia juga akan menjana kestabilan ekonomi kita dalam jangka panjang," kata Obama dalam ucapan.

src: The president also said that "we are going to rebuild 150,000 miles of our roads — that's enough to circle the world six times... We're going to lay and maintain 4,000 miles of our railways — enough to stretch coast-to-coast" and that he was "going to keep fighting, every single day, every single hour, every single minute to turn this economy around".
ref: Presiden itu juga berkata bahawa "kita akan membina semula 150,000 batu jalan raya kita - itu sudah cukup untuk mengelilingi dunia enam kali... Kami akan memulakan dan menyenggara 4,000 batu landasan kereta api kami - cukup untuk dari hilir pantai-ke-pantai" dan bahawa beliau "akan terus berjuang, setiap hari, setiap jam, setiap minit untuk menghidupkan ekonomi ini semula".

src: Most of the new railways that Obama talked about will be high-speed rail lines, and the president also said that his administration would "restore 150 miles of runways and advance a next-generation air traffic control system to reduce travel time and delays for American travelers — something I think folks across the political spectrum could agree on."
ref: Kebanyakan kereta api baru yang Obama katakan akan menjadi landasan kereta api berkelajuan tinggi, dan presiden itu juga berkata pentadbiran beliau akan "membaikpulihkan 150 batu landasan dan memajukan sistem kawalan trafik udara generasi akan datang untuk mengurangkan masa perjalanan dan kelewatan untuk pelancong Amerika - sesuatu yang saya rasa semua orang di spektrum politik akan bersetuju".

src: In the Obama Administration's plan, a new infrastructure bank will be created.
ref: Dalam pelan Pentadbiran Obama, sebuah bank infrastruktur baru akan diwujudkan.

src: Obama stressed that the new bill will not add to the federal budget deficit, with Obama saying that "this is a plan that will be fully paid for.
ref: Obama menegaskan bahawa rang undang-undang baru tidak akan menambahkan defisit bajet persekutuan, dengan Obama berkata bahawa "ini merupakan pelan yang akan dibiayai sepenuhnya.

src: It will not add to the deficit over time — we're going to work with Congress to see to that."
ref: Ia tidak akan menambahkan defisit dari masa ke masa - kita akan bekerjasama dengan Kongres untuk memantaunya".

src: An Obama administration official also said that the plan will be funded by closing tax loopholes for oil and gas corporations.
ref: Seorang pegawai pentadbiran Obama juga berkata rancangan itu akan dibiayai dengan menutup kelemahan sistem cukai bagi syarikat-syarikat minyak dan gas.

src: Though Obama said that "these are projects and efforts that have bipartisan support that we know could possibly get support in the Congress and the Senate", Republicans expressed reservations about the new plan, with Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell calling it "a last-minute, cobbled-together stimulus bill".
ref: Walaupun Obama berkata bahawa "ini adalah projek-projek dan usaha yang mempunyai sokongan kedua-dua parti yang kita tahu mungkin boleh mendapatkan sokongan dalam Kongres dan Senat", Parti Republik menyatakan keraguan mengenai pelan baru, dengan Senat Pemimpin Minoriti Mitch McConnell menamakannya "satu rang undang-undang rangsangan pada saat akhir, yang dibuat tegesa-gesa".

src: In a last minute change of position, the National Transitional Government of Liberia (NTGL) has reversed its decision not to allow the Liberian National football team, The Lone Star, to attend Sunday's World Cup qualifier against Togo.
ref: Di dalam satu tukaran posisi saat akhir, Kerajaan Transisi Kebangsaan Liberia (NTGL) telah menarik balik keputusannya untuk membenarkan kumpulan bola sepak Nasional Liberia, The Lone Star, untuk menghadiri perlawanan kelayakan Piala Dunia menentang Togo pada hari Ahad.

src: The NTGL had announced on Wednesday that the squad would not be able to travel to Lome, Togo because of a lack of funds to pay for the team's travel.
ref: NTGL telah mengumumkan pada Rabu bahawa skuad itu tidak akan dapat pergi ke Lome, Togo kerana kekurangan biaya untuk membayar perjalanan kumpulan itu.

src: In a statement explaining its decision not to fund the team's travel, the NTGL highlighted more pressing financial obligations such as the country's upcoming national elections and the demobilization of the nation's defunct armed forces.
ref: Di dalam satu kenyataan bagi menjelaskan keputusan untuk tidak membiayai perjalanan kumpulan itu, NTGL menekankan tanggungjawab kewangan yang lebih penting seperti pilihanraya negara yang akan datang dan penamatan khidmat tentera bersenjata negara yang tidak wujud lagi.

src: "As a result of the huge expenditure, the National Transitional Government of Liberia has decided it is unfeasible to underwrite the Lone Star's travel to Togo," said the Minister of Information, Dr. C. William Allen.
ref: "Kesan dari perbelanjaan besar itu, Kerajaan Transisi Kebangsaan Liberia telah mengambil keputusan bahawa mereka tidak mampu untuk menaja perjalanan Lone Star ke Togo," kata Menteri Maklumat, Dr. C. William Allen.

src: The decision to allow The Lone Star to travel to Lome was made after the price of the team's travel decreased from US$31,000 to US$18,000.
ref: Keputusan untuk membenarkan The Lone Star untuk menuju ke Lome telah dibuat setelah jumlah perjalanan kumpulan itu dikurangkan dari US$31,000 ke US$18,000.

src: The team now plans to fly to Accra and take a bus to Lome versus fly the entire way.
ref: Kumpulan itu kini merancang untuk terbang ke Accra dan menaiki bas ke Lome berbanding terbang di seluruh perjalanan.

src: Had Liberia failed to take the field on Sunday, the country would have faced fines of US$31,895 and possible prohibition from participating in the 2010 World Cup to be held in South Africa.
ref: Jika Liberia gagal untuk muncul bertanding pada hari Ahad, negara itu akan menerima denda sebanyak US$31,895 dan kemungkinan larangan untuk menyertai Piala Dunia 2010 yang akan diadakan di Afrika Selatan.

src: Incidentally, the fines would have been slightly more than the team's original travel budget.
ref: Secara kebetulan, denda yang akan dikenakan itu berjumlah sedikit tinggi dari bajet perjalanan asal kumpulan itu.

src: A researcher at the University of Oxford has found a saucy poem attributed to John Milton, the 17th-century poet who wrote Paradise Lost and other religious verse.
ref: Seorang penyelidik di Universiti Oxford telah menjumpai sebuah puisi yang kurang sopan yang ditulis oleh John Milton, seorang penyajak di abad ke-17 yang telah menulis Syurga yang Hilang dan puisi keagamaan yang lain.

src: "An Extempore Upon a Faggot", discovered in an 18th-century anthology of poetry, is not thought by modern scholars to be by Milton, however, and may in fact have been written by one of his rivals in an attempt to disgrace him.
ref: "Kespontanan seorang Pondan" yang dijumpai di dalam antologi sajak di abad ke-18, tidak dianggap oleh cendekiawan moden sebagai sesuatu dari Milton, walau bagaimanapun, dan sebenarnya mungkin telah ditulis oleh salah seorang pesaingnya di dalam cubaan untuk mengaibkannya.

src: The poem was found by Dr Jennifer Batt, who said that it "is so out of tune with the rest of his work, that if the attribution is correct, it would prompt a major revision of our ideas about Milton."
ref: Puisi itu dijumpai oleh Dr Jennifer Batt, yang berkata ia "adalah tidak secocok dengan karyanya yang lain, tetapi jika anggapan itu adalah betul, ia akan menyebabkan penyemakan secara besar-besaran pendapat kita tentang Milton".

src: She discovered the rude verse in the Harding Collection of poetry anthologies held by the Bodleian Library, the main university library at Oxford.
ref: Dia telah menjumpai puisi yang tidak sopan itu di dalam antologi sajak Koleksi Harding yang disimpan oleh Perpustakaan Bodleian, sebuah perpustakaan universiti utama di Oxford.

src: "To see the name of John Milton, the great religious and political polemicist, attached to such a bawdy epigram, is extremely surprising to say the least", she added.
ref: "Untuk melihat nama John Milton, tokoh polemik politik dan keagamaan yang hebat, dikaitkan dengan epigram selucah itu, adalah paling tidak pun, amat memeranjatkan", katanya.

src: The book in question, the Oxford and Cambridge Miscellany from 1708 (over 30 years after Milton's death), was described by another Oxford academic, Dr Abigail Williams, as "a set of poems written by witty young men about town for witty young men about town".
ref: Buku yang dipersoalkan itu, Rampaian Oxford dan Cambridge dari tahun 1708 (lebih dari 30 tahun selepas kematian Milton), telah digambarkan oleh seorang ahli akademik Oxford yang lain, Dr Abigail Williams, sebagai "satu kumpulan sajak yang ditulis oleh pemuda lucu tentang bandar untuk pemuda muda lucu tentang bandar".

src: Milton wrote in blank verse rather than using rhyme and used differing poetic rhythms, whereas the handwritten poem uses a simple pattern of rhyming couplets as it contrasts the sexual behaviour of young women and more experienced women by comparing them to green wood and dry wood upon a fire.
ref: Milton telah menulis rangkap puisi kosong tanpa rima dan menggunakan irama puisi yang berbeza-beza, sementara puisi yang ditulis tangan menggunakan corak kuplet berima kerana ia mengkontraskan kelakuan seksual wanita muda dan wanita yang lebih berpengalaman dengan membandingkan mereka dengan kayu basah dan kayu kering di atas api.

src: Have you not in a Chimney seen A Faggot which is moist and green  How coyly it receives the Heat  And at both ends do's weep and sweat?
ref: Pernahkah kamu lihat di Serombong Seorang Pondan yang lembap dan basah Dengan malu-malu ia menerima Kehangatan Dan di kedua-dua hujungnya ia menangis dan berpeluh?

src: So fares it with a tender Maid  When first upon her Back she's laid But like dry Wood th' experienced Dame  Cracks and rejoices in the Flame Milton (1608–1674) wrote many influential religious poems, including Paradise Lost, which is described by the Oxford Dictionary of National Biography as "widely and rightly regarded as the supreme poetic achievement in the English language, fit to sit alongside the poems of Homer, Virgil, and Dante."
ref: Dan bandingkan ia dengan Anak Dara muda Ketika ia pertama kalinya dibaringkan di Belakangnya Tetapi Perempuan yang berpengalaman seperti Kayu kering Berderap dan bergembira di dalam Api Milton (1608-1674) telah menulis banyak puisi keagamaan yang berpengaruh, termasuk Syurga yang Hilang, yang digambarkan oleh Kamus Biografi Kebangsaan Oxford sebagai "secara luas dan tepat dianggap sebagai pencapaian puisi tertinggi di dalam bahasa Inggeris, sesuai untuk diletakkan di samping sajak-sajak Homer, Virgil, dan Dante".

src: It tells the story of the fall from grace of Adam and Eve in an epic theological poem.
ref: Ia menceritakan tentang Adam dan Hawa yang diturunkan dari syurga di dalam sajak teologi yang epik.

src: He followed it with Paradise Regained, depicting the temptations of Jesus in the wilderness.
ref: Dia meneruskannya dengan Syurga yang Ditebus, menggambarkan godaan Isa di dalam hutan.

src: Bawdy poetry is not thought by modern academics to be in keeping with Milton's style, with Batt suggesting that it is likely that his name was added to the poem "to bring scandal upon [him], perhaps by a jealous contemporary."
ref: Puisi lucah tidak dianggap oleh ahli akademik moden sebagai selari dengan gaya Milton, dengan Batt mencadangkan yang mungkin namanya telah ditambah ke puisi itu "untuk menimbulkan skandal ke atas [nya], mungkin disebabkan oleh orang sezamannya yang cemburu".

src: She suggests that the culprit might have been Sir John Suckling, a poet who was a supporter of the monarchy, in contrast to the Republican Milton.
ref: Dia mencadangkan yang pesalah itu mungkin Sir John Suckling, seorang penyajak yang menyokong pemerintahan beraja, tidak seperti Milton seorang Republikan.

src: The University of Oxford is currently digitising the songbooks and anthologies of the Harding Collection, said to be the world's largest such collection, as part of a project to allow online access.
ref: Universiti Oxford kini sedang mendigitalkan buku-buku lagu dan antologi Koleksi Harding, yang dikatakan sebagai koleksi terbesar di dunia, sebahagian daripada projek untuk membenarkan akses dalam talian.

src: It is named after Walter Harding, a British musician who collected music and poetry in Chicago.
ref: Ia diberi nama sempena Walter Harding, seorang ahli muzik British yang mengumpul muzik dan sajak di Chicago.

src: The poem had been read before, but without anyone noticing Milton's name at the bottom.
ref: Sajak itu pernah dibacakan sebelum ini, tetapi tanpa sesiapa pun yang menyedari nama Milton di bahagian bawah.

src: Dr Williams, the project's leader, expressed her doubts as to the authenticity of the attribution, commenting that "[y]ou could become very rich and famous – well, famous, anyway – if you could prove the rhyme was really by Milton."
ref: Dr Williams, ketua projek tersebut, meluahkan kesangsiannya tentang ketulenan atribusi tersebut, dan berkata "[k]amu boleh menjadi sangat kaya dan terkenal - terkenal, ya, tetapi - jika kamu boleh buktikan yang rima itu sebenarnya oleh Milton".

src: On Friday, all six major American television networks; ABC, CBS, FOX, NBC, WB, and UPN, along with most PBS stations, united in a rare show of solidarity to air a one hour charity concert called Shelter from the Storm: A Concert for the Gulf Coast.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, semua enam rangkaian televisyen utama Amerika; ABC, CBS, FOX, NBC, WB dan UPN, bersama-sama dengan stesen PBS besar, bersatu dalam pertunjukan perpaduan yang jarang berlaku untuk menyiarkan konsert amal sejam dipanggil Perlindungan daripada Ribut: Satu Konsert untuk Teluk Pantai.

src: The concert aired live at 8pm in the Eastern time zone and 7pm in the Central time zone and on tape-delay in the Mountain and Pacific time zones.
ref: Konsert itu disiarkan secara langsung pada jam 8 malam di zon masa yang Timur dan 7pm dalam zon waktu yang Tengah dan pada pita kelewatan di Gunung dan zon masa Pasifik.

src: It was also shown on the Internet and many cable networks such as USA, Bravo and G4.
ref: Ia juga ditunjukkan di Internet dan banyak rangkaian kabel seperti USA, Bravo dan G4.

src: The show was produced by Joel Gallen, the same man behind the September 11th tribute concert America: A Tribute to Heroes.
ref: Acara ini telah dihasilkan oleh Joel Gallen, orang yang sama di sebalik konsert penghormatan 11 September Amerika: A Tribute to Heroes.

src: The show was not censored for political statements but was for obscenities.
ref: Acara ini tidak ditapis untuk kenyataan politik tetapi adalah untuk kata-kata kotor.

src: Last week, rapper Kayne West made a remark on an NBC charity show A Concert for Hurricane Relief, in which West claimed that "George Bush doesn't care about black people.
ref: Minggu lalu, penyanyi rap Kayne West membuat kenyataan pada amal NBC A Concert for Hurricane Relief, di mana Barat mendakwa bahawa "George Bush tidak mengambil berat tentang orang kulit hitam.

src: ", which caused controversy.
ref: ", yang menimbulkan kontroversi.

src: Throughout the concert there were notable acts, such U2 performing "One" with Mary.
ref: Sepanjang konsert itu terdapat pertunjukkan yang ketara, U2 melaksanakan "One" dengan Mary.

src: Another moment was Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood and the house band from The Late Show with David Letterman doing a cover of John Fogerty's "Who'll Stop The Rain".
ref: Masa lain adalah Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood dan band rumah daripada The Late Show dengan David Letterman melakukan sampul John Fogerty itu: "Who'll Stop The Rain."

src: Donations were being solicited for the American Red Cross and the Salvation Army.
ref: Derma sedang diminta untuk Palang Merah Amerika dan Salvation Army.

src: Telecom company AT&T provided toll-free calling and 10 call centers for the event and MCI provided volunteers from their call centers.
ref: Telecom syarikat AT & T menyediakan panggilan bebas tol dan 10 pusat panggilan untuk acara tersebut dan MCI sediakan sukarelawan dari pusat-pusat panggilan mereka.

src: BET also held a charity concert called S.O.S (Saving OurSelves), a half-hour before cutting to the main one.
ref: BET turut mengadakan konsert amal dipanggil S.O.S (Saving OurSelves), setengah jam sebelum memotong dengan yang utama.

src: MTV, MTV Overdrive, VH1 and CMT will air a charity show Saturday called ReAct Now: Music & Relief.
ref: MTV, MTV Overdrive, VH1 dan CMT akan disiarkan pertunjukan amal Sabtu dipanggil ReAct Now: Music & Relief.

src: Progress M-08M, an unmanned Russian cargo spacecraft, departed for the International Space Station (ISS) on Wednesday from the Baikonur Cosmodrome to resupply the orbital outpost.
ref: Progress M-08M, sebuah kapal angkasa lepas kargo Rusia tanpa manusia, berlepas untuk ke Pangkalan Angkasa Lepas Antarabangsa (ISS) pada hari Rabu dari Baikonur Cosmodrome untuk mengisi semula bekalan kota kara orbit itu.

src: The rocket carrying the craft, a Soyuz-U, lifted off at 7:11 pm Moscow time (15:11 GMT).
ref: Roket yang membawa kapal itu, sebuah Soyuz-U, dilancarkan pada pukul 7:11 petang waktu Moscow (15:11 GMT).

src: Russian Space Agency officials deemed the launch a success after the Progress successfully achieved orbit and separated from the third stage of the rocket.
ref: Pihak Agensi Angkasa Lepas Rusia menganggap pelancaran itu sebagai sebuah kejayaan selepas Progress berjaya mendapatkan orbit dan berpisah dari peringkat ketiga roket itu.

src: Docking of the spacecraft with the ISS is expected to occur on Saturday.
ref: Pendaratan kapal angkasa lepas itu dengan ISS dijangka berlaku pada hari Sabtu.

src: The Progress will deliver more than 2.5 metric tons of supplies and essentials to the orbiting American-Russian crew, as well as gifts and letters from the crew members' families.
ref: Progress akan menghantar lebih dari 2.5 tan metrik bekalan dan keperluan kepada anak-anak kapal Amerika-Rusia, dan juga hadiah dan surat dari ahli keluarga anak-anak kapal tersebut.

src: The British Assets Recovery Agency is investigating £30 million / €44 million of assets believed to be owned by senior members of the Provisional Irish Republican Army (PIRA or IRA), using information provided by the Irish Criminal Assets Bureau and British and Irish law enforcement agencies.
ref: Agensi Pemulihan Aset British sedang menyiasat aset bernilai £30 juta / €44 juta yang dipercayai milik ahli-ahli kanan Tentera Sementara Republik Irish (PIRA atau IRA), dengan menggunakan maklumat yang diberikan oleh pihak Biro Jenayah Aset Ireland dan agensi-agensi penguatkuasaan undang-undang British dan Ireland.

src: The money is believed to represent a small fraction of the wealth obtained by the organisation.
ref: Wang itu dipercayai mewakili sebahagian kecil kekayaan yang diperolehi organisasi tersebut.

src: Most of the assets are believed to have been owned by the IRA chief of staff, Thomas Murphy and businessman Dermot Craven.
ref: Kebanyakan aset-aset itu dipercayai milik Ketua kakitangan IRA, Thomas Murphy dan ahli perniagaan Dermot Craven.

src: Now that negotiations over weapons decommissioning are over, it is believed that other IRA members who have become rich through running protection rackets or other criminal activities may also be stripped of their illegal assests in the forthcoming weeks.
ref: Sekarang dimana rundingan tentang gencatan senjata telah berakhir, dipercayai bahawa ahli-ahli lain IRA yang menjadi kaya melalui kegiatan perlindungan haram atau aktiviti jenayah lain juga boleh dilucutkan aset-aset haram mereka pada minggu-minggu akan datang.

src: Businesses and organisations paying money towards protection rackets are hoping that the structure of the IRA will now begin to unravel.
ref: Kebanyakan perniagaan dan organisasi yang membayar wang kepada perlindungan haram berharap bahawa struktur IRA itu akan mula dibongkar sekarang.

src: Police in Russia say they have identified the man behind the bombing of Moscow's Domodedovo International Airport on Monday, although they will not yet name him.
ref: Polis di Rusia berkata, mereka telah mengenal pasti lelaki di sebalik pengeboman Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Moscow Domodedovo pada hari Isnin, walaupun mereka belum menamakannya lagi.

src: Police said the man who killed 35 was a twenty-year-old suicide bomber from the North Caucasus region.
ref: Polis berkata, seorang lelaki yang membunuh 35 adalah seorang pengebom berani mati yang berusia dua puluh tahun dari wilayah Utara Caucasus.

src: An Investigative Committee statement delivered by spokesman Vladimir Markin said "We have established the identity of the terrorist suicide bomber who set off the explosive."
ref: Satu kenyataan Jawatankuasa Siasatan disampaikan oleh jurucakap Vladimir Markin berkata, "Kami telah mengesahkan identiti pengebom berani mati pengganas yang mencetuskan letupan itu."

src: "He turned out to be a 20-year-old native from one of the North Caucasus republics," and "Despite the investigation having established the name of the terrorist, we will not name him today," because it may hamper ongoing efforts to detain people suspected of collaborating.
ref: "Dia rupa-rupanya berusia 20 tahun yang berasal dari salah satu daripada republik Caucasus Utara," dan "Walaupun siasatan telah mengesani nama pengganas itu, kita tidak akan menamakan dia pada hari ini," kerana ia boleh menjejaskan usaha berterusan untuk menahan orang yang disyaki bekerjasama dengannya.

src: Markin added "I would especially like to note that it was by no means an accident that the act of terror was committed in the international arrivals hall…" "According to investigators, the act of terror was first and foremost aimed against foreign citizens."
ref: Markin berkata "Saya terutamanya ingin ambil perhatian bahawa ia bukan secara tidak sengaja bahawa perbuatan keganasan itu dilakukan di dalam dewan ketibaan antarabangsa..." "Menurut penyiasat, perbuatan keganasan adalah yang pertama dan utama yang bertuju terhadap rakyat asing."

src: Eight of those killed were foreigners and several flights had just landed from European origins.
ref: Lapan daripada mereka yang terbunuh adalah warga asing dan beberapa penerbangan baru sahaja mendarat dari kawasan Eropah.

src: President Dmitry Medvedev sacked several transportations officials in the wake of the bombing.
ref: Presiden Dmitry Medvedev memecat beberapa pegawai pengangkutan berikutan pengeboman.

src: The nation's transport infrastructure will deal with extra visitors when the country hosts the 2014 Winter Olympics and 2018 World Cup.
ref: Infrastruktur pengangkutan negara akan berurusan dengan pelawat tambahan apabila negara ini menjadi tuan rumah Sukan Olimpik Musim Sejuk 2014 dan Piala Dunia 2018.

src: Medvedev has targeted both security officials and airport management in the wake of the bombing.
ref: Medvedev telah mensasarkan kedua-dua pegawai keselamatan dan pengurusan lapangan terbang berikutan amaran daripada pengeboman itu.

src: Few official details have been released by the investigation and unofficial reports in the press have been contradictory; one report suggested a suicide bomber wearing a plastic explosive-based shrapnel bomb belt.
ref: Beberapa butiran rasmi telah dikeluarkan oleh laporan siasatan dan tidak rasmi dalam akhbar bercanggah; satu laporan mencadangkan seorang pengebom berani mati memakai tali pinggang berisi bahan letupan berasaskan bom serpihan.

src: Another said it could have been detonated remotely, while a third suggested a timer.
ref: Seorang lagi berkata ia telah diletupkan dari jauh, manakala orang ketiga yang berkatakan penentu masa.

src: Russian newspapers initially suggested a bag had exploded on the floor, while local TV has shown CCTV footage of the explosion.
ref: Surat khabar Rusia mulanya mencadangkan satu beg telah meletup di atas lantai, manakala TV tempatan telah menunjukkan rakaman letupan CCTV.

src: Unconfirmed reports also claim the Federal Security Service was searching for three people ahead of the attack and that the bomber was Vitaly Razdobudko of Stavropol.
ref: Laporan tidak rasmi itu juga mendakwa Perkhidmatan Keselamatan Persekutuan sedang mencari tiga orang sebelum berlakunya serangan itu dan pengebom itu adalah Vitaly Razdobudko dari Stavropol.

src: Although nobody has claimed responsibility or been arrested for the airport attack, Markin told reporters several people have been brought in on suspicion of planning an attack on December 31, while others are being sought.
ref: Walaupun tiada siapa yang mengaku bertanggungjawab atau telah ditangkap atas serangan lapangan terbang itu, Markin memberitahu pemberita beberapa orang telah disoal siasat kerana disyaki merancang serangan pada 31 Disember, manakala yang lain sedang dicari.

src: He linked them to an explosion on the 31st in a Moscow hotel, in which a bomber died after the device he was building went off prematurely.
ref: Dia mengaitkan mereka kepada letupan pada 31 haribulan di sebuah hotel Moscow, di mana pengebom itu maut selepas peranti diciptanya itu meletup terlebih awal.

src: Prime Minister Vladimir Putin said on Wednesday that the attack is not thought to be linked to Chechnyan insurgency.
ref: Perdana Menteri Vladimir Putin berkata pada hari Rabu bahawa serangan itu tidak dianggap ada kaitan dengan pemberontakan Chechnyan.

src: The attack is Moscow's second within a year, with two women from Dagestan, North Caucuses blowing themselves up on the Metro and killing 39 in 2010.
ref: Serangan itu adalah yang kedua di Moscow dalam tempoh setahun, dengan dua orang perempuan dari Dagestan, Caucuses Utara meletupkan diri mereka di Metro dan membunuh 39 pada tahun 2010.

src: Che Guevara's "Motorcycle Diaries" companion dies  Both were intellectually curious and interested in exploration.
ref: Rakan "Motorcycle Diaries" Che Guevara sudah meninggal dunia.

src: In 1951 they set out on an eight-month motorcycle trip through South American that exposed them to the poverty in which most South Americans lived.
ref: Kedua-duanya mempunyai sifat ingin tahu dari segi intelek dan berminat dalam penjelajahan.

src: The pair worked in a leprosy colony and met wtih destitute miners and indigenous people.
ref: Pada tahun 1951 mereka merancang penjelajahan motorsikal selama lapan bulan merentasi Amerika Selatan yang mendedahkan mereka kepada kemiskinan di mana dihuni kebanyakan orang Amerika Selatan.

src: Both men kept diaries which served as the basis for the 2004 film, The Motorcycle Diaries, produced by Robert Redford and directed by Walter Salles.
ref: Pasangan itu bekerja di kawasan penyakit kusta dan bertemu dengan pelombong papa dan orang asli.

src: According to the Guardian, "Their road trip awoke in Guevara a social consciousness and political convictions that would turn him into one of the iconic revolutionaries of the 20th century."
ref: Kedua-dua lelaki ini menyimpan diari sebagai asas kepada filem 2004, The Motorcycle Diaries, diterbitkan oleh Robert Redford dan diarah oleh Walter Salles.

src: The trip is widely believed to have inspired Guevara to go to Cuba and join Fidel Castro in his 1959 revolt against Cuban dictator Fulgencio Batista.
ref: Menurut Guardian, "Penjelajahan jalan raya mereka membangunkan kesedaran sosial dan pendirian politik dalam diri Guevara yang menjadikannya sebagai salah seorang revolusioner ikonik pada abad ke 20." Jelajah ini sangat dipercayai telah memberi inspirasi kepada Guevara untuk ke Cuba dan menyertai Fidel Castro dalam pemberontakan 1959 menentang diktator Cuba Fulgencio Batista.

src: By the time the two men met again eight years later, Guevara was a revolutionary hero and chief of Cuba’s central bank.
ref: Apabila kedua mereka bertemu kembali selepas lapan tahun kemudian, Guevara merupakan hero revolusi dan ketua bank negara Cuba.

src: Jiménez, who had remained in Argentina working in a clinic, accepted Guevara's invitation to move to Cuba in 1961 and founded a medical facility in Santiago.
ref: Jimenez, yang kekal berada di Argentina bekerja di klinik, menerima jemputan Guevara untuk berpindah ke Cuba pada tahun 1961 dan mengasaskan satu fasiliti perubatan di Santiago.

src: Later he moved to Havana where he continued his medical work.
ref: Kemudian dia berpindah ke Havana di mana dia meneruskan kerja perubatan.

src: The two remained friends although they did not always agree.
ref: Dua orang itu kekal sebagai kawan walaupun mereka sering tidak bersependapat.

src: Jiménez rejected Guevara’s belief that social reform in Latin America had to be accomplished through guerrilla warfare.
ref: Jimenes menolak kepercayaan Guevara bahawa reformasi sosial di Latin Amerika perlu dilaksanakan melalui perang gerila.

src: The book The Motorcycle Diaries was published in the 1990's.
ref: Buku The Motorcycle Diaries diterbitkan pada tahun 1990-an.

src: US lawmakers have reached a last-minute deal to avoid a government shutdown, which would have begun at 12:00 EDT (04:00 UTC) Saturday.
ref: Penggubal undang-undang AS telah mendapat perjanjian pada saat-saat akhir untuk mengelakkan penutupan kerajaan, yang sepatutnya boleh bermula pada hari Sabtu pukul 12:00 EDT (04:00 UTC).

src: The agreement, announced just one hour before the shutdown was to occur, includes US$38.5 billion in budget reductions.
ref: Perjanjian itu, diumumkan hanya sejam sebelum penutupan itu dijangka terjadi, melibatkan AS$38.5 bilion di dalam pengurangan belanjawan.

src: Earlier on Friday, US legislators deflected claims that a midnight deal was being worked out, but Republican Party sources later reported that a deal was likely to be reached.
ref: Terlebih dahulu pada hari Jumaat, penggubal undang-undang AS mengelakkan dakwaan bahawa perjanjian tengah malam sedang dibuat, tetapi sumber Parti Republikan kemudian melaporkan sebuah perjanjian kemungkinan besar akan dicapai.

src: The deal was apparently reached after disputes over government funding for organizations such as Planned Parenthood were resolved.
ref: Perjanjian itu nampaknya telah dicapai selepas pertikaian tentang pendanaan kerajaan untuk organisasi seperti Perancangan Masa Keibubapaan diselesaikan.

src: Boehner said both sides decided on a six-day extension, or "bridge," of government funding, which would allow Congress to work out a final solution to last the remainder of the 2011 fiscal year, which ends in September.
ref: Boehner berkata kedua-dua belah membuat keputusan tentang tempoh lanjutan enam hari atau "jambatan" pendanaan kerajaan, yang akan membenarkan Kongres membuat penyelesaian akhir kepada tahun fiskal 2011 selebihnya, yang berakhir pada bulan September.

src: Voting for the resulting agreement will take place some time next week, according to Boehner.
ref: Mengundi untuk perjanjian sebagai keputusan akan dilakukan minggu hadapan, menurut Boehner.

src: The last complete US government shutdown occurred in 1995, during the administration of Bill Clinton, lasting five days; it was proceeded by a 21-day partial shutdown.
ref: Penutupan kerajaan AS sepenuhnya yang terakhir berlaku pada tahun 1995, semasa pentadbiran Bill Clinton, berlangsung selama lima hari; ianya diteruskan dengan penutupan separa selama 21 hari.

src: In the event of a government shutdown, essential federal employees are still required to work, but nonessential personnel are placed on unpaid furloughs.
ref: Semasa penutupan kerajaan, pekerja persekutuan penting perlu bekerja, tetapi pekerja yang tidak penting diberi cuti dari bertugas tidak berbayar.

src: Essential staff include military personnel, air traffic controllers, emergency officials, and intelligence officials.
ref: Pekerja penting termasuk kakitangan tentera, pengawal trafik udara, pegawai kecemasan, dan pegawai perisik.

src: Thousands of protestors demonstrated today in Baku, the capital of Azerbaijan.
ref: Beribu-ribu penunjuk perasaan menunjuk perasaan hari ini di Baku, ibu negara Azerbaijan.

src: They left their houses due to unrest over the results of the November 6 parliamentary elections, which, according to the opposition, are faked.
ref: Mereka meninggalkan rumah mereka kerana pergolakan sejak keputusan pilihan raya November 6 parlimen, yang, menurut pembangkang, dipalsukan.

src: The protest lasted about three hours before being shut down.
ref: Bantahan itu berlangsung kira-kira tiga jam sebelum ditutup.

src: The protest gathered some 15,000 people, but the opposition hoped to gather 30,000 to 50,000 Azeris.
ref: Bantahan itu mengumpul kira-kira 15,000 orang, tetapi pembangkang berharap untuk mengumpul 30,000 hingga 50,000 orang Azeri.

src: Many people were stopped by police on their way to the outskirts of Baku.
ref: Ramai orang telah dihalang oleh polis dalam perjalanan ke pinggir Baku.

src: When rioters tried to enlarge the protest, police used force to stop them.
ref: Apabila perusuh cuba untuk memperbesarkan bantahan itu, polis menggunakan kekerasan untuk menghalang mereka.

src: Some Azeris believe that a "three hour revolution" wouldn't change anything in the country.
ref: Sesetengah orang Azeri percaya bahawa "revolusi tiga jam" tidak akan mengubah apa-apa di negara ini.

src: They believe that the demonstration was controlled by the government.
ref: Mereka percaya bahawa demonstrasi tersebut telah dikawal oleh kerajaan.

src: The November 6 elections, won, according to officials, by the governing New Azerbaijan Party, have been condemned by international organizations, such as The Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe, and by independent observers.
ref: Pilihan raya pada 6 November, telah menang, menurut pegawai-pegawai, oleh Azerbaijan Parti baru yang memerintah, telah dikutuk oleh pertubuhan-pertubuhan antarabangsa seperti Pertubuhan Keselamatan dan Kerjasama di Eropah, dan oleh pemerhati bebas.

src: The Council of Europe reports that results in about 43% of polling stations were faked.
ref: Majlis Eropah melaporkan bahawa keputusan dalam kira-kira 43% daripada tempat mengundi telah dipalsukan.

src: To prevent protests, re-runs were ordered in two districts by election officials.
ref: Untuk mengelakkan protes, pilihan raya semula telah diperintahkan di dua daerah oleh pegawai-pegawai pilihan raya.

src: Former US president Bill Clinton was the guest of honor in a memorial ceremony attended by some 200,000 Israelis in Tel Aviv to mark the 10th anniversary of the assassination of Israeli Prime minister Yitzhak Rabin.
ref: Bekas Presiden Amerika Syarikat Bill Clinton menjadi tetamu kehormat di majlis peringatan yang dihadiri oleh kira-kira 200,000 rakyat Israel di Tel Aviv untuk menandakan ulang tahun ke-10 pembunuhan Perdana Menteri Israel Yitzhak Rabin.

src: The rally was delayed one week due to Clinton's schedule.
ref: Perhimpunan itu ditangguhkan seminggu kerana jadual Clinton.

src: Clinton opened his speech with some words of respect to the deputy prime minister Shimon Peres, "My dear friend Shimon Peres, thank you for servicing the case of peace all of your life and being a partner and a leader to all of us".
ref: Clinton membuka ucapannya dengan beberapa ucapan bagi menghormati Timbalan Perdana Menteri Shimon Peres itu, "kawan baik saya Shimon Peres, terima kasih kerana berkhidmat untuk kedamaian sepanjang kehidupan anda dan menjadi rakan kongsi dan pemimpin kepada kita semua".

src: Regarding Rabin, Clinton said, "I loved him very much, and I was in awe of his ability to move from being a soldier to being a peacemaker, a politician to a statesman".
ref: Mengenai Rabin, Clinton berkata, "Saya sangat sukakan beliau, dan saya kagum dengan keupayaannya untuk bergerak daripada menjadi seorang anggota tentera kepada pendamai, seorang ahli politik kepada negarawan".

src: Clinton said that it was a great honor for him to be at the ceremony with his wife, daughter and friends from America to stand in solidarity for the memory of Yitzhak Rabin.
ref: Clinton berkata bahawa ia adalah satu penghormatan besar untuk beliau berada di majlis tersebut bersama isteri, anak perempuan dan rakan-rakan dari Amerika untuk berdiri dalam perpaduan untuk memperingati Yitzhak Rabin.

src: He said: "If he were here he would say, There is enough of all this missing."
ref: Beliau berkata: "Jika beliau berada di sini beliau akan berkata, cukup semua kehilangan ini".

src: "If you really think I lived a good life, if you think I made a noble sacrifice in death, then for goodness sakes, take up my work and see it through to the end" and concluded his speech with the words in Hebrew — "Shalom Haver" (Goodbye my friend).
ref: "Jika anda benar-benar berfikir saya dapat hidup yang baik, jika anda fikir saya membuat pengorbanan mulia dengan kematian, jika begitu demi kebaikan, ambil kerja saya dan lihatlah ia hingga selesai" dan menyimpulkan ucapannya dengan kata-kata dalam bahasa Ibrani - "Shalom Haver "(Selamat tinggal kawan).

src: Later Clinton joined Peres and the rest of the politicians, most of whom were from Rabin's Cabinet and were with him on the same stage in the original peace rally for singing "The Song For Peace", the same song that they sang with Rabin that night.
ref: Kemudian Clinton menyertai Peres dan semua ahli-ahli politik, sebahagian besar daripada mereka adalah daripada Kabinet Rabin dan berada bersama dengannya di atas pentas yang sama dalam perhimpunan aman asal untuk menyanyi "The Song For Peace," lagu yang sama mereka nyanyikan bersama Rabin malam itu.

src: Ric Flair (real name Richard Fliehr) has a warrant out for his arrest.
ref: Ric Flair (nama sebenar Richard Fliehr) mempunyai waran untuk penangkapannya.

src: According to an ABC affiliate in Charlotte, North Carolina, Flair took part in an alleged road rage incident last Wednesday on Interstate 485.
ref: Menurut sebuah rangkaian ABC di Charlotte, North Carolina, Flair telah terlibat di dalam satu tuduhan insiden berang jalanraya Rabu lalu di Interstate 485.

src: Allegedly Flair got out of his car and assaulted the man in front of him.
ref: Tertuduh Flair telah keluar dari kereta dan menyerang lelaki di hadapannya.

src: One warrant for assault on someone's property and a second for assault on another person.
ref: Satu waran kerana menyerang harta orang lain dan waran kedua kerana menyerang orang lain.

src: The Nine Network has announced the death of one of Australia's richest men, Kerry Packer, aged 68.
ref: Nine Network telah mengumumkan kematian salah seorang daripada lelaki terkaya Australia, Key Packer, pada usia 68 tahun.

src: Announcer Richard Wilkins said on the Today Show that he had just been handed official confirmation of Mr Packer's death at 68.
ref: Juruhebah Richard Wilkins berkata di Today Show bahawa dia baru sahaja diserahkan pengesahan rasmi mengenai kematian Mr Packer di usia 68.

src: He said a statement from Tony Ritchie, Nine head of news, said: "Mrs Kerry Packer and her children James and Gretel sadly report the passing last evening of her husband and their father Kerry."
ref: Dia menyebut kenyataan daripada Tony Ritchie, ketua berita Nine, yang berkata: "Mrs Kerry Packer dan anaknya James dan Gretel dengan sedihnya telah melaporkan kematian suaminya dan ayah mereka Kerry pada petang tadi."

src: "He died peacefully at home with his family at his bedside".
ref: "Beliau meninggal dengan tenang di rumahnya bersama keluarganya di sisi katil."

src: Packer was the major shareholder in Publishing and Broadcasting Limited (PBL) which owns the Nine television network and Australian Consolidated Press, the producer of many Australian and New Zealand magazines.
ref: Packer merupakan pemegang stok saham terbesar dalam Publishing and Broadcasting Limited (PBL) yang mana memiliki siaran televisyen Nine dan Akbar Gabungan Australia, produser kepada kebanyakan majalah-majalah Australia dan New Zealand.

src: Packer was also involved in the gambling and tourism industries and owned the Crown Casino in Melbourne.
ref: Packer juga terlibat dalam industri perjudian dan pelancongan dan memiliki Crown Casino di Melbourne.

src: In the 1970s, his World Series Cricket revolutionised cricket, bringing One-day cricket to the fore by introducing things such as coloured uniforms, white balls & day/night matches.
ref: Pada 1970s, Kriket Siri Dunia miliknya telah merevolusi kriket, membawa kriket Sehari ke hadapan dengan memperkenalkan perkara-perkara seperti pakaian seragam berwarna, bola putih & perlawanan siang/malam.

src: Business Review Weekly magazine estimated Packer's net worth at AU$6.5 billion in 2004.
ref: Majalah Business Review Weekly menjangkakan harta bersih Packer berjumlah AU$6.5 bilion pada tahun 2004.

src: Another famous rich Australian media magnate, who may have lost his Australian nationality, is Rupert Murdoch.
ref: Hartawan media kaya terkemuka Australia lain, yang mana mungkin telah hilang kerakyatan Australianya, ialah Rupert Murdoch.

src: Consumer confidence rose in December to levels closer to those before hurricane Katrina according to the Conference Board Consumer Research Center's consumer confidence index.
ref: Keyakinan pengguna meningkat pada bulan Disember ke tahap lebih dekat berbanding dengan sebelum taufan Katrina mengikut indeks keyakinan pengguna di Persidangan Lembaga Pusat Penyelidikan Pengguna.

src: The index was at 105.5 before the huricane hit the port of New Orleans disrupting oil production and trade for a large part of the country.
ref: Indeks tempatan ialah pada 105.5 sebelum taufan melanda pelabuhan New Orleans yang mengganggu pengeluaran minyak dan perdagangan di sebahagian besar negara ini.

src: The index rose to 103.6 from a revised 98.3 for November.
ref: Indeks itu meningkat kepada 103.6 daripada 98.3 yang disemak pada bulan November.

src: "Consumer confidence continues to bounce back and is now at its highest level since Hurricane Katrina struck the Gulf Coast" said Lynn Franco, director of the Conference Board Consumer Research Center.
ref: "Keyakinan pengguna terus melantun dan kini berada di paras tertinggi sejak taufan Katrina melanda Pantai Teluk," kata pengarah Persidangan Lembaga Pusat Penyelidikan Pengguna, Lynn Franco.

src: Most of the change is attributed to falling gas prices and an improved job outlook.
ref: Kebanyakan perubahan itu adalah disebabkan oleh kejatuhan harga gas dan prospek pekerjaan yang lebih baik.

src: "The resiliency of the economy, recent declines in prices at the pump, and job growth have consumers feeling more confident at year-end than they felt at the start of 2005," Franco said.
ref: "Daya tahan ekonomi, penurunan harga di pam baru-baru ini, dan pertumbuhan pekerjaan menyebabkan pengguna berasa lebih yakin pada akhir tahun daripada mereka rasa pada awal 2005," kata Franco.

src: "Even though all of the improvement over the past twelve months has been in consumers' assessment of current conditions, and expectations remain below earlier levels, consumers are confident that the economy will continue to expand in 2006."
ref: "Meskipun semua peningkatan dalam tempoh dua belas bulan yang lalu berada dalam penilaian pengguna terhadap keadaan semasa, dan harapan kekal pada paras kurang daripada sebelum ini, pengguna yakin bahawa ekonomi akan terus berkembang pada tahun 2006.".

src: Spencer Dryden, the drummer of the legendary American rock band Jefferson Airplane, passed away on Tuesday, Jan. 11.
ref: Spencer Dryden, pemain drum kumpulan rok ternama Amerika Jefferson Airplane, meninggal dunia pada Selasa, 11 Jan.

src: Spencer Dryden was a member of Jefferson Airplane during the band's heyday.
ref: Spencer Dryden adalah ahli Jefferson Airplane semasa waktu gemilang kumpulan itu.

src: He replaced original drummer Skip Spence and played with Jefferson Airplane at the legendary Woodstock and Altamont rock festivals.
ref: Beliau menggantikan pemain gendang asal Skip Spence dan bermain dengan Jefferson Airplane di Woodstock dan Altamont festival rok yang terkenal.

src: Dryden left the band in 1970 to play with New Riders of The Purple Sage, a country rock band formed by members of the Grateful Dead.
ref: Dryden meninggalkan kumpulan musik itu pada tahun 1970 untuk bermain dengan New Riders of The Purple Sage, sebuah kumpulan musik rok negara yang terdiri daripada ahli-ahli Grateful Dead.

src: He was married three times and is survived by sons Jeffrey, Jes and Jackson Dryden.
ref: Beliau telah berkahwin tiga kali dan meninggalkan anak-anak lelaki Jeffrey, Jes dan Jackson Dryden.

src: Republican candidates for President of the United States Newt Gingrich and Rick Perry have failed to qualify to be on the ballot for the Virginia primary election, scheduled for March 6, Super Tuesday.
ref: Calon-calon Republikan bagi Presiden Amerika Syarikat Newt Gingrich dan Rick Perry telah gagal untuk layak bagi membuang undi untuk pilihanraya primer Virginia, yang dijadualkan pada 6 Mac, Super Selasa.

src: Gingrich, former Speaker of the United States House of Representatives and Perry, Governor of Texas, did not submit the 10,000 signatures, with at least 400 from each of the state's eleven congressional districts, to the state's board of elections before the 5:00 PM deadline last Thursday required to gain ballot access, according to the Republican Party of Virginia.
ref: Gingrich, bekas Pengerusi Dewan Rakyat Amerika Syarikat dan Perry, Gabenor Texas, tidak menghantar 10,000 tandatangan, dengan sekurang-kurangnya 400 dari setiap sebelas daerah kongres negara, kepada lembaga pilihanraya negara sebelum tarikh tutup jam 5:00 petang Khamis lalu yang diperlukan untuk memperoleh kebenaran untuk membuang undi, menurut Parti Republikan Virginia.

src: Gingrich's and Perry's campaigns both claimed to have more signatures than needed, 11,050 and 11,911 respectively.
ref: Kempen Gingrich dan Perry kedua-duanya mendakwa mempunyai tandatangan lebih dari yang diperlukan, masing-masing 11,050 dan 11,911.

src: Volunteers spent last night reviewing the submitted petitions and validating signatures.
ref: Para sukarelawan telah menghabiskan malam semalam untuk menyemak petisyen yang dihantar dan mengesahkan semua tandatangan.

src: Reportedly Rick Perry is considering an appeal of the assessment.
ref: Dilaporkan Rick Perry sedang mempertimbangkan satu rayuan untuk penilaian.

src: Among other major candidates for the 2012 Republican presidential nomination, former Governor of Massachusetts Mitt Romney and Texas congressman Ron Paul submitted the required petition and qualified for the ballot.
ref: Di antara calon utama yang lain bagi pencalonan presiden Republikan tahun 2012, bekas Gabenor Massachusetts Mitt Romney dan ahli kongres Texas Ron Paul telah menghantar petisyen yang diperlukan dan layak untuk membuang undi.

src: On Thursday, it was disclosed that candidates Michele Bachmann and Rick Santorum also failed to gain ballot access.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, calon Michele Bachmann dan Rick Santorum didedahkan turut gagal untuk mendapat kebenaran membuang undi.

src: According to the manager of the Gingrich campaign, Michael Krull, the former House Speaker plans to compete in the Virginia primary, despite not gaining ballot access, as a write-in candidate.
ref: Menurut pengurus kempen Gingrich, Michael Krull, bekas Pengerusi Dewan merancang untuk bertanding di primer Virginia, walaupun tidak mendapat kebenaran membuang undi, sebagai calon bertulis.

src: Krull blamed a "failed system" for the campaign's inability to gain ballot access.
ref: Krull menyalahkan satu "sistem yang gagal" untuk ketidakupayaan kempen itu untuk mendapat kebenaran membuang undi.

src: Rick Perry's campaign manager said he was disappointed by that campaign's failure to qualify for the ballot.
ref: Pengurus kempen Rick Perry berkata dia kecewa dengan kegagalan kempen untuk layak bagi membuang undi.

src: According to a recent poll of 489 Republican voters by Quinnipiac University, Gingrich leads in the state with 30% of support, followed by Mitt Romney at 25% and Ron Paul at 9%.
ref: Menurut undian terkini dari 489 pengundi Republikan oleh Universiti Quinnipiac, Gingrich mendahului dengan sokongan 30%, diikuti oleh Mitt Romney sebanyak 25% dan Ron Paul sebanyak 9%.

src: As Virginia's delegates to the Republican National Convention are not awarded on a winner-take-all basis, candidates other than the winner of the state's primary could also gain delegates from the state.
ref: Oleh kerana wakil Virginia ke Konvensyen Kebangsaan Republikan tidak dianugerahkan dasar pemenang akan mengambil kesemuanya, calon-calon selain pemenang utama negara turut menerima wakil-wakil dari negara.

src: The National Weather Service announced that some 27 inches of snow was measured at 4:10 p.m. EST at Central Park in New York City today, breaking a record set in 1947.
ref: Perkhidmatan Kajicuaca Kebangsaan mengisytiharkan sebanyak 27 inci salji telah disukat pada 4:10 p.m. EST di Central Park, Bandaraya New York hari ini, memecahkan catatan rekod pada 1947.

src: This after a day of snowfall and storms in the Northeastern United States.
ref: Ini berlaku selepas seharian salji turun dan ribut di Timur Laut Amerika Syarikat.

src: The poor weather conditions prompted the shutdown of LaGuardia, John F. Kennedy, and Newark International Airports.
ref: Keadaan cuaca yang buruk mendorong kepada penutupan lapangan terbang LaGuardia, John F. Kennedy, dan Newark.

src: Delta Airlines also canceled flights in and out of Washington, Philadelphia, Baltimore, Providence, and Hartford.
ref: Delta Airlines turut membatalkan pesawat yang keluar masuk Washington, Philadelphia, Baltimore, Providence, dan Hartford.
