src: In Massachusetts, heavy snow and blizzard warnings were in effect as visibility had been greatly hindered by the falling snow.
ref: Di Massachussetts, amaran salji tebal dan ribut salji memberikan kesan sepertimana pengihatan terhalang oleh salji yang turun.

src: There were other reports of near-blizzard conditions in parts of Connecticut, and Rhode Island.
ref: Terdapat juga laporan lain yang menghampiri keadaan ribut salji di bahagian Connecticut, dan Rhode Island.

src: Adding to the storm, wind gusts as high as 60 mph in New England prompted concerns over coastal flooding.
ref: Menambah kepada ribut tersebut, tiupan angin setinggi 60 mpj di New England mendorong kebimbangan terhadap banjir pantai.

src: In New York City, Department of Transportation employees worked a twelve-hour overtime shift to salt and plow the snow from streets and highways.
ref: Di Bandaraya New York, pekerja di Jabatan Pengangkutan bekerja lebih masa selama dua belas jam untuk meletakkan garam dan menolak salji daripada jalan dan lebuhraya.

src: Alternate-side of the street parking regulations are suspended, but not the city's public schools, much to the chagrin of New York's children.
ref: Peraturan meletak kereta di sisi berselang-seli jalan digantung, tetapi bukan di kawasan sekolah awam bandar, banyaknya mengecewakan kanak-kanak di New York.

src: Although the streets are navigable, the Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) is a different story: Service between Jamaica and Penn Stations remains suspended, as is service along the Port Washington and Hempstead branches.
ref: Walaupun jalan itu boleh dilalui, lain kisahnya di Long Island Rail Road (LIRR): Perkhidmatan diantara Jamaica dan Stesen Penn masih digantung, berikutan servis dilakukan sepanjang cawangan Port Washington dan Hempstead.

src: Additionally, all running branches are expected to be running with 30 minute delays.
ref: Tambahan lagi, semua cawangan bergerak dijangka bergerak dengan kelewatan 30 minit.

src: The MTA Subways will cross-honor LIRR tickets, so customers will be able to take the E train from Jamaica instead.
ref: Keretapi bawah tanah MTA akan meluaskan penggunaan tiket LIRR, supaya pelanggan boleh mengambil tren E daripada Jamaica sebagai ganti.

src: A judge in Germany has ordered a man from Kosovo to be jailed for life for carrying out the "first Islamic-motivated terror attack" within the country.
ref: Seorang hakim di Jerman telah mengarahkan seorang lelaki dari Kosovo dipenjarakan seumur hidup kerana menjalankan "serangan keganasan pertama bermotivasikan Islam" di dalam negara.

src: Arid Uka, 22, killed two US (USAF) men and wounded two more in a gun attack on their bus in Frankfurt.
ref: Arid Uka, 22, membunuh dua orang Amerika Syarikat (USAF) dan mencederakan dua lagi dalam serangan senapang di dalam bas di Frankfurt.

src: Uka, a Kosovan who has lived in Germany since he was four, worked in Frankfurt Airport's mail room.
ref: Uka, seorang Kosovan yang telah menetap di Jerman sejak berusia empat, bekerja dalam bilik surat di Lapangan Terbang Frankfurt.

src: He became attracted to Islamic radicalism in a matter of months and would later cite a video appearing to show US soldiers raping women in Afghanistan as his motive for the attack.
ref: Beliau tertarik kepada radikal Islam dalam masa beberapa bulan dan kemudian memetik video untuk menunjukkan tentera AS merogol wanita di Afghanistan sebagai motif serangan itu.

src: Uka approached a USAF bus at the airport, asking a serviceman for a cigarette.
ref: Uka mendekati bas USAF di lapangan terbang, meminta seorang askar sebatang rokok.

src: Upon learning the group was bound for Afghanistan he fatally shot the man in the head before boarding the bus with a cry of (God is Great).
ref: Apabila mendapat tahu kumpulan itu menuju ke Afghanistan beliau tembak seorang lelaki di kepala sebelum menaiki bas dengan jeritan (Allah Maha Besar).

src: There, he opened fire upon more USAF airmen, killing a second and injuring two others.
ref: Di sana, dia melepaskan tembakan ke atas juruterbang Tentera Udara Amerika Syarikat, membunuh tentera kedua dan mencederakan dua yang lain.

src: The remaining eleven passengers escaped injury when his 9mm pistol jammed.
ref: Baki sebelas penumpang terselamat apabila pistol 9mm itu tersekat.

src: The team had been loading their bus in front of the airport during a trip that began in the United Kingdom.
ref: Pasukan itu telah memuatkan bas mereka di hadapan lapangan terbang semasa lawatan yang bermula di United Kingdom.

src: The fatalities were Nicholas Alden, 25, and Zachary Cuddeback, 21.
ref: Yang mati adalah Nicholas Alden, 25, dan Zachary Cuddeback, 21.

src: Edgar Veguilla received arm and jaw wounds while Kristoffer Schneider was left requiring reconstructive surgery for his face.
ref: Edgar Veguilla menerima kecederaan lengan dan rahang manakala Kristoffer Schneider memerlukan pembedahan rekonstruktif untuk mukanya.

src: Uka's weapon failed whilst pointed at a fifth man's head.
ref: Senjata Uka gagal apabila mengacukan ke kepala seorang lelaki yang kelima itu.

src: Schneider has ongoing pain, blindness in one eye, a missing section of skull and a face rebuilt from titanium.
ref: Schneider mempunyai sakit berterusan, buta sebelah mata, bahagian tengkorak hilang dan pembedahan muka dari titanium.

src: Schneider testified via videolink from a USAF base in his homeland.
ref: Schneider memberi keterangan melalui videolink dari pangkalan Tentera Udara Amerika Syarikat di tanah airnya.

src: Prosecution evidence included songs and text from Uka's computer, phone, and music player.
ref: Bukti pendakwaan termasuk lagu-lagu dan teks dari komputer, telefon dan pemain muzik Uka.

src: He was said to have radicalised alone through access to material such as the fake rape film, which was actually a scene from the anti-war movie .
ref: Dia dikatakan bergerak radikal sendiri melalui akses kepada bahan seperti filem rogol palsu, yang sebenarnya satu babak dari filem anti-perang.

src: In sentencing Uka for murder Judge Thomas Sagebiel agreed with prosecutors there were aggravating circumstances that amounted to "particularly severe guilt," a move likely to prevent parole after fifteen years as is normally possible with German life sentences.
ref: Ketika menjatuhkan hukuman Uka untuk Hakim pembunuhan Thomas Sagebiel bersetuju dengan pendakwa terdapat keadaan yang berlebihan menyebabkan "rasa bersalah yang teruk," langkah itu mungkin menghalang parol lazimnya selepas lima belas tahun mungkin dengan hukuman penjara seumur hidup Jerman.

src: The judge said the attack was aggravated by its ambush nature, that unarmed men were attacked and Alden was also attacked from behind, and that the wounds inflicted were serious.
ref: Hakim itu berkata serangan itu diburukkan lagi oleh serangan hendap, iaitu orang-orang yang tidak bersenjata diserang dan Alden juga telah diserang dari belakang, dan luka yang dikenakan adalah serius.

src: Sagebiel also noted Uka's refusal to explain how he acquired the gun.
ref: Sagebiel juga menyatakan keengganan Uka untuk menjelaskan bagaimana dia memperoleh senjata.

src: There was no drug or alcohol use involved, and no evidence Uka had been trained for the attack.
ref: Tidak ada penggunaan dadah atau alkohol yang terlibat, dan ada bukti Uka telah dilatih untuk menyerang.

src: The killer described himself to the court as spending much of his time on computers, with few friends and a largely non-religious family background.
ref: Pembunuh itu menggambarkan dirinya ke mahkamah sebagai menghabiskan banyak masa pada komputer, dengan beberapa rakan-rakan dan latar belakang keluarga yang sebahagian besarnya bukan agama.

src: He sat motionless with his eyes down and arms folded during the 70-minute verdict and sentencing hearing.
ref: Dia duduk tidak bergerak-gerak dengan matanya ke bawah dan dekap dalam keputusan 70 minit dan hukuman pendengaran.

src: Uka had not joined any radical organisations and the defence claimed he was not a terrorist.
ref: Uka tidak menyertai mana-mana organisasi yang radikal dan pembelaan mendakwa dia bukan seorang pengganas.

src: Last year he blamed inaccurate propaganda for having influenced him and apologised, claiming not to understand his own actions.
ref: Tahun lepas dia menyalahkan propaganda yang tidak tepat kerana telah mempengaruhi beliau dan memohon maaf, mendakwa tidak memahami tindakan sendiri.

src: His defence lawyer, Michaela Roth, also sought to have his youth, admissions, and a troubled childhood considered.
ref: Peguam belaannya, Michaela Roth, juga ikhtiar untuk melihat untuk mempertimbangkan masa mudanya, kemasukan, dan kanak-kanak yang bermasalah.

src: Roth had suggested sexual abuse when Uka was six had led to a return of trauma when he saw the falsified rape video.
ref: Roth mencadangkan penderaan seksual apabila Uka berusia enam tahun telah membawa kepada pulangan trauma apabila dia melihat video rogol itu palsu.

src: This was undermined by psychiatric expert opinion, a report finding the abuse — and the video — of no "decisive relevance".
ref: Ini telah dilemahkan oleh pendapat pakar psikiatri, laporan penyalahgunaan mencari tempat - dan video - tidak "relevan tegas."

src: He was aware when he killed, and did not have a personality disorder although he was of "an immature personality," it concluded.
ref: Dia sedar apabila dia membunuh, dan tidak mempunyai gangguan personaliti walaupun dia dari "personaliti yang tidak matang," dia membuat kesimpulan.

src: "The attack was not only cowardly and perfidious, but also damaged Germany's reputation," said Sagebiel, telling victims and their relatives he "hoped that by our bringing the perpetrator to justice swiftly, you can find some comfort... and will not harbour any rancour towards Germany."
ref: "Serangan itu adalah bukan sahaja pengecut dan durhaka, tetapi juga merosakkan reputasi Jerman," kata Sagebiel, memberitahu mangsa dan saudara-mara mereka dia "berharap dengan kami membawa pelaku ke muka pengadilan dengan pantas, anda boleh tenang...dan tidak akan menyimpan apa-apa dendam terhadap Jerman."

src: Alden's brother Joe was in court and later said "justice has been served."
ref: Saudara Alden, Joe berada di mahkamah dan kemudian berkata "keadilan telah ditegakkan."

src: Major distributors of the operating system Linux have agreed on a new standard that includes common elements for desktop software, in a move to make Linux a more effective competitor to Microsoft Windows.
ref: Pengedar utama sistem operasi Linux telah bersetuju atas satu piawaian baru yang merangkumi elemen yang sama untuk perisian desktop, dalam usaha untuk menjadikan Linux pesaing yang lebih berkesan terhadap Microsoft Windows.

src: The Free Standards Group (FSG) will unveil the Linux Standard Base (LSB) 3.1 on Tuesday at the Desktop Linux Summit in San Diego.
ref: Kumpulan Piawaian Percuma (FSG) akan mengumumkan Pangkalan Piawaian Linux (LSB) 3.1 pada hari Selasa di Persidangan Desktop Linux di San Diego.

src: The first distribution to include LSB 3.1 support, Xandros, is expected to be released on May 1, followed shortly by versions by Red Hat, Novell, and others.
ref: Pengagihan pertama untuk memasukkan sokongan LSB 3.1, Xandros, dijangka akan dikeluarkan pada 1 Mei, diikuti tidak lama dengan versi oleh Red Hat, Novell, dan lain-lain.

src: The status of Ubuntu's upcoming version is still unclear .
ref: Status versi akan datang Ubuntu masih tidak jelas.

src: The standards aim to resolve difficulties that programmers face in developing software for Linux.
ref: Piawaian-piawaian itu bertujuan untuk menyelesaikan masalah yang dihadapi oleh pengaturcara dalam membangunkan perisian untuk Linux.

src: Because Linux, developed by Finnish programmer Linus Torvalds, defines the kernel or core of the operating system, there is a wide variety of graphical interfaces for it and differing software libraries.
ref: Oleh kerana Linux, dibangunkan oleh pengaturcara Finland Linus Torvalds, mentakrifkan kernel atau teras sistem operasi, terdapat pelbagai jenis antara muka grafik untuk itu dan perpustakaan perisian yang berbeza.

src: LSB 3.1 standardizes core pieces of Linux to make development easier.
ref: LSB 3.1 mempiawaikan keping teras Linux untuk menjadikan pembangunan lebih mudah.

src: "One of the big things that's difficult is consistency, and that's Windows' biggest strength," Jim Zemlin, executive director of the Free Standards Group, told the Associated Press.
ref: "Salah satu perkara besar yang sukar adalah ketekalan, dan itu adalah kekuatan terbesar Windows," Jim Zemlin, Pengarah Eksekutif Kumpulan Piawaian Percuma, memberitahu Akhbar Kesatuan.

src: "If you buy a Windows program, you know it will run on a Windows computer, and Linux needs to work the same way.
ref: "Jika anda membeli program Windows, anda tahu ia akan berjalan dalam komputer Windows dan Linux perlu berfungsi dengan cara yang sama.

src: If you really want to become a broadly adopted and used technology, you have to have that degree of standardization," he said.
ref: Jika anda benar-benar mahu menjadi teknologi yang meluas diterima pakai dan digunakan, anda perlu mempunyai tahap piawaian yang tertentu," katanya.

src: A collaboratively-developed operating system kernel known as GNU Hurd has been made bootable using the L4 microkernel, which provides room for significant speed improvements over an existing implementation using the Mach microkernel.
ref: Kernel sistem operasi yang dimajukan secara kolaboratif yang dikenali sebagai GNU Hurd telah boleh dibootkan menggunakan mikrokernel L4, di mana menyediakan ruang untuk peningkatan kelajuan besar ke atas pelaksanaan sedia ada menggunakan mikrokernel Mach.

src: The newer architecture also has a more lively developer community.
ref: Seni bina yang lebih baru juga mempunyai komuniti pemaju yang lebih meriah.

src: Developer Marcus Brinkmann made the historic step and finished the process initialization code, which enabled him to execute the first software on Hurd-L4.
ref: Pemaju Marcus Brinkmann membuat langkah bersejarah dan menyelesaikan kod pengawalan proses, yang membolehkan beliau untuk melaksanakan perisian yang pertama pada Hurd-L4.

src: In a message to the L4 port of GNU Hurd mailing list, Brinkmann wrote, "We can now easily explore and develop the system in any way we want."
ref: Dalam mesej ke port L4 daripada senarai mel GNU Hurd, Brinkmann menulis, "Kami kini boleh dengan mudah meneroka dan membangunkan sistem dalam apa jua cara yang kita mahu."

src: "With my glibc port, I can already build simple applications, but most won't run because they need a filesystem or other gimmicks (like, uhm, fork and exec), and I only have stubs (dummy functions which always return an error) for that now," he added in a later posting.
ref: "Dengan port glibc saya, saya sudah boleh membina aplikasi mudah, tetapi kebanyakannya tidak akan berjalan kerana mereka memerlukan sistem fail atau gimik lain (like, uhm, fork dan exec), dan saya hanya mempunyai stubs (fungsi dummy yang sentiasa mengembalikan ralat) untuk sekarang," katanya dalam satu catatan kemudian.

src: Compared with Linux and BSD Unix's monolithic kernel architecture, a microkernel based operating system provides developers greater modularity and isolation from hardware, a big win with L4 already being available for a large number of hardware varieties.
ref: Berbanding dengan seni bina kernel monolitik Linux dan BSD Unix, sebuah sistem operasi berasaskan mikrokernel menyediakan pemaju suai yang lebih besar dan berasingan daripada perkakasan, kemenangan besar dengan L4 sudah sedia untuk sejumlah besar jenis perkakasan.

src: There is a cost in speed for such abstraction, and this cost was higher on Mach, at around 15%, compared with only around 5% on L4 and it's predecessor L3, both developed by Dr. Jochen Liedtke.
ref: Terdapat kos dalam kelajuan untuk abstraksi itu, dan kos ini adalah lebih tinggi pada Mach, pada kira-kira 15%, berbanding hanya sekitar 5% ke atas L4 dan yang terdahulu L3, kedua-duanya dibangunkan oleh Dr. Jochen Liedtke.

src: The greater modularity and abstraction of a microkernel approach means that the microkernel itself does not need constant modification as is seen in the Linux kernel today, since it provides only the very minimum of services, and does so very carefully.
ref: Suai dan abstraksi yang lebih besar daripada pendekatan mikrokernel bermakna mikrokernel itu sendiri tidak memerlukan pengubahsuaian yang berterusan seperti yang dilihat dalam kernel Linux hari ini, kerana ia menyediakan hanya sangat minimum perkhidmatan, dan berbuat demikian dengan berhati-hati.

src: However, the Mach kernel first developed ten years earlier at Carnegie Mellon University is seen as a flawed first implementation, with the lessons learned being implemented in microkernels like L4, known as second-generation microkernels.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kernel Mach mula dibangunkan sepuluh tahun lebih awal di Carnegie Mellon University dilihat sebagai pelaksanaan pertama cacat, dengan pengajaran diperoleh sedang dilaksanakan di microkernels seperti L4, yang dikenali sebagai microkernels generasi kedua.

src: The GNU Hurd forms the base of the GNU operating system, much of which has been widely adopted by users of other Unix-like operating systems, including Linux.
ref: GNU Hurd membentuk asas sistem operasi GNU, banyak yang telah digunakan secara meluas oleh pengguna-pengguna sistem operasi lain seperti Unix, termasuk Linux.

src: The GNU Project has been developing the Hurd since 1983.
ref: Projek GNU telah membangunkan Hurd sejak 1983.

src: In 1990, the GNU Project decided to use the Mach kernel, rather than writing their own.
ref: Pada tahun 1990, Projek GNU memutuskan untuk menggunakan kernel Mach, bukannya menulis mereka sendiri.

src: The Hurd is released as free software under the GNU General Public License (GPL).
ref: The Hurd dikeluarkan sebagai perisian percuma di bawah GNU General Public License (GPL).

src: The Hurd kernel is an experiment which aims to surpass existing Unix kernels in functionality, security, and stability, while remaining largely compatible with them.
ref: Kernel Hurd adalah satu eksperimen yang bertujuan untuk mengatasi kernel Unix yang sedia ada dalam fungsi, sekuriti, dan kestabilan, manakala baki sebahagian besarnya serasi dengan mereka.

src: According to the GNU Hurd project, "The Hurd should, and probably will, be ported to other hardware architectures or other microkernels in the future" .
ref: Menurut projek GNU Hurd, "Hurd perlu, dan mungkin akan, dialihkan kepada seni bina perkakasan lain atau mikrokernel-mikrokernel lain pada masa akan datang."

src: A limited port of Linux already runs on L4, known as L4Linux.
ref: Sebuah port terhad Linux sudah berjalan pada L4, yang dikenali sebagai L4Linux.

src: A raid involving 50 members of the Swedish National Criminal Police has taken the servers of The Pirate Bay and Piratbyrån (the Pirate Bureau) — a Swedish lobby organisation that originally developed The Pirate Bay — into custody.
ref: Serbuan melibatkan 50 anggota Negara Polis Jenayah Sweden telah mengambil pelayan The Pirate Bay dan Piratbyrån (Biro Pirate) - sebuah pertubuhan lobi Sweden yang asalnya dibangunkan The Pirate Bay - ke dalam tahanan.

src: The search warrant was given on grounds of alleged copyright violation and assisting copyright violation.
ref: Waran geledah itu diberikan atas alasan pelanggaran hak cipta yang didakwa dan membantu pelanggaran hak cipta.

src: This move comes as a bit of a surprise, as the legality of the site has been under public debate for over three years, with the operators frequently issuing public press releases.
ref: Langkah ini datang sebagai sedikit kejutan, kerana kesahihan laman telah berada di bawah perbahasan awam selama lebih tiga tahun, dengan pengendali kerap mengeluarkan kenyataan akhbar awam.

src: WiredFire, in an interview with Rickard Falkvinge, head of the Swedish Pirate Party, is reporting that police arrested three staff members, ultimately taking only two into custody.
ref: WiredFire, dalam temu bual dengan Rickard Falkvinge, ketua Pirate Parti Sweden, melaporkan bahawa polis menahan tiga kakitangan, akhirnya mengambil hanya dua ke dalam tahanan.

src: The Associated Press, however, is reporting that Ulf Goranzon, a police spokesman, is claiming that none were arrested, they were just under suspicion of violating copyright law.
ref: Associated Press, bagaimanapun, melaporkan bahawa Ulf Goranzon, jurucakap polis, mendakwa bahawa tidak ditahan, mereka hanya di bawah disyaki melanggar undang-undang hak cipta.

src: The site operators speculate that the police wish to test the legality of the operation.
ref: Pengendali laman web spekulasi bahawa polis ingin menguji kesahihan operasi.

src: Purportedly, this move comes due to political pressure exerted by United States media corporations.
ref: Kononnya, langkah ini datang kerana tekanan politik yang dikenakan oleh Amerika Syarikat media syarikat.

src: However, The Pirate Bay claimed that as they only host .torrent files and not copyrighted material, they are not in contravention of copyright laws.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, The Pirate Bay mendakwa kerana mereka hanya menjadi tuan rumah fail Torrent dan bahan tidak dilindungi hak cipta, mereka tidak melanggar undang-undang hak cipta.

src: The Pirate Bay also served as a distribution point for freely licensed material such as some Linux distributions and independent music and film.
ref: Pirate Bay juga berkhidmat sebagai titik pengedaran bahan bebas berlesen itu kerana beberapa edaran Linux dan muzik bebas dan filem.

src: The Pirate Bay claims to be the world's largest BitTorrent tracker.
ref: The Pirate Bay mendakwa menjadi BitTorrent tracker terbesar di dunia.

src: In the raid, the police also took several private servers unconnected to The Pirate Bay.
ref: Dalam serbuan itu, polis juga mengambil beberapa pelayan peribadi yang tidak berkaitan dengan The Pirate Bay.

src: Some have claimed that there is no legal basis for these seizures.
ref: Ada yang mendakwa bahawa tidak ada asas undang-undang untuk penangkapan ini.

src: Initially, there were also rumors that this could be another stunt by The Pirate Bay to promote awareness.
ref: Pada mulanya, ada juga khabar angin bahawa ini boleh menjadi satu lagi aksi gimik oleh The Pirate Bay untuk menggalakkan kesedaran.

src: This possibility, however, has been already dismissed and only had some credibility given the fact that approximately one year ago today they claimed something similar like this, but instead were simply updating their servers.
ref: Kemungkinan ini, bagaimanapun, telah pun ditolak dan hanya mempunyai kredibiliti memandangkan hakikat bahawa kira-kira satu tahun yang lalu hari ini mereka mendakwa sesuatu yang serupa seperti ini, tetapi sebaliknya semata-mata mengemaskini pelayan mereka.

src: At current there are already some publications made available by officials confirming the authenticity of the raid.
ref: Pada semasa sudah ada beberapa penerbitan yang disediakan oleh pegawai-pegawai yang mengesahkan kesahihan serbuan itu.

src: On June the 1st The Pirate Bay site changed its "Site down" note to "Site down - will be up and fully functional within a day or two".
ref: Pada Jun 1 Tapak Pirate Bay berubah "Laman Tutup" yang ambil perhatian kepada "Laman tutp - akan sehingga dan berfungsi sepenuhnya dalam masa satu atau dua hari".

src: The day after the raid, Mr. Svartholm is trying to limit the damage for PRQ's other customers that also had their servers confiscated, even if they didn't have any connections to The Pirate Bay.
ref: Sehari selepas serbuan itu, Encik Svartholm cuba untuk menghadkan kerosakan untuk pelanggan PRQ lain yang juga mempunyai pelayan mereka dirampas, walaupun mereka tidak mempunyai apa-apa sambungan ke The Pirate Bay.

src: The Australian Democrats deputy leader, Senator Andrew Bartlett moved in the Australian Senate a bill to amend the Marriage Act to provide for same-sex marriages.
ref: Timbalan pemimpin Demokrat Australia, Senator Andrew Bartlett memperkenalkan kepada Senat Australia satu rang undang-undang untuk meminda Akta Perkahwinan supaya membenarkan perkahwinan sama jantina.

src: Senator Bartlett's second reading speech which was incorporated into the Hansard described that the bill "reverses the Marriage Amendment Act 2004...which...changed the definition to that of a union between one man and one woman only", and refuted arguments against same-sex marriage proposed by some conservative Government senators.
ref: Ucapan kedua bacaan Senator Bartlett yang telah dimasukkan ke dalam penyata rasmi parlimen menerang bahawa rang undang-undang tersebut "menterbalikkan Akta Pindaan Perkahwinan 2004...yakni...mengubah definisinya kepada kesatuan di antara seorang lelaki dan seorang wanita sahaja," dan menafikan hujah terhadap perkahwinan sama jantina yang dicadangkan oleh beberapa senator konservatif Kerajaan.

src: Bartlett continued to say that "We do not want to send the message that discrimination is acceptable in Australia" to our children, or to other nations."
ref: Bartlett meneruskan dengan berkata bahawa "Kami tidak mahu menghantar mesej bahawa diskriminasi boleh diterima di Australia" kepada anak-anak kita, atau negara-negara lain."

src: In an interview on June 8, Prime Minister John Howard said, "I don’t see it in any way as discriminating against homosexuals."
ref: Dalam satu temu bual pada 8 Jun, Perdana Menteri John Howard berkata, "Saya tidak melihat ia dalam apa-apa cara yang mengamalkan diskriminasi terhadap golongan homoseksual."

src: Debate on the bill will occur at a later date.
ref: Perbahasan rang undang-undang akan dijadualkan pada masa akan datang.

src: A bill proposed later in the sitting day by the Australian Greens to stop the Governor-General disallowing ACT state law establishing civil unions failed, by a majority of two votes.
ref: Satu rang undang-undang yang dicadangkan kemudiannya pada hari persidangan oleh Parti Greens Australia untuk menghentikan Gabenor Jeneral dari mengharamkan AKTA undang-undang negeri mewujudkan kesatuan awam telah gagal, dengan majoriti dua undi.

src: New Zealand Prime Minister Helen Clark has accused Japan of creating a rift between Pacific Countries.
ref: Perdana Menteri New Zealand Helen Clark telah menuduh Jepun bekenaan pembentukan jurang antara negara-negara Pasifik.

src: She accuses Japan of influencing the voting of some member nations of the Pacific Island Forum at the International Whaling Commission by supplying vast amounts of aid to certain small pacific nations.
ref: Dia menuduh Jepun mempengaruhi pengundian sebahagian ahli Forum Negara Kepulauan Pasifik di Suruhanjaya Pemburuan Ikan Paus Antarabangsa dengan membekalkan sejumlah besar bantuan kepada sesetengah negara-negara pasifik yang kecil.

src: New Zealand provides a total of $23 million a year in aid to three of the six Pacific nations – Kiribati, the Solomons, and Tuvalu.
ref: New Zealand menyediakan sejumlah $23 juta setahun dalam bantuan kepada tiga daripada enam negara-negara Pasifik - Kiribati, Solomon dan Tuvalu.

src: Japan pledged approximately 45 billion yen (NZ $633 million) in aid for all Pacific nations.
ref: Jepun berjanji kira-kira 45 bilion yen (NZ $633 juta) dalam bantuan untuk semua negara Pasifik.

src: New Zealand's annual budget for aiding pacific nations on the other hand totals merely NZ $173 million.
ref: Bajet tahunan New Zealand untuk membantu negara-negara Pasifik pula berjumlah hanya NZ $173 juta.

src: Miss Clark is quoted as saying "One would hope that over time Japan might reflect on the damage this is doing to [its] relationships around the world" and that it "sprayed a lot of money around" to garner support.
ref: Clark memetik sebagai berkata "Seseorang akan berharap dengan masa berlalu Jepun mungkin memikirkan kesan buruk yang dilakukan ke atas hubungan [dirinya] di seluruh dunia" dan bahawa ia "menyebarkan banyak wang di sekeliling" untuk mendapatkan sokongan.

src: The Prime Minister has ruled out any retaliation against the islands, saying it would not affect any future aid funding.
ref: Perdana Menteri itu telah menolak sebarang tindak balas terhadap pulau-pulau tersebut, berkata ia tidak akan menjejaskan apa-apa pembiayaan bantuan masa depan.

src: Nine months after announcing the interoperability between their instant messaging (IM) services, Internet rivals Microsoft and Yahoo!
ref: Sembilan bulan selepas mengumumkan saling kendali antara perkhidmatan mesej segera (IM), saingan Internet Microsoft dan Yahoo!

src: began limited public beta (pre-release) testing of the program.
ref: memulakan ujian terhad beta awam (pra keluaran) program itu.

src: This enables users of the two services to communicate with each other using their existing IM client, Microsoft's Windows Live Messenger (formerly MSN Messenger) and Yahoo!
ref: Ini membolehkan pengguna dua perkhidmatan itu untuk berkomunikasi antara satu sama lain menggunakan klien IM mereka yang tersedia ada, Microsoft Windows Live Messenger (dahulu MSN Messenger) dan Yahoo!

src: Messenger with Voice.
ref: Messenger dengan suara.

src: Users wishing to use the new feature can go to a special page on the service's website, where they have to review and accept an agreement.
ref: Pengguna yang ingin menggunakan ciri-ciri baru boleh pergi ke laman khas di laman web perkhidmatan, di mana mereka perlu menyemak dan menerima satu perjanjian.

src: After signing out and signing in again, the interoperability is enabled without downloading any new software.
ref: Selepas mendaftar keluar dan mendaftar masuk semula, saling kendali ini diaktifkan tanpa memuat turun apa-apa perisian baru.

src: The service is designed to allow users to see each others' online presence, view personal status messages, share select emoticons, view offline messages and add new contacts from either service.
ref: Perkhidmatan ini direka bentuk untuk membolehkan pengguna untuk melihat kehadiran dalam talian antara satu sama lain, melihat mesej status peribadi, berkongsi emotikon terpilih, melihat mesej di luar talian dan menambah kenalan baru dari salah satu perkhidmatan.

src: However, more advanced features, like voice calls and shared folders are not interoperable between the two services.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, ciri-ciri yang lebih maju, seperti panggilan suara dan folder dikongsi tidak saling kendali antara kedua-dua perkhidmatan.

src: The program is available internationally in more than 15 markets.
ref: Program ini boleh didapati di peringkat antarabangsa di lebih daripada 15 pasaran.

src: PepsiCo Inc. is in line to get its first female chief executive before the end of the year.
ref: PepsiCo Inc. sedang bersiap sedia untuk menerima pegawai eksekutif wanita pertama sebelum akhir tahun ini.

src: Steven S. Reinemund, chairman and CEO of the U.S. soft drink and snack food giant, announced his retirement via press release effective in May, 2007.
ref: Steven S. Reinemund, pengerusi dan CEO syarikat minuman dan makanan ringan raksasa U.S. tersebut, telah mengumumkan persaraannya melalui siaran akhbar berkuat kuasa pada bulan Mei, 2007.

src: Reinemund, 58, said he was leaving to spend more time with his family.
ref: Reinemund, 58, berkata dia bersara untuk mengisi waktu dengan keluarganya.

src: The same PepsiCo release confirmed that Indra Nooyi, currently president and CFO, will take over for Reinemund.
ref: Siaran akhbar PepsiCo yang sama juga mengesahkan bahawa Indra Nooyi, presiden dan CFO semasa akan mengambil alih tempat Reinemund.

src: The first is scheduled to be filled by Richard Goodman, 57, currently CFO of PepsiCo International, who will become CFO.
ref: Awalnya ia dijadualkan akan diambil alih oleh Richard Goodman, 57, CFO semasa bagi PepsiCo International, yang akan menjadi CFO.

src: Hugh Johnston, 44, currently senior vice president of transformation, was promoted to the newly created post of executive vice president of operations, procurement and information technology.
ref: Hugh Johnston, 44, yang merupakan naib presiden kanan transformasi, telah dinaikkan pangkat ke jawatan baru naib presiden eksekutif operasi, pemerolehan dan teknologi maklumat.

src: Nooyi, 50, is a Yale-educated daughter of a middle class Indian family, according to her official biography.
ref: Nooyi, 50, adalah siswazah Yale dan anak perempuan dari keluarga India kelas pertengahan, menurut biografi rasminya.

src: She is scheduled to succeed Reinemund, in October, the company said.
ref: Beliau dijadualkan mengambil alih tempat Reinemund, pada bulan Oktober, syarikat tersebut berkata.

src: Together, Nooyi and Reinemund have guided PepsiCo through several large take-overs and has seen the company overtake The Coca-Cola Company both in terms of sales and market value.
ref: Bersama-sama, Nooyi dan Reinemund telah memimpin PepsiCo melalui beberapa pengambilalihan yang besar dan telah melihat syarikat tersebut mengatasi The Coca-Cola Company dari segi jualan dan nilai pasaran.

src: Coca-Cola is still the No.
ref: Coca-Cola masih menjadi pengeluar minuman ringan No.

src: 1 soft drink maker based on U.S. and global market share.
ref: 1 berdasarkan bahagian pasaran U.S. dan antarabangsa.

src: A significant portion of PepsiCo's sales revenue comes from non-drink brands in its Frito-Lay and Quaker Oats product lines.
ref: Sebahagian besar pendapatan jualan PepsiCo datang dari jenama bukan minuman di dalam barisan produk Frito-Lay dan Quaker Oats.

src: Some on Wall Street were surprised by Reinemund's retirement announcement, according to news reports.
ref: Beberapa pihak di Wall Street terperanjat dengan pengumuman persaraan Reinemund, menurut laporan akhbar.

src: Monday, the stock (ticker:PEP) closed up $0.62 at $63.95 per share on the NYSE.
ref: Hari Isnin, saham tersebut (ticker:PEP) ditutup setinggi $0.62 pada harga $63.95 per saham di NYSE.

src: The UN Security Council will "mostly likely" adopt a non-binding statement later today on North Korea's announcement of planned nuclear bomb tests; the statement does not explicitly mention the threat of sanctions.
ref: Majlis Keselamatan PBB akan "berkemungkinan besar" menerima pakai kenyataan tidak terikat lewat hari ini mengenai pengumuman Korea Utara untuk ujian bom nuklear yang dirancang; kenyataan itu tidak menyebut dengan jelas tentang ancaman sekatan.

src: This was announced by the Security Council president late yesterday.
ref: Ia telah diumumkan oleh Presiden Majlis Keselamatan lewat semalam.

src: Japan's UN envoy Kenzo Oshima, who chairs the 15-member body this month, said council experts made "good progress" in efforts to fine tune a Japanese draft, but said they had yet to finalize it.
ref: Duta PBB Jepun Kenzo Oshima, yang mempengerusikan badan 15 anggota bulan ini, kata pakar-pakar majlis membuat "kemajuan yang baik" dalam usaha untuk mengemaskinikan draf Jepun, tetapi mereka berkata masih belum memuktamadkan ia.

src: "Most likely we will have something adopted (Friday)" once council members consult their respective capitals for "final clearance," he added.
ref: "Kemungkinan besar kita akan mempunyai sesuatu yang diterima (Jumaat)" selepas ahli-ahli majlis berunding dengan ibu negara masing-masing untuk "pelepasan akhir," tambahnya.

src: Earlier on Thursday, Japan and the United States pushed for a threat to resort to mandatory sanctions under Chapter VII of the UN Charter.
ref: Pada Khamis lalu, Jepun dan Amerika Syarikat mendorong ancaman mengambil tindakan sekatan mandatori di bawah Bab VII Piagam PBB.

src: China and Russia (two veto members of the Council) however, voted against the sanctions.
ref: China dan Rusia (dua anggota veto Majlis) bagaimanapun, mengundi menentang sekatan tersebut.

src: It is hoped that the latest text will urge Pyongyang to abandon its nuclear tests and return back to six-party talks "without precondition".
ref: Adalah diharapkan bahawa teks terkini akan menggesa Pyongyang untuk menghentikan ujian nuklearnya dan kembali semula kepada rundingan enam pihak "tanpa pra-syarat".

src: North Korea had earlier boycotted the talks in response to a sanction placed by the US on one of its banks, believed to linked to the regime of Kim Jong-Il.
ref: Korea Utara sebelum ini telah memulaukan rundingan sebagai tindak balas kepada sekatan yang diletakkan oleh Amerika Syarikat pada salah satu daripada bank-banknya, yang dipercayai mempunyai kaitan dengan rejim Kim Jong-Il.

src: North Korea claims it has nuclear weapons, although this has not yet been independently verified.
ref: Korea Utara mendakwa ia mempunyai senjata nuklear, walaupun ini belum lagi disahkan oleh badan bebas.

src: At least 30 explosions have gone off inside the "Green Zone" in Baghdad, Iraq where the United States Embassy is located and where many Iraqi Government buildings are housed.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 30 letupan telah meletup di dalam "Zon Hijau" di Baghdad, Iraq di mana terletaknya Kedutaan Amerika Syarikat dan di mana banyak bangunan Kerajaan Iraq berada.

src: Iraqi military officials said no evacuations of residents were ordered from the Dora area.
ref: Pegawai tentera Iraq berkata tiada pemindahan penduduk dari kawasan Dora telah diarahkan.

src: The explosions are believed to be the result of a fire which broke out inside the Forward Operating Base Falcon, a U.S. ammunitions depot inside the zone, but it is not known if the fire was started due to an attack.
ref: Letupan dipercayai hasil daripada kebakaran yang berlaku di dalam Forward Operating Base Falcon, depot peluru A.S. di dalam zon itu, tetapi ia tidak diketahui sama ada kebakaran itu disebabkan oleh serangan.

src: It's in our operating base in the Rasheed area of the city.
ref: Ia berada di dalam kubu operasi kami di kawasan Rasheed di bandar ini.

src: "The ammunition holding area contains tank and artillery rounds as well as small arms ammunition," said Lieutenant Colonel of the 4th Infantry Division, Jonathan Withington.
ref: "Kawasan simpanan peluru mengandungi peluru untuk kereta kebal dan meriam peluru serta senjata kecil," kata Leftenan Kolonel Divisyen Infantri ke-4, Jonathan Withington.

src: "[We are] trying to determine the cause or any threat to the population," said U.S. military spokesman, Lt. Col, Christopher C. Garver.
ref: "[Kami cuba] untuk menentukan punca atau apa-apa ancaman kepada penduduk," kata jurucakap tentera A.S., Leftenan Kolonel, Christopher C. Garver.

src: Reports say that flares and helicopters could be seen coming from and into the zone.
ref: Laporan mengatakan bahawa nyalaan dan helikopter boleh dilihat datang dari dan ke dalam zon.

src: So far, there are no reports of any deaths or injuries.
ref: Setakat ini, tiada laporan mengenai sebarang kematian atau kecederaan.

src: On November 13, Torontonians will be heading to the polls to vote for their ward's councillor and for mayor.
ref: Pada 13 November, penduduk Toronto akan menuju ke pilihan raya untuk mengundi ahli dewan undangan negeri dan datuk bandar kawasan mereka.

src: This ward's candidates include John Blair, Robertson Boyle, Tony Dickins, Cliff Jenkins (incumbent), and Peter Kapsalis.
ref: Calon kawasan ini termasuk John Blair, Robertson Boyle, Tony Dickins, Cliff Jenkins (penyandang), dan Peter Kapsalis.

src: For more information on the election, read Toronto municipal election, 2006.
ref: Untuk maklumat lanjut mengenai pilihan raya tersebut, baca pilihanraya bandaraya Toronto, 2006.

src: An investigation by KPMG into contracts by Liverpool City Council produced 43 recommendations, relating to council joint ventures Liverpool Direct with British Telecom and Liverpool Enterprise with Enterprise plc.
ref: Satu siasatan oleh KPMG mengenai kontrak-kontrak Majlis Bandaraya Liverpool menghasilkan 43 cadangan, yang berkaitan dengan majlis usaha bersama Liverpool Direct dengan Telekom British dan Perusahaan Liverpool dengan Perusahaan plc.

src: The recommendations include reducing the informal contact between Council staff and those of the contractors, limits on the time between members of staff leaving the council and joining the contractors.
ref: Cadangan-cadangan itu termasuk pengurangan hubungan tidak rasmi antara kakitangan Majlis dan kontraktor-kontraktor, had masa antara kakitangan yang meninggalkan majlis itu dan menyertai kontraktor-kontraktor.

src: Former Major League Baseball pitcher and coach Pat Dobson died of leukemia Wednesday, November 22.
ref: Bekas pembaling Liga Utama Besbol dan jurulatih Pat Dobson meninggal dunia akibat leukemia pada Rabu, 22 November.

src: He died at age 64 at a local San Diego hospital only a day after being diagnosed with the disease.
ref: Beliau meninggal dunia pada usia 64 tahun di sebuah hospital tempatan San Diego hanya sehari selepas disahkan menghidap penyakit ini.

src: Dobson is best known for winning 20 games in the 1971 season for the Baltimore Orioles.
ref: Dobson terkenal kerana memenangi 20 perlawanan pada musim 1971 untuk Baltimore Orioles.

src: Dobson finished his 11 year career with a career win-loss record of 122-129 and with a 3.54 ERA in eleven seasons.
ref: Dobson menamatkan kerjaya 11 tahun dengan rekod kerjaya menang-kalah pada 122-129 dan dengan 3.54 ERA dalam sebelas musim.

src: Dobson later became a pitching coach for several teams, last appearing for the Orioles in 1996.
ref: Dobson kemudiannya menjadi jurulatih pembaling untuk beberapa pasukan, membuat kemunculan akhir untuk Orioles pada tahun 1996.

src: At his death he was a special assistant to San Francisco Giants general manager Brian Sabean, where he worked the past nine years.
ref: Sehingga kematiannya, beliau merupakan seorang pembantu khas kepada pengurus besar San Francisco Giants Brian Sabean, di mana dia bekerja sejak sembilan tahun yang lalu.

src: The Emir of Qatar, Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa al-Thani, has become the first Arab leader to visit the Gaza Strip since its occupation by Israel in 1967.
ref: Emir Qatar, Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa al-Thani, telah menjadi pemimpin Arab pertama yang melawat Semenanjung Gaza sejak pendudukan oleh Israel pada tahun 1967.

src: He entered the strip by car from Egypt, to an enthusiastic welcome by Gazans.
ref: Beliau memasuki semenanjung dengan kereta dari Mesir, kepada sambutan meriah oleh penduduk Gaza.

src: Much of the strip's infrastructure was destroyed by Israeli bombing in 2008.
ref: Sebahagian besar prasarana semenanjung itu telah dimusnahkan oleh pengeboman Israel pada tahun 2008.

src: The Emir of Qatar called for unity of the various Palestinian groups.
ref: Emir Qatar menggesa perpaduan pelbagai kumpulan Palestin.

src: Speaking at Gaza's Islamic University, he asked, "Why are you staying divided?"
ref: Bercakap di Universiti Islam Gaza, dia bertanya, "Mengapa kamu tinggal berpecah-belah?"

src: "There are no peace negotiations, and there is no clear strategy of resistance and liberation."
ref: "Tiada rundingan damai, dan tidak ada strategi yang jelas tentang rintangan dan pembebasan."

src: Hamas Prime Minister Ismail Haniya said the visit demonstrated Gaza is "not alone" and broke Israel's blockade of Gaza.
ref: Perdana Menteri Hamas Ismail Haniya berkata lawatan itu menunjukkan Gaza adalah "tidak bersendirian" dan memecahkan sekatan Israel di Gaza.

src: Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas contacted the emir directly to point out the international community recognizes Mr Abbas as the Palestinian leader.
ref: Presiden Palestin Mahmoud Abbas berhubung terus dengan Emir tersebut untuk menunjukkan masyarakat antarabangsa mengiktiraf Abbas sebagai pemimpin Palestin.

src: Spokesman Yigal Palmor for Israel's Foreign Ministry said, "This is more than strange, especially since Hamas is internationally recognized as a terror group."
ref: Jurucakap untuk Kementerian Luar Israel, Yigal Palmor berkata, "Ini adalah lebih daripada aneh, terutama sejak Hamas dikenali di peringkat antarabangsa sebagai kumpulan pengganas."

src: "By hugging Hamas publicly, the emir of Qatar has thrown peace under the bus."
ref: "Dengan memeluk Hamas secara awam, Emir Qatar telah mengorbankan sekutunya untuk kepentingan diri sendiri."

src: The emir founded the Al Jazeera international television news network.
ref: Emir tersebut mengasaskan rangkaian berita televisyen antarabangsa Al Jazeera.

src: The country also maintains contacts in Islamic politics and scholarship.
ref: Negara itu juga mengekalkan hubungan dalam politik Islam dan pegangan.

src: Qatar has the highest GDP per capita in the world at $88,000.
ref: Qatar mempunyai tahap KDNK per kapita tertinggi di dunia pada $88,000.

src: On December 22, 2006 Microsoft has announced that it has extended its warranty for all Xbox 360 video game consoles to one year in the United States.
ref: Pada 22 Disember 2006, Microsoft telah mengumumkan yang ia telah melanjutkan jaminan kepada semua konsol permainan video Xbox 360 kepada satu tahun di Amerika Syarikat.

src: While this one year warranty applies to all Xbox 360 software as well, Xbox 360 accessories will still carry their original 90 day warranty.
ref: Sementara jaminan satu tahun ini juga terpakai kepada semua perisian Xbox 360, aksesori Xbox 360 masih membawa jaminan asal 90 hari mereka.

src: "Customers that experience hardware issues with their Xbox 360 within one year of purchase will have their consoles repaired at no cost."
ref: "Pelanggan yang mengalami isu dengan perkakasan Xbox 360 mereka dalam setahun pembelian akan memperolehi konsol mereka diperbaiki tanpa sebarang bayaran".

src: "Moreover, the new warranty policy is retroactive, so consumers that may have already paid for out-of-warranty Xbox 360 repair within one year of the console's purchase will be eligible for reimbursement of their console repair charges."
ref: "Tambahan, polisi jaminan baru ini adalah retroaktif, jadi pelanggan yang mungkin telah membayar diluar jaminan pembaikan Xbox 360 dalam tempoh satu tahun dari pembelian konsol akan layak untuk pembayaran balik cas pembaikan konsol mereka".

src: This extension should help ease customers' minds who have been concerned with the Xbox 360's reputation for hardware failures.
ref: Lanjutan ini akan dapat menenangkan minda pelanggan yang telah dirisaukan dengan reputasi kegagalan perkakasan Xbox 360. Sebahagian senarai isu kerosakan perkakas boleh ditemui disini: http://en.

src: A partial list of hardware issues can be found here: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xbox_360_technical_problems People who have paid for Xbox 360 repair will be automatically distributed a reimbursement check in about 10 weeks from the present date.
ref: wikipedia.org/wiki/Xbox_360_technical_problems Mereka yang telah membayar untuk memperbaiki Xbox 360 akan diedarkan cek pembayaran balik secara automatik dalam tempoh lebih kurang 10 minggu dari tarikh kini.

src: Previously in September, 2006, Microsoft had waived the cost for repairs on all Xbox 360 consoles made before January 1, 2006, and refunded any fees already paid.
ref: Sebelum ini pada September, 2006, Microsoft telah mengenepikan kos pembaikan semua konsol Xbox 360 yang dibuat sebelum 1 January, 2006, dan membayar balik semua bayaran yang telah dibuat.

src: In what is becoming an annual phenomenon in France, 400 cars were set ablaze during the New Year's night.
ref: Apa yang menjadi phenomena tahunan di France ialah, 400 buah kereta akan dibakar pada malam Tahun Baru.

src: In 2006, an average of 112 cars a day were torched across France.
ref: Pada 2006, purata 112 buah kereta telah dibakar di seluruh France.

src: There were 15 attacks per day on police and emergency services.
ref: Setiap hari terdapat 15 serangan ke atas polis dan servis kecemasan.

src: Almost 3,000 police officers were injured in clashes with residents.
ref: Hampir 3,000 orang pegawai polis cedera dalam pertempuran dengan para penduduk.

src: In four separate ambushes, officers were badly injured in the Paris suburbs since September.
ref: Dalam empat serbuan berasingan, pegawai polis telah cedera teruk di pinggir bandar Paris semenjak September.

src: Police speak of open war with youths who are bent on more than vandalism.
ref: Police menyuarakan peperangan terbuka ke atas remaja yang bertekad untuk melakukan lebih banyak vandalism.

src: Scientists have uncovered the largest Neolithic settlement in the United Kingdom at the Durrington Walls and believe that the village was inhabited by the people who built the Stonehenge monument.
ref: Saintis telah menemui penempatan Neolitik terbesar di United Kingdom di Tembok Durrington dan percaya bahawa kampung ini didiami oleh orang yang membina monumen Stonehenge.

src: Scientists say that the village was built around 2,600 B.C., roughly when Stonehenge was believed to have been constructed, and housed over 100 people.
ref: Saintis mengatakan kampung ini dibina sekitar 2600 SM, secara kasar apabila Stonehenge dipercayai telah dibina, dan didiami lebih daripada 100 orang.

src: Inside the areas which would have been the interior of houses at the time, scientists also found outlines of what they think were beds and cupboards or dressers.
ref: Di dalam kawasan-kawasan yang merupakan bahagian dalam rumah pada masa itu, saintis juga mendapati garis bentuk yang mereka fikir adalah katil dan almari atau almari laci bercermin.

src: Animal bones, arrowheads, stone tools and other relics were also discovered.
ref: Tulang haiwan, kepala anak panah, alat batu dan peninggalan lain juga telah ditemui.

src: "We've never seen such quantities of pottery and animal bone and flint.
ref: "Kami tidak pernah lihat tembikar dan tulang haiwan dan batu api dengan kuantiti yang begitu besar.

src: In what were houses, we have excavated the outlines on the floors of box beds and wooden dressers or cupboards," said Sheffield University archaeologist, Mike Parker Pearson.
ref: Dalam apa yang dikatakan rumah, kami telah menggali garis bentuk di tingkat-tingkat katil dan almari laci bercermin kotak kayu atau almari," kata ahli arkeologi Universiti Sheffield, Mike Parker Pearson.

src: So far, the dig has revealed at least 8 houses roughly 14-16 feet square, but scientists say that they think there may have been at least 25 altogether.
ref: Setakat ini, penggalian itu telah mendedahkan sekurang-kurangnya 8 buah rumah kira-kira 14-16 kaki persegi, tetapi saintis mengatakan bahawa mereka fikir mungkin sekurang-kurangnya terdapat 25 rumah semua sekali.

src: The site was likely to have been occupied only seasonally rather than year-round and evidence suggests that a lot of "partying" went on at the location.
ref: Kawasan itu berkemungkinan telah diduduki hanya secara bermusim dan bukannya sepanjang tahun dan bukti menunjukkan bahawa banyak "pesta" berlaku di lokasi itu.

src: This is where they went to party - you could say it was the first free festival.
ref: Ini adalah di mana mereka pergi berparti - anda boleh mengatakan bahawa ia adalah perayaan percuma yang pertama.

src: There's a lack of craft-working equipment for cleaning animal hides and no evidence for crop-processing," added Pearson.
ref: Terdapat kekurangan peralatan kraf untuk membersihkan kulit haiwan dan tiada bukti untuk pemprosesan hasil tanaman," kata Pearson.

src: The Durrington Walls are approximately 2 miles from the Stonehenge site.
ref: Tembok Durrington berjarak kira-kira 2 batu dari tapak Stonehenge itu.

src: A United States Apache military helicopter has been shot down in Baghdad, Iraq says a military spokesman.
ref: Sebuah helikopter tentera Apache Amerika Syarikat telah ditembak jatuh di Baghdad, Iraq kata jurucakap tentera.

src: Reports say that the chopper went down near the U.S. air base, Taji, located just north of downtown Baghdad.
ref: Laporan mengatakan yang helikopter tersebut jatuh berdekatan pangalan udara U.S., Taji, terletak di utara pusat bandar Baghdad.

src: "I can confirm that we are looking into reports that a helicopter went down north of Baghdad," said Lt. Col. Josslyn Aberle, a spokeswoman for the U.S. military.
ref: "Saya dapat mengesahkan yang kami sedang menyemak laporan sebuah helikopter yang jatuh di utara Baghdad," kata Lt. Kol.

src: At least 2 soldiers were on board the aircraft, but their condition is not known.
ref: Josslyn Aberle, jurucakap tentera A.S. Sekurang-kurangnya 2 orang tentera berada di dalam pesawat tersebut, tetapi keadaan mereka tidak diketahui.

src: Witnesses near the scene and police say that at least 2 Apaches were flying together when insurgents began to shoot at the choppers, shooting one of them down and hitting the other, but the helicopter still managed to fly away.
ref: Saksi berdekatan tempat kejadian dan polis berkata sekurang-kurangnya 2 Apache terbang bersama semasa pemberontak mula menembak pesawat-pesawat tersebut, menembak jatuh salah sebuah helikopter dan mengena satu lagi, tetapi helikopter itu masih dapat terbang meninggalkan tempat itu.

src: The helicopters were believed to have been escorting a U.S. military convoy on the ground when shots were fired.
ref: Helikopter tersebut dipercayai sedang mengiring konvoi tentera A.S. di darat apabila tembakan itu dilepaskan.

src: "The chopper was swinging around before it hit the ground one kilometer away from me and I heard a big explosion," said local farmer, Hashim Assafi who also said that he had to find shelter as shots were fired in the direction of the helicopters.
ref: "Pesawat tersebut berputar sebelum jatuh ke tanah satu kilometer dari saya dan saya mendengar letupan kuat," kata petani tempatan, Hashim Assafi yang juga berkata dia terpaksa mencari perlindungan semasa tembakan dilepaskan ke arah helikopter tersebut.

src: In a statement posted on an Al-Qaeda in Iraq website, insurgents claim responsibility for shooting down the helicopter.
ref: Dalam kenyataan yang disiarkan dalam Al-Qaeda di laman sesawang Iraq, pemberontak mengakui bertanggungjawab dalam menembak jatuh helikopter tersebut.

src: "We say to the enemies of God that the sky of the Islamic state of Iraq is forbidden just like its land," said the statement.
ref: "Kami memberitahu kepada musuh Allah yang langit negara Islam Iraq diharamkan seperti juga tanahnya," kata kenyataan tersebut.

src: This is the fourth helicopter operated by the U.S. military to crash or be shot down in two weeks.
ref: Ini merupakan helikopter keempat dioperrasikan oleh tentera A.S. terhempas atau ditembak jatuh dalam masa dua minggu.

src: Celia Franca, founder of the National Ballet of Canada and its training ground, the National Ballet School of Canada, died at age 85 Monday in Ottawa, Ontario.
ref: Celia Franca, pengasas kepada Balet Negara Kanada dan tapak latihannya, Sekolah Balet Negara Kanada, meninggal diusia 85 Isnin di Ottawa, Ontario.

src: She is reported to have died in an Ottawa Hospital and her cause of death is not known.
ref: Dia dilaporkan telah meninggal di sebuah hospital Ottawa dan punca kematian beliau tidak diketahui.

src: She went to the hospital last week and stayed there until she had died.
ref: Dia pergi ke hospital itu minggu lepas dan duduk disitu sehingga dia meninggal.

src: "She was its presiding spirit, its most stalwart supporter and the embodiment of its ideals and values," said Karen Kain, the National Ballet of Canada's current artistic director.
ref: "Dia ialah semangat pengerusinya, penyokong kuatnya dan merialisasikan idea dan nilainya," kata Karen Kain, pengarah seni Balet Negara Kanada kini.

src: "She inspired generations of dancers by her example and her devotion to the art of ballet."
ref: "Dia menginspirasi penari dari pelbagai generasi dengan contohnya dan pengabdiannya terhadap seni balet".

src: "And most importantly, she made us believe in ourselves and that no goal was ever out of reach."
ref: "Dan paling penting, dia buat kami percaya dalam diri sendiri dan tiada matlamat yang diluar capaian".

src: Franca, born 1921 in London, England, came to Canada in 1951 to found the National Ballet of Canada.
ref: Franca, dilahirkan 1921 di London, England, datang ke Kanada pada 1951 untuk mengasas Balet Negara Kanada.

src: Franca choreographed ballets in Canada such as the famous "Cinderella" and "The Nutcracker."
ref: Franca telah mengkoreografi balet di Kanada seperti "Cinderella" dan "The Nutcracker" yang terkenal.

src: She was artistic director of the National Ballet of Canada for 24 years.
ref: Dia ialah pengarah seni di Balet Negara Kanada untuk 24 tahun.

src: In 1967, Franca was named an officer of the Order of Canada, then named a Companion of the order in 1985.
ref: Pada 1967, Franca dinamakan sebagai pegawai pemerintah Kanada, kemudiannya dinamakan Sahabat pemerintah pada 1985.

src: A rupture in the underground stormwater drain system opened a huge sinkhole on February 23, killing three people and bringing down twelve houses in Guatemala City.
ref: Rekahan di sistem saliran air ribut bawah tanah telah membuka lubang benam yang besar pada 23 Februari, membunuh tiga orang dan meruntuhkan dua belas buah rumah di Bandar Guatemala.

src: Teenagers Irma and David Soyos and their father, 53-year old Domingo Soyos were killed when their house collapsed into the sinkhole.
ref: Irma dan David Soyos, remaja dan bapa mereka, Domingo Soyos, 53 tahun telah terbunuh apabila rumah mereka runtuh ke dalam lubang benam tersebut.

src: Nearly a thousand people were evacuated from the San Antonio neighborhood after the collapse.
ref: Hampir ribuan orang telah dipindahkan dari kejiranan San Antonio selepas runtuhan.

src: Wikinews interviewed Eric Haddox, a civil engineer who has visited the site of the sinkhole and spoken to the engineers working on fixing the drain.
ref: Wikinews menemubual Eric Haddox, jurutera sivil yang telah melawat kawasan lubang benam tersebut dan bercakap kepada jurutera yang bekerja untuk membaiki saliran air.

src: Mr. Haddox, who specialises in the building of earthworks, roads, water supply and sewage systems, and is working as a missionary in Guatemala, visited the site following the collapse to help in the recovery effort.
ref: Mr. Haddox, yang mana pakar dalam pembinaan kerja-kerja tanah, jalan, pembekalan air dan sistem kumbahan, dan bekreja sebagai mubaligh di Guatemala, melawat kawasan yang mengalami runtuhan untuk membantu dalam usaha pemulihan.

src: Mr. Haddox told us that the size of the hole is much smaller than the 330 feet depth originally reported and that the erosion causing the collapse is believed to have happened over a long time, and not just during the recent rains as initially suspected.
ref: Mr. Haddox memberitahu kami bahwa saiz lubang adalah lebih kecil daripada kedalaman 330 kaki yang asalnya dilaporkan dan hakisan penyebab kepada runtuhan adalah dipercayai berlaku sejak satu tempoh masa yang lama, dan tidak hanya semasa hujan baru-baru ini seperti yang disyaki di peringkat awal.

src: There are also concerns that a four-story building less than a metre from the edge of the hole may collapse as the earth under the building continues to be eroded.
ref: Ada juga kebimbangan bahawa bangunan empat tingkat yang terletak kurang satu meter dari pinggir lubang mungkin akan runtuh sekiranya tanah di bawah bangunan itu terus terhakis.

src: The John Lewis Partnership retail group announced massively increased profits this morning, with group sales up 11% on the financial year to £6.4billion ($12.3billion) and pre-tax profits up 27% to £319million ($614.8 million).
ref: Perkongsian John Lewis kumpulan peruncit mengumumkan peningkatan besar pendapatan pagi ini, dengan jualan kumpulan bertambah 11% pada tahun fiskal tersebut kepada £6.4bilion ($12.3bilion) dan keuntungan selepas cukai bertambah 27% kepada £319juta ($614.8 juta).

src: On the back of this, it was announced that the amount of money set aside from profits for the employees of the business would rise 29% to £155million, with each employee receiving 18% of their previous year's salary as a lump sum as part of their March pay package.
ref: Dibelakang ini, diumumkan yang jumlah yang diletakkan tepi untuk keuntungan kepada pekerja bisnes tersebut mungkin meningkat 29% kepada £155 juta, dengan pekerja menerima 18% dari jumlah gaji mereka pada tahun lepas sebagai sebahagian dari pakej pendapatan Mei mereka.

src: The Partnership, as the name implies, is effectively wholly owned by its own employees (termed "partners"), with all partners receiving a share of the profits yearly as a bonus along with various other benefits.
ref: Perkongsian ini, seperti yang namanya cadangkan, berkesan keseluruhannya dimiliki oleh pekerja-pekerjanya (dipanggil "rakan kongsi"), dengan semua rakan kongsi menerima sebahagian dari pendapatan tahunan sebagai bonus serta pelbagai faedah lain.

src: The company owns the John Lewis chain of department stores and the upmarket supermarket chain Waitrose.
ref: Syarikat itu memiliki rantaian gedung serbaneka dan rantaian pasar raya mewah Waitrose.

src: It should not be confused with the Liverpool store Lewis's which has recently gone into receivership.
ref: Ia tidak patut dikelirukan dengan kedai Lewi Liverpool yang baru-baru ini telah melalui pentadbiran muflis.

src: Scientists at NASA say that new satellite images of Saturn's moon Enceladus taken in 2005, has shown that the moon has begun to spew geysers which contain liquid water, and that the internal heat produced by the moon's core may be able to host life below the icy surface, but scientists also stress that life has not yet been found on the moon.
ref: Saintis di NASA berkata bahawa imej baru satelit bulan Zuhal Enceladus yang diambil pada 2005, telah menunjukkan bahawa bulan itu sudah mula memuntahkan pancutan air panas yang dimana mengandungi cecair air, dan haba dalaman yang dihasilkan oleh teras bulan mungkin boleh menampung kehidup di bawah permukaan ais, tetapi saintis juga menekankan bahawa hidupan masih tidak ditemui di bulan.

src: Scientists say that the heat source producing the geysers is "organic" and that the material used to spew them is caused by the decaying of radioactive material from inside the moon.
ref: Saintis berkata bahawa sumber haba menghasilkan pancutan air panas ialah "organik" dan bahan yang digunakan untuk memuntahkannya adalah disebabkan oleh pelupusan bahan radioaktif dari dalam bulan.

src: "Deep inside Enceladus, our model indicates we've got an organic brew, a heat source and liquid water, all key ingredients for life."
ref: "Jauh di dalam Enceladus, model kami menunjukkan kami telah mendapat minuman organik, sumber haba dan cecair air, semua adalah kunci ramuan untuk kehidupan."

src: "And while no one is claiming that we have found life by any means, we probably have evidence for a place that might be hospitable to life," said Dennis Matson, a scientist for the Cassini project.
ref: "Dan sementara masih tiada orang yang mendakwa bahawa kami telah menemui hidupan dengan apa-apa, kami mungkin mempunyai bukti untuk tempat yang mungkun boleh menampung kehidupan," kata Dennis Matson, saintis bagi projek Cassini.

src: In a new model created by NASA scientists, data shows that Enceladus might have been created by aluminum and iron isotopes which have begun to decay causing large amounts of heat to build up in the moon and over billions of years later, the icy mass has began to melt near the moon's core, causing the water to spew into outer space.
ref: Dalam model baru yang dicipta oleh saintis NASA, data menunjukkan bahawa Enceladus mungkin telah dicipta daripada aluminium dan besi isotop yang telah mula lupus menyebabkan jumlah haba yang besar untuk membina bulan dan lebih berbilion tahun kemudian, kepulan ais telah mula mencair berdekatan dengan teras bulan, mungkin menyebabkan air dimuntahkan ke kawasan luar.

src: "Enceladus is a very small body, and it's made almost entirely of ice and rock."
ref: "Enceladus ialah badan yang sangat kecil, and hampir keseluruhannya dibuat oleh ais dan batu."

src: "The puzzle is how the moon developed a warm core."
ref: "Apa yang sukar difahami ialah bagaimana bulan menghasilkan teras yang panan."

src: "The only way to achieve such high temperatures at Enceladus is through the very rapid decay of some radioactive species," said Dr. Julie Castillo, the lead scientist developing the new model at the Jet Propulsion laboratory or JPL.
ref: "Cara yang hanya ada untuk mencapai suhu setinggi di Enceladus ialah melalui pelupusan pantas beberapa spesies radioaktif," kata Dr. Julie Castillo, ketua saintis yang sedang membina model baru di makmal Jet Propulsion atau JPL.

src: "The decomposition of those isotopes - over a period of about 7 million years - would produce enormous amounts of heat."
ref: "Pelupusan isotop-isotop tersebut - melebihi jangka masa lebih kurang 7 juta tahun - mungkin menghasilkan jumlah haba yang sangat besar."

src: "This would result in the consolidation of rocky material at the core surrounded by a shell of ice."
ref: "Ini mungkin mengakibatkan kepada pengukuhan bahan batu di teras yang di kelilingi oleh kerangka ais."

src: "According to the theory, the remaining, more slowly decaying radioactivity in the core could continue to warm and melt the moon's interior for billions of years, along with tidal forces from Saturn's gravitational tug," said a statement on NASA"s website.
ref: "Mengikut kepada teori, baki yang tinggal, lebih perlahan pelupusan radioaktifnya di teras terus untuk panas dan mencairkan bahagian dalam bulan untuk tempoh berbilion tahun, di sepanjang tenaga pasang surut dari tarikan graviti Zuhal," kata kenyataan di laman web NASA.

src: Data from Cassini's ion and neutral mass spectrometer further shows that the natural building blocks of life are also present within Enceladus.
ref: Data dari ion Cassini dan spektrometer massa neutral lanjut menunjukkan bahawa blok bangunan semula jadi kehidupan juga hadir di dalam Enceladus.

src: The results show that carbon dioxide, acetylene, methane, propane and nitrogen, the basic building blocks for life, are all present within the moon.
ref: Keputusan menunjukkan bahawa karbon dioksida, asetilena, metana, propana dan nitrogen, ialah blok-blok bangunan untuk hidup, semunya hadir di dalam bulan.

src: "The team concludes that so far, all the findings and the hot start model indicate that a warm, organic-rich mixture was produced below the surface of Enceladus and might still be present today, making the moon a promising kitchen for the cooking of primordial soup," added the statement.
ref: "Kumpulan membuat kesimpulan begitu setakat ini, semua penemuan dan model permulaan baru menunjukkan bahawa panas, campuran kaya dengan organik dan mungkin masih lagi ada hari ini, menjadikan bulan dapur yang menjanjikan untuk memasak sup purba," tambahnya dalam kenyataan.

src: Cassini will make a flyby on Enceladus in march of 2008.
ref: Cassini akan melakukan flyby di Enceladus pada mac 2008.

src: The mission will "measure the gas emanating from the plume," ended the statement.
ref: Misinya akan "mengukur gas yang berpunca dari kepulan," katanya mengakhiri kenyataan.

src: Although the United States experienced average temperatures for the December, 2006 to February, 2007 period, overall world temperatures were the warmest on record, according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).
ref: Walaupun Amerika Syarikat mengalami suhu purata bagi bulan Disember, 2006 sehingga tempoh Februari 2007, suhu dunia secara keseluruhan adalah yang paling hangat pada rekod, mengikut Negara Oceanic dan Atmosfera Pentadbiran (NOAA).

src: In a March 15, 2007 report, the NOAA indicated that a record warm January helped push the combined global land and ocean surface temperature for the past winter to its highest value since records began in 1880.
ref: Di laporan 15 Mac 2007, NOAA menunjukkan bahawa rekod hangat Januari membantu menolak gabungan global suhu tanah dan laut permukaan untuk musim sejuk yang lalu untuk nilai tertinggi sejak rekod bermula pada tahun 1880.

src: The ocean-atmosphere system, El Niño, played a part in the season's record warmth, according to the report's authors, but its effects did not last long, as ocean temperatures in the central equatorial Pacific cooled more than 0.3 degrees C in February and were near average for the month.
ref: Sistem lautan-atmosfera, El Nino, memainkan peranan dalam rekod kehangatan musim ini, menurut penulis laporan itu, tetapi kesannya tidak kekal lama, kerana suhu laut di kawasan khatulistiwa Pasifik tengah sejuk lebih daripada 0.3 darjah C pada bulan Februari dan menghampiri suhu biasa bagi bulan itu.

src: The global land-surface temperature was the warmest on record, while the ocean-surface temperature tied for second warmest in the past 128 year period, approximately 0.06 degrees C cooler than the record established during the strong El Niño episode of 1997-1998.
ref: Suhu tanah permukaan global adalah yang paling hangat didalam rekod, manakala suhu laut permukaan terikat untuk kedua paling panas dalam tempoh 128 tahun yang lalu, kira-kira 0.06 darjah C lebih sejuk daripada rekod yang terhasil semasa episod kuat El Nino di 1997-1998.

src: During the past century, global surface temperatures have increased approximately 0.06 degrees C per decade, but since 1976 the rate of increase has been about 0.18 degrees C per decade.
ref: Pada abad yang lalu, suhu permukaan global telah meningkat kira-kira 0.06 darjah C setiap dekad, tetapi sejak tahun 1976 kadar kenaikan adalah lebih kurang 0.18 darjah C setiap dekad.

src: The greatest temperature increase occurred in the high latitudes of the Northern Hemisphere.
ref: Peningkatan suhu paling besar berlaku di latitud yang tinggi Hemisfera Utara.

src: In an interview with Reuters, Jay Lawrimore of NOAA suggested that the data does not show greenhouse gases had an influence on the recent temperature increases, but acknowledges that by "looking at long-term trends and long-term changes, we are able to better understand natural and anthropogenic (human-caused) climate change."
ref: Dalam temubual dengan Reuters, Jay Lawrimore daripada NOAA mencadangkan bahawa data tidak menunjukkan gas rumah hijau mempunyai pengaruh ke atas suhu meningkat baru-baru ini, tetapi mengakui bahawa dengan "melihat trend jangka panjang dan perubahan jangka panjang, kita dapat lebih baik memahami (disebabkan manusia) perubahan iklim semula jadi dan antropogen."

src: A U.S. Commerce Department agency based in Washington, D.C., the NOAA conducts research and gathers data on oceans and atmosphere.
ref: Sebuah Agensi Jabatan Perdagangan Amerika Syarikat yang berpangkalan di Washington, D.C., NOAA menjalankan penyelidikan dan mengumpulkan data mengenai lautan dan atmosfera.

src: The NOAA is a participant in the Group on Earth Observations, GEO, an intergovernmental effort to coordinate the collection of Earth observations worldwide.
ref: NOAA adalah peserta dalam Kumpulan Pemerhatian Bumi, GEO, usaha antara kerajaan untuk menyelaras pengumpulan pemerhatian bumi di seluruh dunia.

src: When Wouter Van Bellingen became the first black registrar in Belgium, he knew there would be negative reactions, but he admitted that he didn't expect them to be "so direct, so soon."
ref: Apabila Wouter Van Bellingen menjadi pendaftar kulit hitam pertama di Belgium, dia tahu akan ada reaksi negatif, tetapi dia mengakui bahawa dia tidak menjangka reaksi itu "begitu langsung, begitu cepat".

src: In February, three couples refused to pledge their wedding vows in front of the first black alderman of the city of Sint-Niklaas, because of the colour of his skin.
ref: Pada bulan Februari, tiga pasangan enggan berjanji sumpah perkahwinan mereka di hadapan pegawai tinggi hitam pertama bandar Sint-Niklaas, disebabkan warna kulitnya.

src: After the racist incident, Van Bellingen told himself: "If people don't want to marry, then that's not my problem, it's the problem of those people."
ref: Selepas kejadian perkauman itu, Van Bellingen memberitahu dirinya sendiri: "Jika orang tidak mahu berkahwin, maka itu bukan masalah saya itu masalah mereka".

src: But then someone gave him the idea to react with a positive signal against racial discrimination.
ref: Tetapi kemudian seorang memberi idea kepadanya untuk bertindak balas dengan isyarat positif terhadap diskriminasi kaum.

src: Together with local NGOs and the Center for Equal Opportunities and against Racial Discrimination, he decided to organise a multicultural group marriage happening to, as mayor of Sint-Niklaas Freddy Willockx describes it, "forge this stupid racist behaviour into an unparallelled positive signal against racism and for tolerance."
ref: Bersama-sama dengan NGO tempatan dan Pusat Peluang Sama Rata dan menentang Diskriminasi Kaum, beliau memutuskan untuk menganjurkan kumpulan perkahwinan pelbagai budaya yang mana, seperti Datuk Bandar Sint-Niklaas Freddy Willockx menggambarkannya, "membina kelakuan perkauman yang bodoh ini menjadi isyarat positif yang tiada tandingannya menentangi perkauman dan untuk toleransi".

src: The Church of England are planning to allow gay men who are celibate and in a civil partnership to become bishops according to an announcement made by the House of Bishops.
ref: Gereja England merancang untuk membenarkan lelaki homoseksual yang membujang dan dalam hubungan pasangan hidup sivil untuk menjadi biskop menurut pengumuman yang dibuat oleh Dewan Bishops.

src: This expands a previous decision made in 2005 allowing gay clergy with civil partners.
ref: Ini mengembangkan keputusan terdahulu yang dibuat pada tahun 2005 yang membenarkan paderi homoseksual mempunyai hubungan pasangan sivil.

src: Whether gay clergyman would be allowed to become bishops became an issue in 2003 with the appointment of Rev Jeffrey John as Bishop of Reading.
ref: Sama ada paderi homoseksual akan dibenarkan untuk menjadi biskop menjadi isu pada tahun 2003 dengan pelantikan Rev Jeffrey John sebagai Bishop di Reading.

src: Jeffrey John was forced to step down from his position and now serves as Dean of St Albans Cathedral.
ref: Jeffrey John terpaksa berundur daripada jawatannya dan kini berkhidmat sebagai Dekan Katedral St Albans.

src: In 2010, he was also a candidate to become Bishop of Southwark but was rejected, allegedly because of his sexual orientation.
ref: Pada tahun 2010, beliau juga adalah seorang calon untuk menjadi Biskop di Southwark tetapi ditolak, kononnya kerana corak seksualnya.

src: Anglican evangelicals have suggested such a change ought to have been passed by the General Synod rather than the House of Bishops.
ref: Anglican evangelicals memberitahu pertukaran itu mungkin telah diluluskan oleh General Synod lebih daripada Dewan Bishops.

src: Chris Sugden from Anglican Mainstream said the change coming from the House of Bishops "looks too much like salami-slicing away at the Church's teaching".
ref: Chris Sugden dari Anglican Mainstream berkata perubahan yang datang dari Dewan Bishops "kelihatan terlalu banyak seperti semakin jauh mengecil daripada ajaran Gereja".

src: Former Bishop of Rochester Michael Nazir-Ali raised questions about what celibacy means for a gay bishop: "Does the admission of those in civil partnerships to the episcopate, who state they are celibate, include those who were previously in actively homophile relationships including with their present partner?"
ref: Bekas Bishop Rochester Michael Nazir-Ali menimbulkan persoalan tentang apakah makna pembujangan untuk seorang biskop homoseksual: "Adakah kemasukan mereka yang di dalam hubungan pasangan sivil untuk menjadi biskop, yang menyatakan mereka adalah membujang, termasuk mereka yang sebelum ini dalam hubungan secara aktif homoseksual bersama dengan rakan hidup mereka sekarang"?

src: "The House of Bishops statement does not elaborate on this point but it is crucial to an understanding of what celibacy might mean in this context."
ref: "Kenyataan Rumah Bishops tidak mengulas lanjut mengenai hal ini tetapi ia adalah penting untuk memahami apa yang pembujangan mungkin dimaksudkan dalam konteks ini".

src: In November, the General Synod voted against proposals to allow the appointment of women as bishops.
ref: Pada bulan November, Synod Am mengundi menentang cadangan untuk membenarkan pelantikan wanita sebagai biskop.

src: According to a recent interview, Rolling Stones guitarist Keith Richards is said to have snorted his late father's ashes mixed with cocaine.
ref: Menurut sebuah temubual baru-baru ini, pemain gitar Rolling Stone Keith Richards memberitahu yang dia telah menghidu abu mendiang ayahnya yang dicampukan bersama kokain.

src: In an interview with the NME magazine he is quoted as saying "The strangest thing I've tried to snort?
ref: Di dalam temubual bersama majalah NME beliau berkata "Benda terpelik yang pernah saya hidu?

src: My father."
ref: Ayah saya."

src: He was cremated and I couldn't resist grinding him up with a little bit of blow.
ref: Dia telah dibakar dan disimpan sebagai abu dan saya tidak dapat menahan dari mengisarnya dengan sedikit kokain.

src: My dad wouldn't have cared, he didn't give a shit.
ref: Ayah saya sudah pasti tidak akan ambil berat, dia tidak ambil kisah langsung.

src: Despite the interview, Richards denies he said anything like that and that he ever used cocaine.
ref: Walaupun begitu, Richards menyangkal yang dia pernah berkata apa-apa mengenai hal itu dan memberitahu dia tidak pernah menggunakan kokain.

src: "I wouldn't take cocaine at this point in my life unless I wished to commit suicide."
ref: "Saya tidak akan pernah mengambil kokain pada umur ini melainkan jika saya mahu membunuh diri."

src: The truth of the matter is that I planted a sturdy English Oak.
ref: Yang sebenarnya ialah saya telah menanam sebatang English Oak yang kukuh.

src: Bert, who had been the father of Richards, died when he was 84, back in 2002.
ref: Bert, yang dikenali sebagai ayah kepada Richards, meninggal dunia ketika dia berusia 84, pada tahun 2002.

src: Richard's manager later told the NME that the remarks had been made "in jest", and should not be taken seriously.
ref: Pengurus Richard kemudiannya memberitahu NME yang kata-kata itu dikeluarkan "dengan niat bergurau," dan tidak patut diambil serius.

src: Manouchehr Mottaki, the foreign minsister of Iran, did not attend a dinner at Sharm el-Sheikh because the red dress of a Ukrainian violinist did not meet the "Islamic standards."
ref: Manouchehr Mottaki, menteri luar Iran, tidak menghadiri majlis makan malam di Sharm el-Sheikh kerana pakaian merah pemain biola Ukraine tidak memenuhi "piawaian Islam".

src: According to Mottaki, "There was something wrong with that so I offered my apologies."
ref: Menurut Mottaki, "Ada sesuatu yang salah dengan hal itu jadi saya ingin memohon maaf".

src: The planned discussion of Condoleezza Rice and Mottaki would have been the highest-level formal talks of U.S. and Iranian officials.
ref: Perbincangan yang dirancang berkenaan Condoleezza Rice dan Mottaki akan menjadi perbincangan rasmi peringkat tertinggi A.S. dan pegawai-pegawai Iran.

src: It was intended to enable the foreign ministers to thrash out ways to curb the security problems in Iraq.
ref: Ia bertujuan untuk membolehkan menteri-menteri luar bagi membincangkan cara-cara untuk membendung masalah keselamatan di Iraq.

src: State Department spokesman Sean McCormack explained the issue in term of intimidation when he said, "I don't know which woman he was afraid of, the woman in the red dress or the secretary of state."
ref: Jurucakap Jabatan Negara, Sean McCormack menjelaskan isu ini dari segi ugutan apabila beliau berkata, "Saya tidak tahu mana satu wanita yang dia takut, wanita dalam pakaian merah atau setiausaha negara".
