src: In lieu of a longer substantive discussion, there was a 3-minute exchange of pleasantries between Rice and Mottaki at the end.
ref: Sebagai ganti kepada perbincangan panjang lebar yang lebih substantif, terdapat 3 minit bertukar fikiran yang mesra antara Rice dan Mottaki pada akhirnya.

src: However, Rice did have a complete discussion with Walid Moallem, the foreign minister of Syria, to alleviate Iraq's security problems.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Rice mengadakan perbincangan lengkap dengan Walid Moallem, Menteri Luar Syria, untuk mengurangkan masalah keselamatan Iraq.

src: Later, Mottaki stated that Iran believes that the presence of American troops is the source of instability and called for the withdrawal of American troops.
ref: Kemudian, Mottaki menyatakan bahawa Iran percaya bahawa kehadiran tentera Amerika adalah dari sumber ketidakstabilan dan menggesa pengunduran tentera Amerika.

src: He said, "The U.S. must issue a clear troop-withdrawal plan so that peace and stability can be restored."
ref: Beliau berkata, "Amerika Syarikat perlu membuat pelan pengeluaran tentera yang jelas supaya keamanan dan kestabilan boleh dikembalikan".

src: Mount Stromlo, Canberra — Yesterday in Capital Punishment, the Canberra 50km and 100km mountain bike race, Andy Blair won in the 100km distance in 3:30:25 ahead of Dylan Cooper and Shaun Lewis, last year's winner.
ref: Mount Stromlo, Canberra - Semalam di dalam Capital Punishment, pelumba basikal gunung 50km dan 100km Canberra, Andy Blair menang dalam jarak 100km dengan 3:30:25 mendahului Dylan Cooper dan Shaun Lewis, pemenang tahun lepas.

src: In the women's event, Jenny Fay won in a time of 4:01:53 ahead of Michelle Ainsworth.
ref: Dalam acara wanita, Jenny Fay menang dengan catatan masa 4:01:53 mendahului Michelle Ainsworth.

src: Competitors start at Sparrow Hill east of Canberra, and ride through Canberra the Black Mountain Reserve and the National Arboretum, ending at Stromlo Forest Park.
ref: Pesaing bermula di Sparrow Hill timur Canberra, dan menunggang melalui Rizab Black Mountain Canberra dan Arboretum Negara, berakhir di Taman Perhutanan Stromlo.

src: There were a variety of cyclists of different skill levels including former Australian national team members, but casual cyclists were very much in evidence.
ref: Terdapat pelbagai penunggang basikal pada tahap kemahiran yang berbeza termasuk bekas ahli pasukan kebangsaan Australia, tetapi yang ketaranya penunggang basikal kasual adalah sangat banyak.

src: Police in Melbourne, Australia are on the hunt for a gunman who killed a man and injured two others in the city's central business district this morning.
ref: Pihak polis di Melbourne, Australia kini sedang memburu seorang lelaki bersenjata yang membunuh seorang lelaki dan mencederakan lagi dua yang lain di kawasan perniagaan pusat bandar pagi ini.

src: Officials warned all office workers to remain indoors, and train services to Flinders Street Station were temporarily on hold, as investigations were carried out on the intersection of Flinders Lane and William Street.
ref: Pegawai polis memberi amaran kepada semua pekerja pejabat supaya kekal di dalam bangunan, dan perkhidmatan kereta api ke Stesen Flinders Street telah diberhentikan, sementara siasatan dijalankan di persimpangan Flinders Lane dan William Street.

src: Malcom Bates, who witnessed the shootings at around 8:15 a.m., said the gunman grabbed a woman from inside a taxi.
ref: Malcom Bates, yang menyaksikan kejadian tembakan tersebut pada kira-kira pukul 8:15 pagi, berkata bahawa lelaki bersenjata tersebut menyambar seorang wanita dari sebuah teksi.

src: "The lady got away and he turned and shot three people basically point blank," Mr Bates said.
ref: "Wanita itu melepaskan diri dan dia berpaling lalu menembak tiga orang dari jarak dekat," kata Encik Bates.

src: He said that the incident took no longer than the "wink of an eye".
ref: Dia berkata, kejadian tersebut terjadi dalam "sekelip mata" saja.

src: Paramedics struggled to revive the one victim for almost an hour before declaring him dead at the scene.
ref: Pasukan paramedik bersusah payah memulihkan salah seorang mangsa hampir satu jam sebelum mengisytiharkan dia mati di tempat kejadian.

src: The two injured people have been taken to the Royal Melbourne Hospital in a critical condition.
ref: Kedua-dua mangsa cedera yang telah dibawa ke Hospital Royal Melbourne berada dalam keadaan kritikal.

src: Police believe the incident began at the Bar Code 24-hour bar in King Street, when a woman attempted to get into a taxi.
ref: Polis percaya kejadian itu bermula di sebuah bar 24-jam Bar Code di King Street, apabila seorang wanita cuba untuk masuk ke dalam teksi.

src: She was apparently grabbed by the hair by the gunman who then shot her and two men who attempted to come to her aid.
ref: Perempuan tersebut kelihatan seperti rambutnya disambar oleh lelaki bersenjata tersebut yang kemudiannya menembaknya bersama dengan dua orang lelaki yang cuba menolongnya.

src: Police have identified the gunman as Christopher Wayne Hudson, aged 29.
ref: Polis telah mengenal pasti lelaki bersenjata itu sebagai Christopher Wayne Hudson, berumur 29.

src: They believe him to be a member of the Hells Angels bikie gang.
ref: Mereka mempercayai bahawa dia adalah salah seorang ahli gang penunggang motosikal Hells Angels.

src: Police have described Hudson as about 180 cm tall, with short brown hair and wearing a dark tracksuit top and dark denim jeans.
ref: Polis telah menggambarkan Hudson dengan ketinggian kira-kira 180 cm, dengan berambut perang pendek dan memakai baju sut balapan gelap serta jeans denim gelap.

src: A building worker on a construction site on the corner of Queen and Flinders Streets has reportedly discovered a handgun.
ref: Seorang pekerja binaan di tapak pembinaan di sudut Jalan Queen and Flinders telah dilaporkan menjumpai sepucuk pistol.

src: It is understood the gunman may have thrown the weapon into the site as he fled the scene.
ref: Difahamkan bahawa lelaki bersenjata itu mungkin telah membuang senjata tersebut ketika dia cuba melarikan diri dari tempat kejadian.

src: Two rockets hit the south of Lebanon's capital Beirut today, injuring three or more people.
ref: Dua roket melanda selatan ibu Lebanon Beirut hari ini, mencederakan tiga atau lebih ramai orang.

src: The rockets landed in a district controlled by the Hezbollah organisation, a Shi'a Islamic militant and political group, with one rocket hitting a car showroom, and the other a residential building.
ref: Roket mendarat di kawasan yang dikawal oleh organisasi Hezbollah, satu militan Syiah Islam dan kumpulan politik, dengan satu roket memukul bilik pameran kereta, dan lain-lain bangunan kediaman.

src: While it is unclear who fired the rockets, Lebanon's interior minister, Marwan Charbel, said it appeared the rockets had come from the south-east of the city.
ref: Walaupun ia tidak jelas yang melepaskan tembakan roket, Menteri Dalam Negeri Lebanon, Marwan Charbel, berkata ia muncul roket telah datang dari tenggara bandar.

src: The attacks come after Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah addressed his followers yesterday, committing the militant group to fighting in Syria's conflict.
ref: Serangan datang selepas pemimpin Hezbollah Hassan Nasrallah ditangani pengikutnya semalam, melakukan kumpulan militan untuk berjuang dalam konflik Syria.

src: Syrian rebels have threatened retaliation against the Hezbollah group for sending fighters to assist Syrian President Bashar al-Assad, who is fighting to end a revolt against his rule.
ref: Pemberontak Syria mengancam tindakan balas terhadap kumpulan Hezbollah untuk menghantar pejuang untuk membantu Presiden Syria Bashar al-Assad, yang berjuang untuk menamatkan pemberontakan terhadap pemerintahannya.

src: The revolt started more than two years ago, and has killed 80,000 people, leaving 1.5 million refugees.
ref: Pemberontakan ini bermula lebih daripada dua tahun yang lalu, dan telah membunuh 80,000 orang, meninggalkan 1.5 juta pelarian.

src: Nasrallah's speech confirmed the group are directly involved in Syria's war, and pledged they would protect Lebanon's borders from the control of rebels.
ref: Ucapan Nasrallah mengesahkan kumpulan itu terlibat secara langsung dalam perang Syria, dan berjanji mereka akan melindungi sempadan Lebanon daripada kawalan pemberontak.

src: He called sending troops outside Lebanon to protect the country "a completely new phase" for Hezbollah.
ref: Beliau menyeru menghantar tentera di luar Lebanon untuk melindungi negara ini "fasa yang baru" untuk Hezbollah.

src: In the Syrian border town of Qusayr, government and Hezbollah forces continue a seven-day battle to expel Syrian rebels from the town.
ref: Di bandar sempadan Syria Qusayr, kerajaan dan tentera Hezbollah meneruskan pertempuran tujuh hari untuk mengusir pemberontak Syria dari bandar.

src: Reportedly 40 or more people were killed there yesterday, including a number of Hezbollah fighters.
ref: Dilaporkan 40 atau lebih orang terbunuh di sana semalam, termasuk beberapa pejuang Hezbollah.

src: Nasrallah pledged Hezbollah will continue fighting until the conflict has been turned in President Assad's favour.
ref: Nasrallah berikrar Hezbollah akan terus berjuang sehingga konflik telah memihak kepada Presiden Assad.

src: Democratic Party of Japan (DPJ) could claim victory in Sunday's House of Councillors elections.
ref: Parti Demokratik Jepun (DPJ) boleh membuat tuntutan kemenangan di Rumah Anggota Dewan pilihan raya di Sunday.

src: The House of Councillors is the upper house in the bicameral National Diet of Japan.
ref: Dewan Majlis ialah dewan rakyat di dalam dwidewan Diet Kebangsaan Jepun.

src: Of the 242 seats, DPJ went from 82 to 109 seats, making it the largest party in the House of Councillors.
ref: Daripada 242 kerusi, DPJ menambah kerusi dari 82 ke 109, menjadikannya sebagai parti terbesar di Rumah Anggota Dewan.

src: This gain came largely at the expense of the ruling Liberal Democratic Party (LDP), which went from 119 seats to 83.
ref: Peningkatan ini datang sebahagian besarnya dari usaha pemerintah Parti Liberal Demokratik (LDP), yang meningkat dari 119 kerusi kepada 83.

src: Also losing seats was LDP's coalition partner, New Komeito Party (NKP), which lost 4 councillor seats and now holds 20.
ref: Juga kehilangan kerusi telah rakan komponen LDP, New Komeito Party (NKP), yang hilang 4 kerusi ahli majlis dan kini memegang 20.

src: Japan's Prime Minister Shinzo Abe said that while he takes the result of the election "very seriously," he does not intend to resign his post.
ref: Perdana Menteri Jepun, Shinzo Abe berkata, beliau mengambil keputusan pilihan raya itu sebagai "amat serius," katanya beliau tidak berhasrat untuk meletakkan jawatan.

src: "We must take these results very seriously and reflecting on what we must reflect on," Abe said at a news conference.
ref: "Kami mesti mengambil keputusan ini dengan serius dan memberi perhatian kepada apa yang kami perlu ambil perhatian," kata Abe pada sidang akhbar.

src: "I want to fulfill my responsibility to proceed with reform to build the nation and promote economic growth that the people can feel."
ref: "Saya mahu memenuhi tanggungjawab saya untuk meneruskan pembaharuan untuk membina negara dan menggalakkan pertumbuhan ekonomi yang rakyat dapat rasai."

src: The election result will not force the government out of power, since the LDP holds 296 of the 480 seats in the House of Representatives.
ref: Keputusan pilihan raya tidak akan memaksa kerajaan kehilangan kuasa, kerana LDP memegang 296 daripada 480 kerusi di Dewan Rakyat.

src: "Voters said we must reflect on our shortcomings and refresh the line-up," Abe said.
ref: "Pengundi berkata kita perlu memikirkan kelemahan kita dan menguatkan semula barisan pimpinan," kata Abe.

src: "I plan to reshuffle the Cabinet and top party posts at an appropriate time."
ref: "Saya merancang untuk merombak Kabinet dan jawatan tertinggi parti pada masa yang sesuai."

src: He really needs to accept the results of the election and think about the future.
ref: Beliau benar-benar perlu menerima keputusan pilihan raya dan berfikir untuk masa depan.

src: "This might include quitting," 38-year-old civil servant Akihiro Kodaira told Reuters.
ref: "Ini mungkin termasuk meletakkan jawatan," penjawat awam berusia 38 tahun Akihiro Kodaira memberitahu kepada Reuters.

src: Popular social networking website Facebook went down for unknown upgrades, possibly to circumvent multiple holes that were published in a white paper earlier.
ref: Laman web rangkaian sosial popular Facebook ditutup untuk penambah baikan yang tidak diketahui, berkemungkinan untuk mengelakkan beberapa lubang yang diterbitkan atas kertas putih sebelum ini.

src: From roughly 1:00 to 4:15 pm ET, users reported the site was down.
ref: Dari lebih kurang pukul 1:00 ke 4:15 pm ET, pengguna melaporkan laman itu ditutup.

src: Blogs have speculated it may be simply a server upgrade, or it may be new features.
ref: Blog-blog telah menjangkakan ia mungkin hanya kemas kini pelayan, atau ia mungkin merupakan ciri-ciri palsu.

src: One web development blogger has even raised the theory that the site was hacked, with the login box showing multiple random email addresses, through "<input>" coding.
ref: Satu web pembangunan blogger telah membawa naik teori bahawa laman itu telah digodam, dengan kotak log masuk dilihat menunjukkan beberapa alamat email rawak, melalui kod "<input>".

src: Another user replied to this posting, saying that they were even able to read the other, random user's inbox.
ref: Pengguna lain menjawab pos itu, mengatakan bahawa mereka juga boleh membaca yang lain, peti masuk pengguna rawak.

src: Both a blogger who works at a computing company's office in Johannesburg, South Africa and a Norwegian news outlet reported similar troubles.
ref: Kedua-dua blogger yang bekerja di pejabat syarikat pengkomputeran di Johannesburg, Afrika Selatan dan berita outlet Norwegian melaporkan perkara yang sama.

src: Many blogs received comments from people with similar circumstances, worldwide.
ref: Banyak blog-blog menerima komen-komen dari orang yang dalam keasaan yang sama, di seluruh dunia.

src: A white paper by Adrienne Felt, posted on July 27, 2007, explained step-by-step how to use an exploit to hijack a user's account.
ref: Kertas putih dari Adrienne Felt, disiarkan pada 27 Julai, 2007, menjelaskan langakah-demi-langkah bagaimana untuk menggunakan pengeksploitasian ke atas penggodaman akaun pengguna.

src: The white paper was then partially censored by the author, until the vulnerability has been fixed by Facebook.
ref: Kertas putih kemudiannya ditapis sebahagian oleh penulis, sehingga kelemahan itu dibaiki oleh Facebook.

src: Regardless of whether the change was prompted by this paper, both the XSS hole and problem with forms described by the author were fixed during the upgrade.
ref: Tanpa menghiraukan sama ada perubahan itu disebabkan oleh kertas ini, kedua-dua lubang XSS dan masalah melibatkan borang-borang disenaraikan oleh penulis telah dibetulkan ketika proses pembaikan.

src: This is the first known global outage for the site.
ref: Ini merupakan gangguan global pertama yang diketahui untuk laman itu.

src: This comes as a rival site, ConnectU, has filed a lawsuit against Facebook founder Mark Zuckerberg for allegedly stealing the idea and the code.
ref: Laman pesaing, ConnectU, telah memfailkan tindakan undang-undang ke atas pengasas Facebook Mark Zuckerberg atas pertuduhan mencuri idea dan kod.

src: Also on Wednesday, the Black Hat Briefings computer security conference begins.
ref: Juga pada hari Rabu, persidangan keselamatan komputer Black Hat Briefings bermula.

src: The conference unites people from "government agencies and global corporations with the underground's most respected hackers."
ref: Persidangan itu mengumpulkan orang dari "agensi kerajaan dan perbadananan antarabangsa bersama dengan penggodam bawah tanah terkemuka".

src: Eight Hungarian migrant workers sacked from a Domino's Pizza franchise in Derby, England are said to have taken home virtually no pay for months because of illegal deductions.
ref: Lapan pekerja asing Hungarian yang dipecat daripada francais Pizza Domino di Derby, England dikatakan membawa pulang hampir tiada gaji yang berbulan-bulan kerana potongan pekerja haram.

src: The claim is refuted by the company who said in a statement "We have begun a thorough investigation during which we have scrutinised the franchisee's employment practices."
ref: Tuntutan itu disangkal oleh syarikat itu yang berkata dalam satu kenyataan "Kami telah memulakan siasatan menyeluruh di mana kami telah meneliti amalan guna tenaga pemegang francais".

src: "The franchisee concerned is confident that he possesses the evidence required to refute these allegations."
ref: "Pemegang francais berkenaan yakin bahawa dia mempunyai bukti yang diperlukan untuk menyangkal tuduhan-tuduhan ini".

src: "To the extent that we have been informed of all allegations and have reviewed all available evidence, we also believe this to be the case."
ref: "Setakat yang kita telah dimaklumkan tentang semua dakwaan dan telah mengkaji semua bukti yang ada, kami juga percaya ini adalah seperti yang diperkatakan".

src: The sacked workers are being supported in their claim by the workers union Unite.
ref: Para pekerja dipecat sedang disokong oleh kesatuan pekerja Bersatu dalam tuntutan mereka.

src: The union say the "there appeared to be a deliberate strategy of keeping the workers in debt to the company through a series of crippling deductions."
ref: Kesatuan itu berkata "nampaknya terdapat satu strategi yang sengaja menjadikan pekerja-pekerja berhutang kepada syarikat itu melalui satu siri potongan yang pincang".

src: "The deductions included payments to cover the contract purchase of a car from their employer, insurance for the vehicle provided through their employer, and exorbitant rent for substandard accommodation, again provided through their employer."
ref: "Potongan itu termasuk bayaran untuk menampung pembelian kontrak kereta dari majikan mereka, insurans bagi kenderaan yang disediakan melalui majikan mereka, dan sewa yang terlalu tinggi untuk penginapan bermutu rendah, yang juga disediakan melalui majikan mereka".

src: In addition, some workers had to pay fees of up to £180 for an "introduction" to the company.
ref: Selain itu, beberapa pekerja terpaksa membayar yuran setinggi £180 untuk satu "pengenalan" kepada syarikat.

src: One worker earned just £5 in four months because of the constant and hefty deductions out of his wage packet.
ref: Seorang pekerja hanya mendapat £5 dalam empat bulan kerana potongan yang berterusan dan tinggi daripada paket gajinya.

src: Police apprehended a 18 inch tall monkey that is reported to have bitten a 20 year-old woman outside State Street Brats, a Madison, Wisconsin nightclub.
ref: Polis menahan seekor monyet setinggi 18 inch yang dilaporkan telah menggigit seorang wanita berusia 20 tahun di luar State Street Brats, sebuah kelab malam di Madison, Wisconsin.

src: The long-tailed, black and white monkey, which was wearing a diaper, was leashed in a beer garden outside the nightclub on State Street when people began to pet the animal.
ref: Monyet berekor panjang, hitam dan putih, yang memakai lampin, telah ditahan di taman bir di luar kelab malam di State Street apabila orang mula membelai haiwan itu.

src: When the woman approached the monkey around 1:00 a.m. CDT (UTC-5) on Wednesday morning and put her hand out to pet it, it bit her then escaped the garden and led police on a seven hour 'monkey hunt' before it was caught.
ref: Ketika perempuan itu dihampiri monyet tersebut di sekitar 1:00 pagi CDT (UTC -5) pada pagi Rabu dan memanjangkan tangannya untuk membelainya, ia menggigitnya dan kemudian melarikan diri dari taman itu dan menyebabkan polis 'memburu monyet'selama tujuh jam sebelum ia ditangkap.

src: The woman was left with four puncture wounds to her thumb.
ref: Wanita itu ditinggalkan dengan empat kesan tusukan ke ibu jarinya.

src: Doctors are said to be testing blood samples from the monkey to check for diseases.
ref: Doktor dikatakan akan menguji sampel darah daripada monyet itu untuk membuat pemeriksaan penyakit.

src: "This guy was in the beer garden at State Street Brats letting women pet his monkey," said a spokesman for the Madison police Department, Joel DeSpain.
ref: "Lelaki ini berada di taman bir di State Street Brats dan membiarkan wanita itu membelai monyetnya," kata jurucakap Jabatan polis Madison, Joel DeSpain.

src: Police say the monkey will remain in quarantine for at least ten days.
ref: Polis berkata monyet itu akan kekal dalam kuarantin selama sekurang-kurangnya sepuluh hari.

src: England have beaten India by 104 runs in the first One-Day International of the Indian tour of England at the Rose Bowl, Hampshire, England.
ref: England telah menewaskan India dengan 104 larian dalam One-Day International yang pertama semasa lawatan India ke England di Rose Bowl, Hampshire, England.

src: England's batsmen started quietly, reaching 43-1 in the eleventh over when Matt Prior was caught off Zaheer Khan's bowling.
ref: Pemukul England bermula dengan perlahan, mencapai 43-1 dalam pusingan kesebelas apabila Matt Prior terperangkap oleh lontaran Zaheer Khan.

src: Alastair Cook and Ian Bell shared a 178-run partnership, with Cook reaching his maiden one-day century before being bowled by Yuvraj Singh.
ref: Alastair Cook dan Ian Bell berkongsi 178-larian, dengan Cook mencapai larian ke seratus sulungnya sebelum menerima lontaran dari Yuvraj Singh.

src: Soon afterwards, Bell reached his first one-day century, and finished the innings on 126 not out.
ref: Tidak lama selepas itu, Bell mencapai larian ke seratusnya, dan selesai babak pada 126 tidak keluar.

src: Kevin Pietersen added 33 runs off 25 balls and England finished their 50 overs with a score of 288-2.
ref: Kevin Pietersen menambah 33 larian 25 bola dan England menamatkan pusingan 50 mereka dengan skor 288-2.

src: The second ODI will take place at the County Ground, Bristol, on 24 August.
ref: ODI kedua akan berlangsung di County Ground, Bristol, pada 24 Ogos.

src: Earlier in the month, India won a three-match Test series 1-0.
ref: Terdahulu dalam bulan ini, India memenangi Ujian siri tiga perlawanan 1-0.

src: Announced early Wednesday morning at Nokia's GoEvent, in a plan to expand the company's revenue, Finland-based company Nokia Inc. is developing a mobile phone similar to its rival iPhone, which will be available in the near future for Nokia customers.
ref: Diumumkan awal pagi Rabu di Nokia GoEvent, dalam satu rancangan untuk mengembangkan pendapatan syarikat, syarikat yang berpengkalan di Finland Nokia Inc. sedang mengkaji telefon bimbit yang hampir sama seperti pesaingnya iPhone, yang boleh didapati pada masa akan datang untuk pelanggan Nokia.

src: Most of the features are the same as the iPhone's.
ref: Kebanyakan ciri-cirinya sama dengan iPhone.

src: They include music, games, and many other features, even ones that the iPhone may not have.
ref: Ia termasuk muzik, permainan, dan banyak ciri-ciri lain, malahan mungkin tidak terdapat dalam iPhone.

src: Ovi (in Finnish meaning "Door") will be the door for more than 2 million songs and games available for download on the new device.
ref: Ovi (dalam erti Finland "Pintu") akan menjadi pintu kepada lebih daripada 2 juta lagu dan permainan yang boleh dimuat turun oleh peranti baru itu.

src: Users will be able to download wirelessly in their own home or anywhere there is access to a computer.
ref: Pengguna akan dapat memuat turun secara wayarles di rumah mereka sendiri atau mana-mana sahaja yang mempunyai akses kepada komputer.

src: But this is not the first time Nokia has made an attempt like this to increase its revenue.
ref: Tetapi ini bukan kali pertama Nokia mencuba seperti ini untuk meningkatkan pendapatannya.

src: In October of 2003 the company revealed the N-Gage, a game-playing cell phone, but was "stocked-out" due to poor sales.
ref: Pada bulan Oktober tahun 2003 syarikat itu mendedahkan N-Gage, telefon bimbit untuk permainan, tapi telah "kehabisan stok" kerana jualan kurang baik.

src: The N95 smartphone, which was released in the U.S. on April 7, 2007 (before the iPhone on June 29, 2007) includes WiFi, a GPS, a music player, and a 5 megapixel digital camera.
ref: N95, telefon pintar yang dikeluarkan di Amerika Syarikat pada 7 April 2007 (sebelum iPhone pada 29 Jun, 2007) mempunyai WiFi, GPS, pemain muzik, dan kamera digital 5 megapiksel.

src: The three other phones that were revealed at the event in London will be in-stock next quarter.
ref: Ketiga-tiga telefon lain yang dilancarkan dalam majlis itu di London akan dijual dalam suku tahun akan datang.

src: The new N81 and the modified N95 smartphones were among the revealed at yesterday's event; the N81 is a new member to Nokia's smartphone family; the N95 has been modified by having more memory and a sleeker LCD screen.
ref: N81 dan N95 telefon pintar diubahsuai yang baru adalah antara yang dilancarkan dalam upacara semalam; N81 yang merupakan ahli baru keluarga telefon pintar Nokia; N95 itu telah diubah suai dengan mempunyai lebih banyak memori dan skrin LCD yang lebih licin.

src: When Nokia was asked about the striking similarity between this and the iPhone, Nokia's Executive Vice President and General Manager of Multimedia, Anssi Vanjoki, said, "If there is something good in the world then we copy with pride."
ref: Apabila Nokia ditanya mengenai persamaan yang ketara antara ini dan iPhone, Naib Presiden Eksekutif Nokia dan Pengurus Besar Multimedia, Anssi Vanjoki, berkata, "Jika ada sesuatu yang baik di dunia maka kita akan meniru dengan bangga".

src: During their demo they omitted the fact that the demo was for the software to be in use, not the actual hardware.
ref: Dalam demonstrasi mereka, mereka mengelakkan kenyataan bahawa demonstrasi adalah untuk perisian yang akan digunakan, bukan perkakasan sebenar.

src: Canada has a budget surplus of CA$13.8 billion for the 2006–2007 fiscal year, totaling 1% of Canada's gross domestic product (GDP), Finance Minister Jim Flaherty announced today.
ref: Kanada mempunyai lebihan bajet AS$13.8 bilion untuk tahun fiskal 2006-2007, berjumlah 1% daripada keluaran dalam negara kasar Kanada (KDNK), Menteri Kewangan Jim Flaherty mengumumkan hari ini.

src: The record surplus was boosted by revenue from government corporations to $14.2 billion, far exceeding the government's projections of $9.2 billion and surpassing the record set by the previous year's $13.2 billion surplus.
ref: Rekod lebihan itu dirangsang oleh pendapatan syarikat-syarikat kerajaan untuk $14.2 bilion, jauh melebihi unjuran kerajaan yang berjumlah $9.2 bilion dan melebihi rekod yang ditetapkan pada tahun sebelumnya pada jumlah lebihan $13.2.

src: By federal law, all surplus must be used to pay down Canada's debt, and is not available for spending.
ref: Mengikuti undang-undang persekutuan, semua lebihan mesti digunakan untuk membayar hutang Kanada, dan tidak tersedia untuk perbelanjaan.

src: $90 billion in debt payments over the last ten years have reduced its debt to $467 billion or 32.3% of national GDP, its lowest level in a quarter century.
ref: Pembayaran hutang $90 bilion dalam tempoh sepuluh tahun yang lalu telah mengurangkan hutang ke $467 bilion atau 32.3% daripada KDNK negara, paras terendah dalam suku abad.

src: The announced debt payment is the largest in Canadian history.
ref: Pembayaran hutang yang diumumkan adalah yang terbesar dalam sejarah Kanada.

src: The payment also reduced Canada's annual interest payments by $725 million, which the government pledged to pass on to taxpayers through tax returns and reduced income taxes.
ref: Bayaran itu juga mengurangkan bayaran faedah tahunan Kanada sebanyak $725 juta, yang kerajaan berjanji untuk menyampaikan kepada pembayar cukai melalui cukai dan pengurangan cukai pendapatan.

src: The Conservative's "Tax Back Guarantee", proposed in the March budget, promises that money saved on interest payments will be deducted from Canadians' taxes.
ref: "Jaminan Bayaran Balik Cukai" pihak Konservatif itu, yang dicadangkan dalam bajet Mac, berjanji bahawa wang yang disimpan atas bayaran faedah akan ditolak daripada cukai Kanada.

src: The Globe and Mail predicts the tax returns will be 30–40 dollars per taxpayer.
ref: The Globe dan Mail meramal pulangan cukai akan sebanyak 30-40 dolar per pembayar cukai.

src: Canada has posted ten consecutive budget surpluses in the last decade.
ref: Kanada telah mencatatkan sepuluh lebihan bajet berturut-turut dalam sedekad lalu.

src: The Canadian economy, the 8th largest in the world, has benefited from rising global demand for its export commodities, particularly oil and copper, as well as record corporate profits.
ref: Ekonomi Kanada, yang ke-8 terbesar di dunia, telah mendapat manfaat daripada peningkatan permintaan global bagi komoditi eksport, seperti minyak dan tembaga, serta rekod keuntungan korporat.

src: This surplus was further increased by a $700 million drop from expected government spending.
ref: Lebihan ini ditambah lagi dengan penurunan $700 juta daripada pengurangan perbelanjaan kerajaan yang dijangka.

src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper cautioned that the Canadian economy is still facing "tough times" in its forestry, manufacturing, and some export industries.
ref: Perdana Menteri Stephen Harper memberi amaran bahawa ekonomi Kanada masih menghadapi "masa yang sukar" dalam perhutanan, pembuatan, dan beberapa industri eksport.

src: Critics point out that the Conservative government had said Canadians were overtaxed when they took office, and had vowed to eliminate "surplus surprises".
ref: Pengkritik menunjukkan bahawa kerajaan Konservatif pernah berkata orang Kanada dikenakan cukai yang terlalu tinggi apabila mereka menjadi kerajaan, dan telah berikrar untuk menghapuskan "kejutan lebihan."

src: Both teams entered Sunday's match with a seven-game unbeaten streak to give them the chance to take the final playoff spot.
ref: Kedua-dua pasukan memasuki perlawanan pada hari Ahad dengan tujuh permainan tanpa kalah untuk memberi mereka peluang untuk mengambil tempat perlawanan penentuan terakhir.

src: In the end, Chicago Fire beat Los Angeles Galaxy to take the last playoff spot.
ref: Akhirnya, Chicago Fire menewaskan Los Angeles Galaxy untuk mengambil tempat yang terakhir di perlawanan penentuan.

src: Chicago Fire controlled the game as they outshot Los Angeles Galaxy 22-5.
ref: Chicago Fire mengawal permainan sambil mereka tendangan lebih Los Angeles Galaxy 22-5.

src: Los Angeles Galaxy recorded just a single shot on goal which came early in the 1st half.
ref: Los Angeles Galaxy mencatatkan hanya satu tendangan depan gol dimana ia datang di separuh pertama.

src: Chicago Fire poured the shots until they scored the winner in the 93rd minute to score the eventual game winner.
ref: Chicago Fire meluru tendangan sehingga mereka skor pemenangnya di minit ke 93 untuk pemenang permainan terakhir.

src: The loss for Los Angeles Galaxy eliminates them from the playoffs as Chicago Fire will play DC United in the 1st round of the playoffs.
ref: Kekalahan bagi Los Angeles Galaxy menyingkirkan mereka daripada perlawanan penentuan sementara Chicago Fire akan bermain DC United pada pusingan pertama perlawanan penentuan.

src: The opening ceremonies for the 2007 Baseball World Cup (2007 BWC) were held Tuesday.
ref: Majlis pembukaan bagi Piala Dunia Besbol 2007 (2007 BWC) telah diadakan hari ini.

src: Torrential rain, however, made Panama vs Spain the opening match of the 2007 BWC in Taichung Intercontinental Baseball Stadium.
ref: Hujan lebat, bagaimanapun, membuat perlawanan pembukaan antara Panama vs Sepanyol di 2007 BWC di Stadium Besbol Taichung Intercontinental.

src: The original opening match of Chinese Taipei vs Italy was postponed until next week and will be played at Tianmu Baseball Stadium.
ref: Perlawanan pembukaan asal Chinese Taipei vs Italy ditangguhkan ke minggu depan dan akan berlangsung di Stadium Besbol Tianmu.

src: "Recently, we got into a sticky situation while constructing a dome due to some protests by non-governmental people, but we'll try to overcome these difficulties in order to present high-level sports to the international market."
ref: "Baru-baru ini, kita menghadapi masalah ketika membina kubah kerana beberapa bantahan oleh orang bukan kerajaan, tetapi kami akan cuba untuk mengatasi masalah ini untuk membentangkan sukan peringkat tinggi untuk pasaran antarabangsa".

src: Chin-chi Wu, the Director of the Taipei City Bureau of Education, remarked at Tuesday's opening ceremony.
ref: Pengarah Biro Pelajaran Bandar Taipei, Chin-chi Wu, berkata pada majlis perasmian semalam.

src: Children who spend more time playing with other children are less likely to end up getting childhood cancers, a UK study published today in the British Medical Journal has found.
ref: Kanak-kanak yang menghabiskan lebih banyak masa bermain dengan kanak-kanak lain kurang cenderung mendapat kanser kanak-kanak, satu kajian UK yang diterbitkan hari ini dalam Jurnal Perubatan British telah mendapat keputusan ini.

src: The finding supports the researchers' theory that reduced exposure to common infections in the first year of life increases the risk of developing acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (ALL).
ref: Dapatan ini menyokong teori penyelidik yang mengurangkan pendedahan kepada jangkitan biasa pada tahun pertama kehidupan meningkatkan risiko mendapat leukemia lymphoblastic akut (ALL).

src: A total of nearly 10,000 children took part in the study, located in 10 regions across the UK.
ref: Seramai hampir 10,000 kanak-kanak telah mengambil bahagian dalam kajian ini, bertempat di 10 kawasan di seluruh UK.

src: Amount of time spent in daycare and social activity, during the first year of life, were used to gauge the level of exposure of the infants to common infections such as cold and flu.
ref: Jumlah masa yang dihabiskan dalam pusat jagaan harian dan aktiviti sosial, pada tahun pertama kehidupan, telah digunakan untuk mengukur tahap pendedahan bayi kepada jangkitan biasa seperti demam selesema dan selesema.

src: Day care in the first year of life for at least two days a week, with at least three other kids, halved a child's chance of contracting ALL.
ref: Pusat jagaan harian dalam tahun pertama kehidupan sekurang-kurangnya dua hari seminggu, dengan sekurang-kurangnya tiga kanak-kanak lain, mengurangkan peluang sebanyak separuh untuk kanak-kanak menjangkiti ALL.

src: Those who were rated in the category "any social activity" still had an improvement over the children rated as "no social activity": they had about 3/4 the chance of getting the disease.
ref: Mereka yang telah dinilai dalam kategori "apa-apa aktiviti sosial" masih bertambah baik berbanding kanak-kanak dinilai sebagai "tiada aktiviti sosial": mereka mempunyai kira-kira 3/4 peluang mendapat penyakit ini.

src: The study describes that effect was "more striking" for acute lymphoblastic leukaemia — a cancer affecting blood and the immune system — than it was for the set of all other cancers.
ref: Kajian ini menerangkan bahawa kesan itu adalah "lebih ketara" untuk leukemia lymphoblastic akut - kanser yang mempengaruhi darah dan sistem pertahanan badan - berbanding dengan set semua jenis kanser lain.

src: Increasing levels of activity saw decreasing chances of childhood cancers, when compared against children who during their first year had no regular social activity outside the home.
ref: Peningkatan tahap aktiviti memperlihatkan pengurangan peluang kanser kanak-kanak, apabila dibandingkan dengan kanak-kanak yang pada tahun pertama yang tidak mempunyai aktiviti sosial yang kerap di luar rumah.

src: Theories have been around since the 1940s that childhood exposure to infection was related to the development of childhood leukaemia — one, like the working theory of the UK study, said that lack of immune challenge was a factor, another that leukaemia developed as a delayed result of some type of infection.
ref: Pelbagai teori telah wujud sejak tahun 1940-an bahawa pendedahan kanak-kanak kepada jangkitan adalah berkaitan dengan pembangunan leukemia kanak-kanak - satu, seperti teori kerja kajian UK, berkata kekurangan cabaran imun merupakan satu faktor, satu lagi leukemia yang terhasil kerana akibat tertunda sesetengah jangkitan.

src: The research was conducted by the Institute of Cancer Research in London and in Sutton, London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine, University of York, Christie Hospital and Central Manchester and Manchester Children's University Hospitals NHS Trusts, and the University of Edinburgh.
ref: Kajian ini telah dijalankan oleh Institut Penyelidikan Kanser di London dan di Sutton, Pusat Kebersihan dan Perubatan Tropika London, Universiti York, Hospital Christie dan Hospital Central Manchester dan Hospital Universiti Kanak-kanak Manchester Amanah NHS, dan Universiti Edinburgh.

src: Hans and Josie Schaffer of Bedford, United Kingdom are possibly world record holders, now that they have a total of 99 grandchildren and great-grandchildren.
ref: Hans dan Josie Schaffer dari Bedford, United Kingdom mungkin adalah pemegang rekod dunia, kini dengan jumlah 99 orang cucu dan cicit.

src: The pensioners spend most of the year saving for Christmas gifts.
ref: Pesara itu menghabiskan keseluruhan tahun itu menyimpan wang untuk hadiah Krismas.

src: Their eleven children have brought them 56 grandchildren and 43 great-grandchildren.
ref: Sebelas orang anak mereka telah memberi mereka 56 orang cucu dan 43 orang cicit.

src: "The kids just kept coming – and then their kids just kept coming," said Josie, 77, to the Sun newspaper.
ref: "Anak-anak hanya tetap datang - dan kemudian anak-anak mereka juga turut datang," kata Josie, 77, kepada Akhbar Sun.

src: Husband Hans was a prisoner of war in World War II, and went to work as a farmer for Josie's family.
ref: Suaminya Hans merupakan seorang tahanan perang ketika Perang Dunia II, dan berkerja sebagai petani untuk keluarga Josie.

src: While there is no existing record with Guinness for alive couples with the most grandchildren, Guinness World Records authorities say the couple very well might hold the record.
ref: Walaupun tidak ada rekod yang wujud di Guinness bagi pasangan masih hidup dengan cucu yang paling banyak, pihak berkuasa Rekod Dunia Guinness berkata pasangan tersebut mungkin akan dapat memegang rekod itu.

src: Glasgow resident Margaret McMillan had 123 grandchildren, but died last year at 98.
ref: Penduduk Glasgow Margaret McMillan mempunyai 123 orang cucu, tetapi dia meninggal dunia tahun lepas pada umur 98 tahun.

src: It wasn't until her funeral that the number, which included 15 great-great-grandchildren, was established by the family.
ref: Sehingga pengembumiannya nombor tersebut, yang termasuk 15 orang piut, telah dicatat oleh keluarga itu.

src: Kenya's new Parliament convened for the first time since the country's disputed December 27 election, but politician's on opposing sides took part in a heated discussion over who would be the new speaker of the party.
ref: Parlimen Baru Kenya diadakan buat kali pertama sejak pilihan raya 27 Disember dipertikaikan, tetapi ahli politik di pihak pembangkang mengambil bahagian dalam perbincangan hangat mengenai siapa yang akan menjadi speaker baru parti.

src: Kenyan opposition politicians argued with followers of re-elected President Mwai Kibaki over how to pick a new parliamentary speaker.
ref: Ahli-ahli politik pembangkang Kenya berhujah dengan pengikut Presiden Mwai Kibaki yang dilantik semula berkenaan bagaimana untuk memilih speaker parlimen baru.

src: When a discussion into how the speaker should be decided started, lawmakers with Raila Odinaga's opposition Orange Democratic Movement insisted the election for speaker be held by open ballot; Mr. Kibaki's supporters demanded the vote be secret.
ref: Apabila perbincangan bagaimana penceramah perlu diputuskan bermula, penggubal undang-undang bersama pembangkang Raila Odinaga Pergerakan Demokratik Orange menegaskan pemilihan speaker dijalankan melalui undi terbuka; Penyokong Encik Kibaki menuntut undi adalah rahsia.

src: The discussion took place for over an hour politicians from both sides took part in a discussion where anger was clearly shown, before the two parties decided a secret ballot was acceptable.
ref: Perbincangan berlangsung selama lebih satu jam ahli-ahli politik daripada kedua-dua pihak telah mengambil bahagian dalam perbincangan di mana kemarahan jelas terlihat, sebelum kedua-dua pihak memutuskan undi rahsia diterima.

src: The standing orders are very clear that members will be given a ballot.
ref: Peraturan tetap adalah sangat jelas bahawa ahli-ahli akan diberi undi.

src: Can you show us where it says secret ballot?
ref: Boleh anda tunjukkan kepada kami mana yang dikatakan undi rahsia?

src: We went into election with secret ballot, you stole the vote, we cannot trust you anymore, said William Ruto, a senior adviser for Odigna.
ref: Kami datang ke pilihan raya dengan undi rahsia, anda mencuri undi, kami tidak boleh mempercayai anda lagi, kata William Ruto, penasihat kanan untuk Odigna.

src: After a first round of voting, the Orange Democratic Movement candidate had a narrow lead, necessitating another ballot.
ref: Selepas pusingan pertama pengundian, calon Pergerakan Demokratik Orange mendahului kecil, memerlukan undi lain.

src: If no-one gets two-thirds majority after two rounds the speaker will be elected by a simple majority in the third round.
ref: Jika tidak ada yang mendapat majoriti dua pertiga selepas dua pusingan speaker akan dipilih oleh majoriti mudah pada pusingan ketiga.

src: It was an argument like that seen in Parliament that has led many Kenyans to say they have felt abandoned by their leaders in the weeks of chaos that followed the December 27 vote.
ref: Ia adalah satu pertelingkahan seperti yang dilihat di Parlimen yang telah membawa kepada ramai rakyat Kenya mengatakan bahawa mereka rasa ditinggalkan oleh pemimpin mereka pada minggu-minggu huru-hara yang diikuti oleh undian Disember 27.

src: "Though we are sad for his loss, he left a legacy that will inflame the enemy nation and religion."
ref: "Walaupun kami bersedih diatas kehilangannya, dia meninggalkan sebuah legasi yang akan meyemarakkan negara musuh dan agama".

src: It is speculated that he was hit by a United States missile, which is now identified as being fired from a Predator drone, in the North Waziristan of Pakistan, and a dozen more militants were also reported dead.
ref: Adalah diramalkan bahawa dia ditembak oleh peluru berpandu Amerika Syarikat, yang kini dikenalpasti telah ditembak daripada dron pemangsa, di Utara Waziriston Pakistan, dan sedozen lagi tentera militan dilaporkan turut mati.

src: "The missile appeared to have been fired by a drone," said a Pakistani intelligence official.
ref: "Peluru berpandu itu telah ditembak oleh dron," kata seorang perisik rasmi Pakistan.

src: "They do have an ability to regenerate and replace these guys," said a Western intelligence official.
ref: "Mereka mempnyai kebolehan untuk menambah semula dan menggantikan orang-orang ini," kata seorang perisik rasmi Barat.

src: Al-Libi is said to have been the third highest ranking member of al-Qaeda.
ref: Al-Libi dikatakan adalah kedudukan ahli ketiga tertinggi dalam al-Qaeda.

src: The Government of Pakistan said they did not know about his death.
ref: Kerajaan Pakistan berkata mereka tidak mengetahui tentang kematian beliau.

src: The details of the death have not yet been fully released.
ref: Butiran mengenai kematian tersebut belum lagi dikeluarkan sepenuhnya.
